name: Heritage Membership Team
subject: Don’t lose your benefits
body:
Your benefits are expiring, and time is running out to activate your Heritage Foundation membership for 2025.

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/u/rzHIaCHlLQixGGCeSuChoplB5vmYd8u6aXVwgtfH54peHDmqD3ZEDYmXcjq-nxRGvwu45exOkKzTkPrEqFkXOVKmgLNUod7f7SZAP0jgrtQre1F9OgOY8winl28deoaU3gSyiRzzTxNpj8SsFKjw6j9UPyl_zXREfh8eV1CSAcR5YJDqjbi9gRhn/veamMwFp5JY-9Gx5Rypy_7qQrJKg3vfX/5)_

| | Dear Fellow American,

Your benefits are expiring, and time is running out to activate your [Heritage Foundation membership for 2025](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/dGNMVoOYgsfTCQuXGOlBJikfPYpnaSQjVHq9m6c5P0449hWMy0SHbYR2m4PQC5q-xU41kU1bquWh7YcRN2tdJQ73MqdO-yCvyFpva-oMujAodf7sXkbUSoDun18BYzPQtOvWvWf4IqBV77Q5Z_8NJZ4raJLBYkYDey73GAgo1f29NOSphZ95ZjDOigMkMOCnur3zxzOzu5q3SQcaQIgNuJ-OQa5-WlaDghXMOanHoIrJ3xrApxdmtXIbj0rhIjPtuGvVydC5AFy7r77JwgRyv8FzdWBOsrMSub1WEbe0o9ZgZMrJF8ZFLrLulw8UI1PU1FBC1H56ul1hQZEstKBs1lYD5_aPkTdFANavbVUg729NMBO28t-6GFMC2SABpAIqJaioupJmWRj8zhzP/2aoS2NArjqbWzDHiseo5th7lYhL8sjuX/5).

If you don't act now, you could lose out on your member benefits like:
* **Your official Heritage Foundation membership card:** Heritage Foundation members are proud to stand for their conservative principles and we recognize each member with their own exclusive membership card.
* **Special invitations to virtual Heritage events:** As a member, you will be invited to attend virtual gatherings where you can hear from and interact directly with Heritage experts and other conservative movement leaders.
* **Exclusive Updates from Heritage Leadership:** We want you to be constantly informed about the impact of your membership. Every member receives regular updates from the front lines of policy battles happening in Washington D.C. and across the country.

Most important, by activating your membership today, you'll be supporting our effort to rescue the American Dream and defend America's founding principles.

Right now, we are working with the Trump Administration to advance the policy priorities that matter most to you--like dismantling the Deep State, securing our borders, eliminating woke ideologies, and promoting economic opportunity for all.

Your membership is key to the success of these efforts.

**Don 't let your member benefits expire. Activate your Heritage Foundation membership with a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/activate-now**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/VoPNmygt2OiBwp4BjtAAcLRDc6Q2fmn2vzINomc3F5tjTFM2rSplUSwuVKNc2nsQ5WJh402R0oBVLk09A3XsxzmXsl5JIKxFp84bbqJpB5OgGRIeZbcvNgBuZXXcI__NKGpnm0ko0ESZ4z4rZTTAd4xAtZZVVCBujsNf1XXsvAbDLjkVHDhODu9IDvJq1CO1Txk8lH1UQhZ1mGRGJZ-3K2Xjthok2Bspnj64eNqqfTF3BcQCapECVc1EzSbpUM8LVe6QDwgX1XOso3X4JNnmNZfd7-WXSqVnqp3WWDauzrYF8tmTxqURvws4zoFKT2JiLhfxlDD9QltQEVmzb-kXRor0zTN25pSGulBfoDN2CxJQMDwUBmBTUGpjDWARmHYGD6Rt3Y8VOHsn-6Kw/f72kE3f8f6JeyEK5EHE-hcy57H5LQ4uy/5)

Thank you for standing with us at this important time for our country.

Best regards,

The Heritage Membership Team

**P.S. Time is running out --don't lose your member benefits! Activate your Heritage Foundation membership today with a tax-deductible gift of $25 or more: [https://secured.heritage.org/activate-now](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/3sk05ogO-hz3uHBdhPSFYMY1PirCKRBE7RYv_kQr5evwp8H0yACSw6Q_AjoXX17Gxpi0YPkDjZwRCRXUoT3euYCTLaVx1Hg9vhaVbxQ81J-hCryrf2_PXMN2h2b2KrKPwDBkDGsvZywDnM9zn-BPS4jg2pi112vIbssaFSzFymCaQ0WkmSMC_jzFPJiyzH2ksXet42-YAWRrs-SrHjKdfbhMFul8v7KImruC4ETC17SkLP3OTKDJGipm7loWQSVlULA0tKewTq6lxZ-poUsYUxp63yZ7noazAINuCuyN73SQm-2u0N19cbFUAMM-LnYFuAOqLlKx-VVzEVhHZybX1EZ9Rm1Fa_PFduSHBmGXykClgRZBWZ-rhO-o3UQwUKYgDulnZAuYTyFIsBBf/9QN0h5Q40uRl_nboll3CDQaoIMMhFXHa/5)**

The Heritage Foundation 214 Massachusetts Avenue NE Washington D.C. 20002

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: We can save the Easter bunny
body:
| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue's Clues_...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f8d32a9fe8b047c6a39165deda94ffb2&_e=Y7UuBjRFkOa8uH5XbLHRcs4Yu_wVmfL_WHwD-plbKap3NtuauqFoSSVoOgOBjhZahGjHi2yIcpRgYuuDAWsLdGW6Z7r9983z018Vuy_rV0yV5BSnENV_cDF_CKwQezyAQIFtzEQELy80omDz7kZBUouq6PT46lct90AsJYa3Vqe8w81xOmzvLLX-F-NwY6vxoet1YLoFn2KPmdXLHvXSeMUyl3gwA4E3dCzrxW0akC7_UdJAjsKU8J0h95tES57wqNGhlULwmazR8lt_sih3tAh66vUIL6AwLTNzrCKscCOZj6ax0clVbzNQZqbZg-Fuztr0ipOlq-pRQw3pr4MvPw-snOBT1TC-3YWRkq3IsMfrimNLkgxT6Nn-io21ESGq)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. [**Today, I'm inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great**.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f8d32a9fe8b047c6a39165deda94ffb2&_e=Y7UuBjRFkOa8uH5XbLHRcs4Yu_wVmfL_WHwD-plbKap3NtuauqFoSSVoOgOBjhZahGjHi2yIcpRgYuuDAWsLdGW6Z7r9983z018Vuy_rV0yV5BSnENV_cDF_CKwQezyAQIFtzEQELy80omDz7kZBUouq6PT46lct90AsJYa3Vqe8w81xOmzvLLX-F-NwY6vxoet1YLoFn2KPmdXLHvXSeMUyl3gwA4E3dCzrxW0akC55Pd7RqdWRokH7G8E4tmyPVmMCBHcfa1BZ7DeoVox2o-Sbtlp5WKkLqr7CuHbGxnDfxKyxpDXX9hnMWGruvrb1P5AfCctoYD0Hn8vRawrFHb8EfQvaSFuhDs-KsKolvZ3BGsrekhK7s8uMIDrZtORp)Introducing: _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you've seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television.
---
>>Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode.**_
---
I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens _must take over_ to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That's why I'm asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $125,000 per episode for Season 2.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f8d32a9fe8b047c6a39165deda94ffb2&_e=Y7UuBjRFkOa8uH5XbLHRcs4Yu_wVmfL_WHwD-plbKap3NtuauqFoSSVoOgOBjhZahGjHi2yIcpRgYuuDAWsLdGW6Z7r9983z018Vuy_rV0yV5BSnENV_cDF_CKwQezyAQIFtzEQELy80omDz7kZBUouq6PT46lct90AsJYa3Vqe8w81xOmzvLLX-F-NwY6vxoet1YLoFn2KPmdXLHvXSeMUyl3gwA4E3dCzrxW0akC7jzW_UDiSScWRiMtxZoUy42XwPJ48XfMNRqvdc5cxtEoMDs01hMlXS1BlxIUybP18MfSRNfG507Z7UMpxUf8RupT0FAo2Hf3U0YaNa-mWEgZWkCjj_frUblIMLYTduMlXzAkZswOB_WUZfYLB2lFkv) ** As our special "Thank You" for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ _FREE on DVD_.This exclusive _Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f8d32a9fe8b047c6a39165deda94ffb2&_e=Y7UuBjRFkOa8uH5XbLHRcs4Yu_wVmfL_WHwD-plbKap3NtuauqFoSSVoOgOBjhZahGjHi2yIcpRgYuuDAWsLdGW6Z7r9983z018Vuy_rV0yV5BSnENV_cDF_CKwQezyAQIFtzEQELy80omDz7kZBUouq6PT46lct90AsJYa3Vqe8w81xOmzvLLX-F-NwY6vxoet1YLoFn2KPmdXLHvXSeMUyl3gwA4E3dCzrxW0akC4jLEEUeTF9VU-X-8OZC0UBWJ7BV_AaXY3vqHWIryDBR-VhBqde12iFqC4B85VWVRACekw18wDBuvv1TS4vcuCKlS7V4lJ1DavoGkRRTz2W5xvIwnTpTuOHslBPUxfzTxA0l528m7ZWGU376D_53Gx-)** , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. **[**So please -- whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f8d32a9fe8b047c6a39165deda94ffb2&_e=Y7UuBjRFkOa8uH5XbLHRcs4Yu_wVmfL_WHwD-plbKap3NtuauqFoSSVoOgOBjhZahGjHi2yIcpRgYuuDAWsLdGW6Z7r9983z018Vuy_rV0yV5BSnENV_cDF_CKwQezyAQIFtzEQELy80omDz7kZBUouq6PT46lct90AsJYa3Vqe8w81xOmzvLLX-F-NwY6vxoet1YLoFn2KPmdXLHvXSeMUyl3gwA4E3dCzrxW0akC5miGA6yScCcuAvQYxcs_Ql3qcFvGv5khRSWy-M8BT9C7Tkaip3y7oYoopKaGrZaBrNjNn5mHDqgiNEOXo3Ot_FVXDFtK6DwhPuddD2pLvVV463Cd4fb3ch4izTdr-1ViIvTMtW73328M1ay0gTfQ50)** There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---

clean_body: | | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children. | | | | Dear Friend in Faith, Please -- for the sake of all our families -- take it from me as someone who's lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life...You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace. But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on Blue's Clues... | | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to "educate" YOU about your "old-fashioned" and "mean" ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. : Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk.I'm making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at Brave Books.If you've seen me and Brave Books on Fox News , you know we've already countered those awful "Drag Queen Story Hours" the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic "Story Hours" of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It's encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we're working to have that same impact in television. >Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a Founding Supporter. The great news is that we've already completed the first ten character-building episodes of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk!We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced the parents watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone -- including folks just like you -- who worked so hard to get us that far.But now Brave Books has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with. #1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left. You see, we're making the first 5 episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk available absolutely FREE to everyone on YouTube. That's the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can't get the word out. And the left will try to bury Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 -- and we need to raise the funds in this first quarter of 2025. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $125,000 per episode. I know that's a lot of money but it's actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won't work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special "Thank You" for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we'll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Adventure with Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won't be available for sale anywhere. So with - , you'll be part of a select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You'll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor's office. So many children have no way of hearing God's message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child's life. There's no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family -- not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Adventures with Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart -- maybe even yours -- is to support the very first children's television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Patriot, have you heard the news?

**2025 is our year - the year of MAGA!**

Conservatives won the White House, Senate, and House, giving us a window to enact the America First Agenda, but it won't be easy. The Left will fight tooth and nail to stop our Agenda every chance they get. As a veteran, I know how to fight and never back down. I'm a pro-America fighter ready to take on the Establishment. **[By working together, we can ensure the Establishment of the Left is shut down once and for all. We are asking all American Patriots to chip in anything you can to help our MAGA dreams become reality.](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=88ed534a6a5c4645b56fe0aa5766e059&_e=io0sFCrOndzZTir_lJdTnLOy1kkmY61CEb_issgyIwpcQ0lMkFXp0eDNa8HuHcpskxYVazo1VpKUORtk26do5SbTG81G8STnHZkOotQEzKKGSeZo9BeelzsQ1IoJwsAXfE6ntTEc2inlGvv1MiDI4xAfrUQoDxTy-e6VNrpcBQOzfY_RFfz8ETlBxdIo5xo77XqBaaEAH2CaljF_LoAhLfvy7_v03b_IHzuePC-2x-gQWf_5BctC9mCnf8aeYRGt-hsyie51ckDnrX0r2qdLz4K2zLvZghgOgzm9rV_rkMd1fmoIUCFjCuOYmtTu29Vld_dpikQj9UIl2dRQ6IQniTvpY5GScvHCZzP2hRqVNQ0%3D)**

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: wait, TWO Republican Senators resigning?!?!!!?
body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.

## ***PRESIDENT TRUMP’S HALFTIME UPDATE***
---
[](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
I won in a LANDSLIDE VICTORY, and now, Democrat lunatics have threatened to **IMPEACH ME AGAIN** after my Historic Trump Executive Orders!

I will never let them STOP MAGA...
SO, in order for me to Unleash the Golden Age of America, we need a GAMEPLAN. Here's mine:
**#1** UNLEASH AMERICA WITH HISTORIC TRUMP EXECUTIVE ORDERS
**#2** CONFIRM MY ENTIRE CABINET IMMEDIATELY
**#3** MAXIMUM PRESSURE WITH TARIFFS
**#4** TAKE BACK THE PANAMA CANAL
**#5** MAKE CANADA AND GREENLAND GREAT AGAIN

If you support me on my mission to SAVE AMERICA, I’m humbly asking for you to make a huge statement right now that Democrats want to start another SHAM IMPEACHMENT...
**[Before the game is over, I’m calling on ONE MILLION pro-Trump patriots to chip in and proudly say: I STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)**

From the bottom of my heart, I want to thank you for being one of my STRONGEST defenders.
**_I know you’ve always had my back, and I know with your support at this very moment, WE WILL MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_**
The only reason we’ve gotten this far is because of YOU AND YOU ALONE.
**_[SO PLEASE, join the PRESIDENTIAL PATRIOT BLITZ right now and STAND WITH TRUMP ASAP>](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**
I know with you by my side, we will unleash the Golden Age of America!

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Data scrubs and document deletions – what you need to know about this moment in the fight for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
At the end of January, a state grand jury in Louisiana indicted a doctor from the state of New York for providing medication abortion to a Louisiana resident. The patient’s mother was also arrested and indicted.
Around the same time, Donald Trump’s Health and Human Services Department was scrubbing pages with the word “abortion” from its website and the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention was deleting web documents on reproductive rights issues, sexual health, and intimate partner violence.
Now, the HHS website has gone a step further and actually scrubbed information on HIPAA protections for reproductive rights – which should raise *serious* alarm bells for all of us.
Look – we don’t know for sure why they’re doing this. But we can certainly make an educated guess :
The only reasonable explanation for this information being removed is that the Trump Administration plans to roll back medical privacy protections for reproductive health data – a move clearly designed to make it easier for law enforcement to access women’s abortion records.
I introduced the My Body, My Data Act during my first term in Congress because the privacy surrounding our bodily autonomy is an issue I care deeply about [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xOeL7Tvn5E6DElvqZNDThg2] – and one that affects millions of people all around the country. The legislation’s goal was to create a new national standard to protect our reproductive and sexual health data.
We desperately need this because in addition to our official medical records, our own online behavior can lead to serious consequences in the post-Roe era. The information we leave behind in period and fertility tracking apps, ride-sharing apps, and search engines can currently be legally sold and shared *without your consent* with advertisers, data brokers, and law enforcement. My bill would create clear legal guidelines to prevent that from happening.
The bill hasn’t been passed yet – and with the current House leadership, it isn’t likely to be considered in the immediate future.
But the margin in the House is razor-thin right now – 218 Republicans to our 215 Democrats – and between special elections and the midterms, we could see a Democratic House sooner rather than later. And when we do, we MUST pass the My Body, My Data Act without delay, and send a clear signal that this is a priority for the American people.
If you’re with me on this, please sign my petition in support of the My Body, My Data Act and a continued effort on establishing privacy protections for our reproductive and sexual health data. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/xOeL7Tvn5E6DElvqZNDThg2]
While there’s a lot to focus on right now, this is one issue I will keep speaking out about over and over again – because we cannot stand by while women are targeted by this Administration for practicing our fundamental right of bodily autonomy.
Thanks for reading,
Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

body:

| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7b4ba767-cf0f-4708-a1c3-3a16e9219b87/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter, Let’s be clear: four years of President Donald Trump feels like an eternity, and it’s only been a few weeks. But here’s how to make the time go by: [Outwork and outraise him and his base so we can stop the constant attacks on marginalized communities and our democracy.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbe51f514-6f9d-464f-bd6d-184fbe196fb8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T383937da-3700-4695-b0e9-5be1ce1507ce/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We’ve said it before: There is no offseason when fascism is at play. Day in and day out, Trump and his team continue to ram through unqualified cabinet nominees and write executive actions that will hurt working Americans while protecting the rich. We can’t miss a beat – but together, we can make a HUGE impact if we put in the work. [If you still care about protecting our democracy and ensuring that our country does not fall to Project 2025, then make a contribution to power our efforts defending working-class Americans in the weeks and months ahead.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce2d8d91-06b3-4c08-8e7a-e5c5929ad1ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2171658b-cee8-480c-a187-c58783d869b0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| We are already experiencing the consequences of a second Trump administration. Let us find resilience in the work we do from coast to coast. Thank you for all that you do, Blue Amp Action

| | |
---
| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5672a0f1-92b5-4828-b093-ddffcdab56ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
This message covers the whole nation...
| | | We are a community of gun-loving Americans. We hope you stick around but remember you can [unsubscribe](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20244/6374453/a5f035ad8afa7589abc03864170ed401c7c4b1c0/9d663042bd1b4e52e0be63e683344c113bea0e05) here at any time.

---
|
---
February 10th, 2025
---
|
---
**Louder than 5G.**
**Stronger than the signal.** Forget 5G towers.
This message covers the whole nation.
And it’s loud and clear: **Trump 2025 – Can You Hear Us Now?**
---
[](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20244/6374453/74d7cf3275b119bbe3e398738205d84cbb3fb0e7/9d663042bd1b4e52e0be63e683344c113bea0e05)
---
We’re giving away **250 of these hilarious "Better Coverage Than 5G" Trump t-shirts for FREE.**
Yep, totally free.
All you need to do is cover shipping, and we’ll send one your way. This tee isn’t just funny—it’s bold.
It’s for patriots who aren’t afraid to stand tall, speak up, and make a statement.

**You’ll be heard.** But don’t wait too long.
Only **250 shirts** are up for grabs.
Once they’re gone, they’re gone.

name: Josh Weil
subject: Ron Desantic didn't expect us.
body:
That was his first mistake. Now we need to capitalize on it.

# **Ron Desantis Didn't Expect Us**
---
| | | | friend, We aced our first test: We WON the Democratic primary in January, but now its on to April where we MUST take down Trump’s hand-picked crony. Gov. Ron DeSantis purposely set this special election on a tightly compressed timeline—only 4 months from start to finish—so that grassroots Democratic campaigns like ours would have significantly less time to fundraise and organize. **_But DeSantis underestimated the strength, resolve, and resilience of Americans from across the country coming together to fight back._** He didn't expect us to be able to build a strong, well-funded campaign that can win. Together, we have done just that—thousands of people like yourself have answered the call. **Our fundraising is what is keeping us afloat in this race—but only if we can count on thousands more supporters to give whatever they can by the end of the day**. name: The Flyover
subject: Eagles Rout Chiefs, American Beer, and a 'Bullseye' Galaxy
body:
The Philadelphia Eagles hammered the Kansas City Chiefs [in a 40-22 Super Bowl rout](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu5CAQQL8Gd1jMYJt1QXEN3V57pcWZYT0RBsuQdfbvo02f-klPT-_ffbl7Tpwff_1OtsWyoMJRKpSgluA5vZahCzYSIemOLBg9w83cBtVtdpy9Aj-BitrgiuscaJpH9DAZCCuEju3bphAUwKBH05tAECHOa5z0GNUoBkWBWzn7j8K5bRTTqzzp7Neyd8lurR1V6D8CnUB3XVdP9chvKNDlmAS62sr5EugWgY6DQDdoY9DMk0BH_pGoypMDyVB2zj43GShSriTr50Gn_F-uJBN_yYuzXDemWLvThuPilLhORgzqsXtOP0Htt0FPi98BAAD__5JoZ0o) on the strength of a swarming defense that forced three turnovers, sacked Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes six times and held Kansas City to a total 275 yards.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FOwzAQxvGnsbdWd2e7jgcPLNnKyhiF-K455DQhNUV9e1TEyvx9-kn_t_NwHrXq9fI6LpybrAMBhQPQAWEoo9bH4G3JwkzsLGeMLmEXOw92zmOigAmjJNeVU5i6koQTvHsiwCmJ1fzUgBAQvQvxGAujoKRJTi4IBOOBi7Z1P36sem0zS32sd96P07rYmufWtptxL4Z6Q_2mn19cVfi5Gur_vnbPZfvWWvV2isbDZRm1_gLtv6B7pp8AAAD__4kiTK8) | |
# Monday, February 10, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1870, President Ulysses S. Grant signed a bill into law requiring weather observations to be taken at 44 military stations across the eastern half of the nation, thereby founding what became [the National Weather Service](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OtCAUxvGrwQ4DBxi0oHgbu3nbLQ3KYTgbRgxDdL37zX602__yPPm_3ee7p0zb479_omuxzCDAcAFcijl4ytesu-AiIqDq0EmrRjnYQYsuOQSlLMTFjAIhDiCWoAcptRyjVotZO3JfawKkkFIrY3sbUEYZxzXelInCMC0wUCu1fy-0tYQxX-XA2q_l2WWXWttfTP1jMDGYzvPsY_k40bf0QxhMGX3dGEzJ7_vFF6otBX_xzTcqm8_8V_MX1oNW7KoL-0k50-tmmRaPp6f8_db-qj8cfAYAAP__CgBdrg). Philadelphia Eagles fans were delighted, Kansas City Chiefs boosters were despondent, and for everyone else, last night’s Super Bowl game marked the end of a long NFL season. That means it’s time for basketball! Take our poll today and let us know if you’re a current follower of NBA basketball. Today's sponsor is for our tea drinkers! [Pique](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FOwzAQxvGnsbdWd2e7jgcPLNnKyhiF-K455DQhNUV9e1TEyvx9-kn_t_NwHrXq9fI6LpybrAMBhQPQAWEoo9bH4G3JwkzsLGeMLmEXOw92zmOigAmjJNeVU5i6koQTvHsiwCmJ1fzUgBAQvQvxGAujoKRJTi4IBOOBi7Z1P36sem0zS32sd96P07rYmufWtptxL4Z6Q_2mn19cVfi5Gur_vnbPZfvWWvV2isbDZRm1_gLtv6B7pp8AAAD__4kiTK8) is a super tea that promotes gut health. Check them out in today's edition.
|
---
## Eagles Rout Chiefs in Super Bowl
The Philadelphia Eagles hammered the Kansas City Chiefs [in a 40-22 Super Bowl rout](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu5CAQQL8Gd1jMYJt1QXEN3V57pcWZYT0RBsuQdfbvo02f-klPT-_ffbl7Tpwff_1OtsWyoMJRKpSgluA5vZahCzYSIemOLBg9w83cBtVtdpy9Aj-BitrgiuscaJpH9DAZCCuEju3bphAUwKBH05tAECHOa5z0GNUoBkWBWzn7j8K5bRTTqzzp7Neyd8lurR1V6D8CnUB3XVdP9chvKNDlmAS62sr5EugWgY6DQDdoY9DMk0BH_pGoypMDyVB2zj43GShSriTr50Gn_F-uJBN_yYuzXDemWLvThuPilLhORgzqsXtOP0Htt0FPi98BAAD__5JoZ0o) on the strength of a swarming defense that forced three turnovers, sacked Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes six times and held Kansas City to a total 275 yards. Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts was [named Super Bowl MVP,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFu8yAYAJ8Gb1jwgU08MPwLW_61o0XMR0yKwQUS129fpXvnk06n-7jOVxtiSPf_dkPdfJ6BwUAZUM5mZ0M8Z9k57REBRYeaKzHxi7pI1q36Zr1chFJyYtM4DIsCuYxMWi7E5JmzXdBvGwPOOJdiUL1yyD330-JHMXg2EMnQhZZL_8ghtRV9PPMLS7_krYt6bW2vRPwjYAiY4zh6rHt6QwIm-UjA1JbLScDMBExwBIwUSgmpJAGD9h6x0q-nLQ3LzS6f9GEjJro-S6s02Q0d3V47rc8dC73lI9IYvrui3X6EGEMdFZHsvtkQf4vaX4deGn4CAAD__-zyZ7M) throwing for 221 yards, rushing for 72 yards, and accounting for three touchdowns. He now holds the record for most rushing yards by a QB in the Super Bowl. The game wasn’t even as close as the final score makes it seem. The Chiefs were down 40-6 in the middle of the fourth quarter, in a game that experts predicted would see [a record $1.39 billion](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtyhCAUhp9Gu-NwEcGCIs12mzalg3BYT4Kyg2SNb58xfer_Mt98H_fp7ijR9nh3K9oa8ySYUMAEcDYFR-mc-jbYiChQtmi5liM32vSsXSyLo3PBxIhKKeSux9n0ZhiZHAc9CN-Svd6Y4IzzXird6YA88jj6OEgVmWp6hoFqLt1npq0uGNOZX1g6n9c22aXW597It0bcGnE7jqNbXfnCerjql6vTiNteczmvdDnBrVjIu22Hg1KCGSs4KOhzCcBBjjBTSpQ3yBvs308sMOcjQaIfCF4HY5Rsiw3Pa037oJuePVZH6Q-n_qfnZcVvAAAA__8nkmhF) in wagers. For many viewers, the real appeal was the Super Bowl commercials, featuring a number of TV and movie stars, along with the traditional Budweiser Clydesdale horses, special effects aliens and surreal scenarios. You can see [many of the TV spots here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAUhJ8Gd1iAjXEKim3cZdstrWNzsFnxE8FJrLz9VdLfborRaL7v3329Q4ghH38hoSVfViWU5kJxKVYHIb7XsXPWIyocOrTSDDc5m3kU3WlR7lobPU3oFWiF8ybMNmwelJh342UX7GdNKCmkHAdteuNQeulvu58G7YVmo0AXqNT-fwmZTvTxXV5Y-72kLtqT6NHY8Iephanluq6eSmrHMzj8NJhaMBNWgpATZmJqaVQRUsjHJz8fWPlWrsi_UHtJCeseIDYOMXI6kYNrHLLjhNCwNn7hC3lDzLwV7qF21brHFWIMbTJsFEeCEL_v6DdbL6t-AgAA__8Dp270).
## Officials Cut Off Consumer Agency
The White House ordered the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) [to cease most of its operations](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0UD3PpCAY_DXYYfhStKC4hm6vvdKw8LA-FwQjuMZ_f_H6t5lMMV-ZP6_l5TBh_vx2G5gWyyKYGCgTlLMlOEz3orpgIoAA2YHhWs580pNi3Wq8l1GPnoUxgORM6rcenQ_z7Cc3SwUdmieNCc44V3LQvQ7AI4-zj6McIhuIYhCwlaP_WzC3FWK6yxeO3petS2Ztba9E_iLCEmGv6-rP6loJ7n4ERNjaynETYTNclQi7l4QN_UOfYiIsEw9Mj3vFBnQtZwUawCfMUGk8c8D8ob7kem5w0IjZZQ90P0oD37Bk-j4PcCcRVk9ynNSsGNNE2O4wYb8wJayjJop9Nofp_-72049fI_4FAAD__3zYdHs), effectively shutting the agency down. Additionally, newly installed Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought announced the agency could no longer draw on federal funding, calling [its $711.6 million in reserves](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kD-vpSAUxD8NdsfA8Q_XguI2Zpu75e52hgsHZYNgBK_x27_4-lfNJJOZTH5_X9NL--Dj_FuvpIpLE3LsgCMIPlntwzW1lVWOCKmpSAnZDOIhHy2vFuUMokUt353sGrT9W_dDI81gSZhW2K7y6l7jKLgQbdPJWloSTrjBuL7pHO9Yy8n6kvb6f_KxLOTClT601yatVVBLKVtmzZPhyHA8z7Nec7wzhiNFODLDcUvBF29uO9_VuFIsDMdPOualgDlKhuQcGLe9wR3R-jhD1tctvkCGmApEMpSz3i8oCfYjQlkI9EzRXAxHvcPzKa5fj39_ql3Z7fQh-NxL1vJ51T58vy0_0fso_AoAAP__9vNz8Q) “excessive in the current fiscal environment.” _“This spigot, long contributing to CFPB's unaccountability, is now being turned off,”_ Vought said. Republicans have long been critical of the CFPB, which was created in the wake of the 2008 financial crisis by President Obama and Massachusetts Democratic Sen. Elizabeth Warren.
## Trump's Early Approval Hits 53%
President Trump's early weeks in office have garnered [approval from 53% of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7GO8yAQBOCngQ4LFhxwQfE37vK3V1rYLMmesEE2Fytvf3L660YaaUbf1326B8q0Pf6HFX1LZQIJvZAglJxioPyeDI8-IQJqjl5ZPShnnZH86UE7RG3UENGFKG1Mi9Mo1WzdPC8qcvLXmgQllTK6t52NqJJKw5Juuk-yZ0ZipFb27rvQ1p6Y8ru8cO-WsvLsn63Vg-l_DEYG43me3TIfG57H1TMYr8hgbPvPWkWodS-vkEWptFHZRC05iw8HxMBg5LuP9aSc6bhZZuRjDZQ_T-0v-cvDbwAAAP__wmta0A), who view him as "tough," "energetic," and "effective," with 70% saying he is delivering on campaign promises, according to a new CBS News/YouGov poll released Sunday. While majorities support his deportation policies and border initiatives, two-thirds say he [isn't focusing enough on lowering prices](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOtCAUhZ8Gu2sAUcaCYorff5vZdkvDyEXvBsEgM8a337j9VuckJ_ly8n09xoelQHH-tCua4tMouWyBSxB8dJbCOarKGY8osanQCN304qZvileL0b1TaJ_Yy8m1XnmvJ9E3XDzbTk322VVkLhqXgguhmlbX2qHwwveT75rW85Ypjo5KyvV3olgW9OFMb8z1lNYqmKWUbWfNncmByeE4jnrd47UxOWCE187kEPG4YkuBCk1XLfm1biCBA0UqZAPYbcvpbQNkWyjOOyw0L5ihLDYCRfCU9wIF8wW2Ge53cX78-5-qbNx2UAi0d5opPq-Wwu-38pert5E_AQAA___WXG0S). The poll shows 54% approve of his handling of the Gaza conflict, though nearly half of Americans think his proposal to take over Gaza is a bad idea. The partisan divide remains stark across all issues, with 91% of Republicans approving of Trump's overall performance compared to just 6% of Democrats. See [the entire survey here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FurDAQheGnsTvQzNhgu3BxG7q9bUoEeLw4MngFzqJ9-2iTOvWRzqf_4zbeppTTfv8_bexrLCMBdQ1QgzCGKeXXqGXwkZlYSfZolENrrAa5em1mNDPOkY2Npo8uKoe9AWTrenZaJv9-A0JA1KozrQmMEaNbYq-6CJ3QwCHVcrSfJe115Zhf5clHu5RNZr_W-jiF-idoEDRc19Wey5Hm8J4FDaEsXxvvVdBgqbNGE4CgYZnPna-z-bXBNSgPHx5XyjmdvREa7tuU8o9R_2p-evoOAAD__zZLVX8).
* * *

([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO6yAQRb8GOiJmwHZSULzGXV67pYVhsImwifAkq_z9yttvfa_Okc7Xfbr7XPK-_PcbOU51Qo2d0qhAT9Hn8pmsjC4RIRlJDgZzg-twtVquzvYhWAx9tDQj9nDFNIfZ00DgjbEosztpGkEDWNMNlyESJEi3kHrTJd0Jqylmru3yqHnnlVL51De1S6ibLG5lfh7C_BM4Chx5pTWXcm4Cx0bLq3jOdRc4hvpqrGbPXOgQOHZgrNagHq-4kIp1IVX8XJuK9PSNN9pZ-RDoOM-yufj8zqXkox-E1cvm869F8l9F3g5_AgAA__-sK2Nm)) **➤****Meanwhile** , another federal judge blocked similar DOGE access to the Treasury Department, drawing calls for the judge’s impeachment from Elon Musk. ([See Details](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00D9vwyAUBPBPA5sjeAY7DAxdvKVrRwvDI7yWP1ZCU_nbV-7e8e6k33Aft_XmKFO9v7uCtse2ggA9CBikWIOjfKyKBxsRAUeOVs6jkdf5qgRP1omgZNBmQ_BGbgYnp8BPGwazeX91nOypCZBCSjXq-TIHlFFG4-M06ig0UwID9fa4fDaqPWHMR3vh4-Jb4dmm3vcnG98YLAyWnjBRzufGYNlbJn-cNfpUW273M2g5qhn0gLnVoXw_vwYqOzqfCtY-BCyuBgYLf9iw_1DO9JxmpsS9OPqDef_vhJeF3wAAAP__CQRfKg)) **➤ U.S. Sen. Andy Kim **(D-N.J.) said in an interview on Sunday that Democrats are ready to shut down the federal government to protest actions taken by the Trump administration. ([More](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L1uwyAUxfGngY0ILhDigaGLt3TtaBFzCbR8WDaJ5bev3L3zOfoN_6_7dHcpp_r8dAVtD20CDppxYIJP3qV8TIp6GxABJUUrjBzEzdwUp9GC8UY_YEaptZsfwagQOAh3XlAPA0321DgILoSS2lyMRxFEGOZwlTpwTRRHn3pbL98t1R4x5KO9cb3MrdBsY-_LRuQHgZHA2CPGlPO5ERhjK1hx3wiMWkh1A85c9Qf7SYV5LG1eXd_Y89RqwdrZFl_dt72yvr7KQmCkq_XLnnJO29UQxZ_FpT-d9v9KvC38BgAA__9fNWDg))****

clean_body: The Philadelphia Eagles hammered the Kansas City Chiefs on the strength of a swarming defense that forced three turnovers, sacked Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes six times and held Kansas City to a total 275 yards. | | | | | | Monday, February 10, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1870, President Ulysses S. Grant signed a bill into law requiring weather observations to be taken at 44 military stations across the eastern half of the nation, thereby founding what became . Philadelphia Eagles fans were delighted, Kansas City Chiefs boosters were despondent, and for everyone else, last night’s Super Bowl game marked the end of a long NFL season. That means it’s time for basketball! Take our poll today and let us know if you’re a current follower of NBA basketball. Today's sponsor is for our tea drinkers! is a super tea that promotes gut health. Check them out in today's edition. | Eagles Rout Chiefs in Super Bowl The Philadelphia Eagles hammered the Kansas City Chiefs on the strength of a swarming defense that forced three turnovers, sacked Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes six times and held Kansas City to a total 275 yards. Philadelphia Eagles quarterback Jalen Hurts was throwing for 221 yards, rushing for 72 yards, and accounting for three touchdowns. He now holds the record for most rushing yards by a QB in the Super Bowl. The game wasn’t even as close as the final score makes it seem. The Chiefs were down 40-6 in the middle of the fourth quarter, in a game that experts predicted would see in wagers. For many viewers, the real appeal was the Super Bowl commercials, featuring a number of TV and movie stars, along with the traditional Budweiser Clydesdale horses, special effects aliens and surreal scenarios. You can see . Officials Cut Off Consumer Agency The White House ordered the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) , effectively shutting the agency down. Additionally, newly installed Office of Management and Budget Director Russell Vought announced the agency could no longer draw on federal funding, calling “excessive in the current fiscal environment.” “This spigot, long contributing to CFPB's unaccountability, is now being turned off,” Vought said. Republicans have long been critical of the CFPB, which was created in the wake of the 2008 financial crisis by President Obama and Massachusetts Democratic Sen. Elizabeth Warren. Trump's Early Approval Hits 53% President Trump's early weeks in office have garnered , who view him as "tough," "energetic," and "effective," with 70% saying he is delivering on campaign promises, according to a new CBS News/YouGov poll released Sunday. While majorities support his deportation policies and border initiatives, two-thirds say he . The poll shows 54% approve of his handling of the Gaza conflict, though nearly half of Americans think his proposal to take over Gaza is a bad idea. The partisan divide remains stark across all issues, with 91% of Republicans approving of Trump's overall performance compared to just 6% of Democrats. See . subject: Healey won’t soar to re-election
body:
MassGOP's formidable challenger...
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHaOkc9_bQsd1wVxXWG6gD6Jz1E_AL268VtcZckgsrEx-OcrJ94YmGR3nL85Ozjf0kDUrN6tPkNC9GVnOfCYsU8H43B4umi3oTwNyjlVtKMVl9uFhB_iOmWk4NDzxMZiCATevD2_vy1HfN6rHhpjeQ==&c=_8brQuJnPlFwyuU0N8DfplQjeZU6z_sX40Uns81j9Ai103_V2aEEqg==&ch=Zn4YXO8JWUki-5rB2sx-bekjsdTr_tnBk2op51F1xyZkVAdtg_Yp2w==)

| Dear Peter,
⚠️ Governor Maura Healey announced her plans to seek re-election -> MassGOP confident we will have a formidable challenger to restore prosperity to Massachusetts ⚠️
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE TO RECRUITING CONSERVATIVE CANDIDATES](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHaOkc9_bQsd1wVxXWG6gD6Jz1E_AL268VtcZckgsrEx-OcrJ94YmOlmxujmmZ6A8IKMv8Y2YRkeRzHvQOSgpMmHnsC3izkOTKS0g88iUqhMD9XbZ3T96XgJ2ZRVltULOzh6r0VB2cAFn4sB_09_zZ9zNZUa15CA3TFaOo1D7ksLZbr_798Mii3QVEwhT3Xr&c=_8brQuJnPlFwyuU0N8DfplQjeZU6z_sX40Uns81j9Ai103_V2aEEqg==&ch=Zn4YXO8JWUki-5rB2sx-bekjsdTr_tnBk2op51F1xyZkVAdtg_Yp2w==)
---
Late last week, Governor Maura Healey announced her bid for re-election. Over the past four years, Healey has overseen a taxpayer-funded humanitarian crisis, soaring costs of living, tax hikes, reckless spending, and the least transparent government in the nation.
Massachusetts needs a leader who will get us back on track--someone who will cut taxes, reduce burdensome regulations, and prioritize funding for local communities rather than perpetuating wasteful government bloat.
Massachusetts needs a governor who will restore transparency to Beacon Hill and focus on putting money in the hands of residents instead of expanding state bureaucracy.
Massachusetts needs an executive who will strengthen our business climate, increase wages, and make Massachusetts a place where people want to live and work.
Massachusetts needs a governor who will prioritize the needs of residents and put the good of the Commonwealth above political gamesmanship.
---
| [HELP FUND CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT EFFORTS](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHaOkc9_bQsd1wVxXWG6gD6Jz1E_AL268VtcZckgsrEx-OcrJ94YmOlmxujmmZ6A8IKMv8Y2YRkeRzHvQOSgpMmHnsC3izkOTKS0g88iUqhMD9XbZ3T96XgJ2ZRVltULOzh6r0VB2cAFn4sB_09_zZ9zNZUa15CA3TFaOo1D7ksLZbr_798Mii3QVEwhT3Xr&c=_8brQuJnPlFwyuU0N8DfplQjeZU6z_sX40Uns81j9Ai103_V2aEEqg==&ch=Zn4YXO8JWUki-5rB2sx-bekjsdTr_tnBk2op51F1xyZkVAdtg_Yp2w==)
---
We are confident that voters will reject another four years of the Healey-Driscoll Administration and elect a common-sense Republican to restore accountability, affordability, and good governance to the Commonwealth.
As we speak, Republicans across MA are running for local office to: ✅ Protect public safety, ✅ Amend the right to shelter law; and ✅ Put an end to backdoor deals and reckless spending. 2026 is right around the corner...
---
| [DONATE TO CANDIDATE RECRUITMENT EFFORTS HERE](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fHaOkc9_bQsd1wVxXWG6gD6Jz1E_AL268VtcZckgsrEx-OcrJ94YmOlmxujmmZ6A8IKMv8Y2YRkeRzHvQOSgpMmHnsC3izkOTKS0g88iUqhMD9XbZ3T96XgJ2ZRVltULOzh6r0VB2cAFn4sB_09_zZ9zNZUa15CA3TFaOo1D7ksLZbr_798Mii3QVEwhT3Xr&c=_8brQuJnPlFwyuU0N8DfplQjeZU6z_sX40Uns81j9Ai103_V2aEEqg==&ch=Zn4YXO8JWUki-5rB2sx-bekjsdTr_tnBk2op51F1xyZkVAdtg_Yp2w==)

name: History Facts
subject: This president held meetings while using the bathroom
body:
Lyndon B. Johnson led the nation in an untraditional manner at times, going so far as to conduct meetings with his advisers while seated on the toilet. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68do5a09yzt70bo9eo16t2o8pz3w2klc4433k64vugdhgccsrlwqvurb9e76zsfmyuj83a1eiqj6rvrfvrepc7m7prv80pezeshjd60u1942y17x217x0v1gstsuzoo5qo5wfarjq1adtwl16&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [Lyndon B. Johnson liked to conduct meetings in the bathroom.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| L yndon B. Johnson led the nation in an untraditional manner at times, going so far as to conduct meetings with his advisers while [seated on the toilet](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com). The 36th U.S. president was known for a method of persuasion called the “[Johnson treatment](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com),” in which he won political victories either through flattery or bullying. One of LBJ’s most common tactics was inviting people into the bathroom and continuing the conversation, often leaving the door wide open and creating an awkward environment.
---
While some advisers would turn away in order to give the president privacy, Johnson would invite them to come closer so he could hear them better. One such instance saw national security adviser McGeorge Bundy nearly stumble and fall onto LBJ’s lap while he was seated on the toilet. Johnson treated other private facilities as meeting rooms as well — he was known to have aides stand just outside the shower, and he kept the conversation going while drying himself off afterward. Johnson even had telephones installed throughout various White House bathrooms, to ensure he’d never miss an important call. The president’s eccentricities weren’t limited to just the toilet, either. LBJ once completely stripped down while conducting an interview with reporters aboard Air Force One, continuing the conversation as normal. He also began many mornings by inviting aides into the White House bedroom to discuss official business while he was still in bed with his wife, Lady Bird Johnson.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
Thank you for supporting our advertisers!
---
| [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1wbmisw9fj5odxn6ui08m03h7tbw28ckjpiczcbvbvcgae5gc5kz9c3upqqg8kpgfj9nuywzpn4kh0jx8cwoqk3ohv5lczkmxsl94gprsw1275jy8qnvqtuowtm79oh7sybedrvrbv51a3farzv6ynov31iznscbwdec3mmxxyq6satsz8tlnmjwlav1121pmd6lqo27fp0uf4zbybsv9r7lk0atwrkqvia5d3iz1q8vpi8r66l3d1ux5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

---|---|---
## The first flushable toilet was invented by Queen Elizabeth I’s godson.
While rudimentary toilets have existed for millennia, it wasn’t until the late 16th century that someone invented the first modern flushable toilet. That man was [John Harington](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=srgv1b&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), godson of Queen Elizabeth I. Harington built himself a house that included a flushable toilet nicknamed “Ajax” — a play on the slang term “jakes” used to refer to toilets at the time. The invention consisted of a 2-foot-deep bowl and a flushing mechanism controlled by a series of handles and levels. Each flush used 7.5 gallons of water; the tank emptied into the street and was refilled by an upstairs cistern. When Queen Elizabeth visited Harington’s home in 1592, she was impressed by the creation and even requested one for herself. The first patent for a flushable toilet was later issued in 1775 to Alexander Cumming, who incorporated a now-common S-shaped pipe into the flushing mechanism.

clean_body: Lyndon B. Johnson led the nation in an untraditional manner at times, going so far as to conduct meetings with his advisers while seated on the toilet. | L yndon B. Johnson led the nation in an untraditional manner at times, going so far as to conduct meetings with his advisers while . The 36th U.S. president was known for a method of persuasion called the “,” in which he won political victories either through flattery or bullying. One of LBJ’s most common tactics was inviting people into the bathroom and continuing the conversation, often leaving the door wide open and creating an awkward environment. While some advisers would turn away in order to give the president privacy, Johnson would invite them to come closer so he could hear them better. One such instance saw national security adviser McGeorge Bundy nearly stumble and fall onto LBJ’s lap while he was seated on the toilet. Johnson treated other private facilities as meeting rooms as well — he was known to have aides stand just outside the shower, and he kept the conversation going while drying himself off afterward. Johnson even had telephones installed throughout various White House bathrooms, to ensure he’d never miss an important call. The president’s eccentricities weren’t limited to just the toilet, either. LBJ once completely stripped down while conducting an interview with reporters aboard Air Force One, continuing the conversation as normal. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: 'Ghost Deer,' 'Outrageous Debacle,' and a Rooster Mascot
body:
A licensed white-tailed deer breeder and his business partner from East Texas have been convicted of illegally smuggling seven "ghost deer." Game wardens intercepted them in Montgomery County on their way to Brazoria and Duval counties, where the two unnamed suspects allegedly intended to release the deer on private property.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLluwzAMQL9G3myQlHwNGgoE2dK1oyFZdEzAFyzl-vvCadGtK98DSbyvS3dxMsly_XQz2_Qc1o6AyhwoR-iCk-nVmSxYD6HFjC3WusUWKoRstL713jcG2pqgaiuNTU01uFCVpg_s-0zssQwIAYlqUxaD96VvPA2uIQxcKQMcJK17kUZO_HRxmF7rnfeiX-dssmNKW1T6Q9FZ0VmWO8dULPyIbhNeej60g-nzLc1dXG97z0qfeHYyKaqO4cxBbrPSp81JyDe3p4X3OMr2y3s3b06uy9v4g9hAbqDufjqg0agRqSnLbLdhe8g0SaxqZeB6nHp_m_7Nd7f0HQAA___-e3Hj) | |
# Monday, February 10, 2025

**Good morning!** On this day in 1852, the Texas legislature affirmed the land grants to Spaniards and Mexicans verified by the [Bourland Commission](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OhCAUxfGngU7DveIHBcU2drPtlgbkoiQoEyTj-PYbp5_qX51fcv4e08OEGPbl12yky9unCQW2lcAKxORMiNckudNWOAWcNPSNAiU6EHzV0NHs5YxOKVCzadUMtvE4tDDg0EjJg74xgSAAsZdt7a1t7WDRmwHBUcekIBdKynVZqdDbHD5e6UW5ntPGo15LeR6s-WE4MhzP86zLsZq0x7BTnfLCcPysKmeuyl53GI60l3xXScWzds8zxBiOrmdSLJsJ8YOXr29fGv8DAAD__19DVtY), a group of three officials appointed to investigate land claims in South Texas after the Mexican War. Another Texan has been nominated to serve in the Trump administration. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OnDAQRZ_GdEb28LNQuEhDt2lTojEeFis2RvawLG8fbfqvudXV0dH585yf6IPfX78xkuHPmmZQ0EkFUqvZoQ_33FbOWOVGXZHRj2bUo-q1qjbTDM1qGyTSLdI4dB26plN9M7Qd2GEZKm--MAVaaYBH29WrtZ0dLKw4gHbUi1aR85xyzRsxfbCs4U5vyvWSYhXMxnwU0fwSMAmYruuqDzwoL57viK_vScC0nIHPTAKmI1PxjnaWnM94yB0jFbmls3DaZfS7u-XmgyObcXfyLBKjxVLQpSyXVBhl9st33pRlwr9FurSfXARMVTbuuHwIvvQP0apXRB_-a_KP3d4G_gUAAP__meR0mA) in today's _Roundup_ , and let us know what you think about the latest pick by replying to this email! If you're looking for your next investment opportunity, look no further than today's sponsor, [New Sapience](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLluwzAMQL9G3myQlHwNGgoE2dK1oyFZdEzAFyzl-vvCadGtK98DSbyvS3dxMsly_XQz2_Qc1o6AyhwoR-iCk-nVmSxYD6HFjC3WusUWKoRstL713jcG2pqgaiuNTU01uFCVpg_s-0zssQwIAYlqUxaD96VvPA2uIQxcKQMcJK17kUZO_HRxmF7rnfeiX-dssmNKW1T6Q9FZ0VmWO8dULPyIbhNeej60g-nzLc1dXG97z0qfeHYyKaqO4cxBbrPSp81JyDe3p4X3OMr2y3s3b06uy9v4g9hAbqDufjqg0agRqSnLbLdhe8g0SaxqZeB6nHp_m_7Nd7f0HQAA___-e3Hj).

## Trump Taps Houston Billionaire for Ambassador
[Melinda Hildebrand](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OnDAQRZ_GdEb28LNQuEhDt2lTojEeFis2RvawLG8fbfqvudXV0dH585yf6IPfX78xkuHPmmZQ0EkFUqvZoQ_33FbOWOVGXZHRj2bUo-q1qjbTDM1qGyTSLdI4dB26plN9M7Qd2GEZKm--MAVaaYBH29WrtZ0dLKw4gHbUi1aR85xyzRsxfbCs4U5vyvWSYhXMxnwU0fwSMAmYruuqDzwoL57viK_vScC0nIHPTAKmI1PxjnaWnM94yB0jFbmls3DaZfS7u-XmgyObcXfyLBKjxVLQpSyXVBhl9st33pRlwr9FurSfXARMVTbuuHwIvvQP0apXRB_-a_KP3d4G_gUAAP__meR0mA), owner of a Houston doughnut shop and the wife of a billionaire oil executive, has been nominated by President Donald Trump as the U.S. Ambassador to Costa Rica. Hildebrand's husband, Jeffrey, co-founded Hilcorp in 1989, growing it to become the largest private oil company in the U.S. Worth an estimated $7.3 billion, the couple has hosted fundraisers for Trump and [given nearly $3 million](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGvrCAQhX8NdhgYUaGgeI3dvvaVZnBwJUExgPt2__2N99a3-qb4Mufk_HvMDwwxHM-_uHtb32uaQUDPBXApZsIQP7NqyDpBRjbeyrEz0ohBimaz0hjQulekSAMq8B06QOxwMSA0mSbY-5kAKSTAqPp2da532sGKGiT5gSnhKdSU27r56t9Y1vhJL5_bJe1NtFutZ2HdHwYTg2lLV6npaD3WH4PBdAfcYDCNN1U3CK0Ng2n3MRyEfA8HffgWInmX8SBO6cBIvOZrPznuDktBSpkvqVTkOSx4K-l6brXc11V52dLZZEvn_xBjKMPIlHjuGOJ3z_rrcC8LXwEAAP__SuBwuw) to his campaigns. Hildebrand [opened River Oaks Donuts in 2013](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQRp_GdEbjAUMoXNyGLrfdEvlniC0ZjGwTkrdfJf3Wn76jo_NzX-46xLA__uuNVH2taUFAyQG5gMXpEN9L3zhlwE2iISXGbhITDAIar8iA1K4TGjqyaJyQ06onsNM4CBoAm6A-MEABAnHsZbsaI83N4KpvKBwNrAdyoabcVk-VXrqs8Z2elFubtiYqX-tRWPeP4cxwvq6rtT6n_bMynHe6CsPZp7PUtPPvn-Gscw02EsO55nM7uE2lap6D1dyH6MhkvTvu0n7WwhGE7KGT7eGPJit3XCHGUIaR9fDYdIhfk_pnmqfC3wAAAP___eBncA), saying, "_I felt like I wanted to provide the neighborhood with donuts. It's as simple as that. There was a need, so we are providing a service._ " In a Truth Social post, President Trump said Hildebrand "will fight tirelessly to protect America's Interests abroad, especially in Trade and Immigration." Hildebrand has said she is "honored to be nominated."
## 'Ghost Deer' Smugglers Convicted
A licensed white-tailed deer breeder and his business partner from East Texas have been convicted of [illegally smuggling](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOhCAYBOCnwQ4Dv6BSUFxjt9deaUB-lQTBALfuvv3F7a-e5MvM_Dzmh_HBx-3bHKjra00zMJCUAeVsdsaH9ywapy1zijeo-dAprljPWbNroToYpLVyFE4a4FYpYyRjhqthEW5svL4xBpxxgEHIdrVW2tHCakbgDnsiGDpfU27rjhVfpqzhnZ6Y2yUdTdB7rWch3ReBicB0XVe77DnFOyUwRbwKgaksHuOCFOPT5xQPjJXAZHL1S0AC08el255KpQ4x03L8bts9mgLjsuedaM_9bLJ25-VD8KUfiGDbYXz49Kj_HvPU8BcAAP__qNJmPA) seven "ghost deer." Game wardens intercepted them in Montgomery County on their way to Brazoria and Duval counties, where the two unnamed suspects allegedly intended to release the deer on private property. Captive deer are susceptible to chronic wasting disease (CWD), and [documentation must be provided](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAUhJ_GdEbHBwN24eI27nLbLZF_jsFaEyJwQvL2q0TactsZ6dPM93WZLi6XfJ3_u5VMfaZtQsCeA3IBU3S5vCbZROMhatGQEWOnhYZBQLMYdCF2yQ0B5ahkSqi9JhWi1qGDXsUmmzcMUIBAHGXfJu97rzwmp1BEGpgEirlue1sXqvR0Ryqv7UF7G7a1KWap9Xaw7h9Dy9Ce59l-L9v9XTK0bq85FGJor3QeDG3ZgisM7QfE0EainR_rfZ7fD_lvjKrnygd0EDR3ETSXfS-5VpQ4Kekx6g5kGJvdxNuZS8nHMDIJ8-py-Qyrf5p6GPwJAAD__05NaRw) when transporting them so that state officials can track outbreaks. The two perpetrators were convicted of more than two dozen breeder violations each and several drug and alcohol offenses, receiving $12,060 in fines. Because wardens couldn't immediately determine the disease status of the captive "ghost deer," all of them were euthanized. An examination later found that they were likely [not infected with CWD](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOpDAQBb_GZD1qNzYeBwSXkO2lF47auGGsMzAyvvHu35_YfMOnJ5VU9efj8cEpp339zZuM9XM5HoRkAQk0PiKn_PUwXRwDRq87GbXrvfY4aOyeY-gD2WB7HxdNwXvjFgzi-753vfGzdGm8YEgaNZEz9raEYMM90MJ30lEGZVBiqke51adU-eRzyV_HW8ptPrYuj89aX6fqfymaFE2ttdvfWfb6vm5FE5ea5iyKpl3aqWiaS9qu-Y2ClTeBxiXKfgKXImeF2g5IOcvKGdozVYHKKUuEKFLg3P6t65UDjpcUrunYFU0WEcS6QfxggBAdGPYOWJsIDodoiS3p-d6VMb5ayjmdg1MG141T_japP6Z9j_Q_AAD__0GReuc).
## Out With the Old, In With the New
Two iconic public displays--one in Austin and another in Houston--came down last week and are being replaced with something new. On Monday, a 100-year-old Austin building known for its [60-foot mural of Texas icon Willie Nelson](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAUBOCnMZ3R8cFgXLjYhi7bbon8cwjWGhxhB5K3v0r6W3_SzGj-3eabjSnu9792I1NfS54RsOeAXMAcbEzvWTbBOAhaNGSE6rTQMAhoVuOVFGEEsMGNaK31nRKjVjIQ-N6JronmEwYoQCAq2beLc70bHS52RBFoYBIoxJqPtq5U6WXLkt75pKP1eWuSWWt9FNb9YTgxnK7rav-fT_ogw8keNfpEDKedrsJwStnb9IFnqXHnV0wpEt8plbzz7XnYxANtOcUa887XeF_5EQvxQCel_NhorwwnHDQfPTqnAnAXfMdlLzXXnQbeBQtCoNMkVHOY8Ph2lEExCffNxvTdXX898jT4EwAA___C3XUK) was demolished to make room for a new high rise. The previous building's owners have expressed a desire to recreate the mural, which was commissioned for the annual South By Southwest festival in 2016. On Wednesday, the signage for what was formerly known as Minute Maid Park--the home field of the Houston Astros since 2000--was removed so that signage for the [newly named Daikin Park](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OgzAQBOCnMZ2RdzF_hYtr6HLtlWjBBlYxGNm-kLz9KemvG-mTRqP5uY03Ys_H-k27M_m5hBEV1lKhBDVaYv8adWHNpGwPhTPQVj30qgFVbAa0Al3VFfY1NDXMdpmww0pru7ylKdi8yxSCAsRW1-UyTfXUTbhQh2BdI7RylnOIZd5cdk9Ki3-Fh4vlHPbCmy3nM4nqS-AgcLiuq5y3GI63ChzSGWJOAgdKOYZPiJln7wQOOx-_2cmd2MqT4l0mXg9anYxuDw_y0hLf-ZCoQHdd35bndhbR2PNi7zk1rdBq3Yn9Z0n-95qHwb8AAAD__6hGZg4) could be put up in its place. The old signage and logo will be auctioned off at a later date. Daikin, a Japanese company and one of the [world's largest manufacturers of air conditioning units](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LuO5CAQheGnwRmtonwPCDZxNptuaBUG7NKAsUx178zbr3rziT_p6Oj_87F-ECc-99-Ug5WvWFYE7DWgNrB64vS9do23DvxsmmDN2M5mhsFAc1gYYxi6Hnz0Mc4I4N00T7Ed44RDt_UN2_cYoAGDOHb9IzrXu8lhpAmND4PqIHiWcj_kCBK-qMb0XV7hfmwlN8keIldV7S-Fi8KF3GbatyhcrlJF4XKUZ5Vyaqpyl6rvkMsr6MznU4LOxF5X3k_agz5KDtpRDY5S0lXI8zPri27RJUbemJKWm87KwuXUnviTz7d_KlxMP40t9KhwaW7rr7-cEtdhVB3smTj9vys_9ntZ_BcAAP__ddJ04g), signed a 15-year deal after last season for the naming rights to the ballpark.
| Flying together with our sponsor [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLluwzAMQL9G3myQlHwNGgoE2dK1oyFZdEzAFyzl-vvCadGtK98DSbyvS3dxMsly_XQz2_Qc1o6AyhwoR-iCk-nVmSxYD6HFjC3WusUWKoRstL713jcG2pqgaiuNTU01uFCVpg_s-0zssQwIAYlqUxaD96VvPA2uIQxcKQMcJK17kUZO_HRxmF7rnfeiX-dssmNKW1T6Q9FZ0VmWO8dULPyIbhNeej60g-nzLc1dXG97z0qfeHYyKaqO4cxBbrPSp81JyDe3p4X3OMr2y3s3b06uy9v4g9hAbqDufjqg0agRqSnLbLdhe8g0SaxqZeB6nHp_m_7Nd7f0HQAA___-e3Hj) **This Team of Founders Has $350M in Exits Combined** What do a rocket scientist, an astronaut, and the co-inventor of the desktop PC have in common? They're all [pioneering the next step in AI together](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLluwzAMQL9G3myQlHwNGgoE2dK1oyFZdEzAFyzl-vvCadGtK98DSbyvS3dxMsly_XQz2_Qc1o6AyhwoR-iCk-nVmSxYD6HFjC3WusUWKoRstL713jcG2pqgaiuNTU01uFCVpg_s-0zssQwIAYlqUxaD96VvPA2uIQxcKQMcJK17kUZO_HRxmF7rnfeiX-dssmNKW1T6Q9FZ0VmWO8dULPyIbhNeej60g-nzLc1dXG97z0qfeHYyKaqO4cxBbrPSp81JyDe3p4X3OMr2y3s3b06uy9v4g9hAbqDufjqg0agRqSnLbLdhe8g0SaxqZeB6nHp_m_7Nd7f0HQAA___-e3Hj). It's called **Synthetic Intelligence** , which is when a machine truly thinks and learns. Hildebrand's husband, Jeffrey, co-founded Hilcorp in 1989, growing it to become the largest private oil company in the U.S. Worth an estimated $7.3 billion, the couple has hosted fundraisers for Trump and to his campaigns. Hildebrand , saying, "I felt like I wanted to provide the neighborhood with donuts. It's as simple as that. There was a need, so we are providing a service. " In a Truth Social post, President Trump said Hildebrand "will fight tirelessly to protect America's Interests abroad, especially in Trade and Immigration." Hildebrand has said she is "honored to be nominated." 'Ghost Deer' Smugglers Convicted A licensed white-tailed deer breeder and his business partner from East Texas have been convicted of seven "ghost deer." Game wardens intercepted them in Montgomery County on their way to Brazoria and Duval counties, where the two unnamed suspects allegedly intended to release the deer on private property. Captive deer are susceptible to chronic wasting disease (CWD), and when transporting them so that state officials can track outbreaks. The two perpetrators were convicted of more than two dozen breeder violations each and several drug and alcohol offenses, receiving $12,060 in fines. Because wardens couldn't immediately determine the disease status of the captive "ghost deer," all of them were euthanized. An examination later found that they were likely . Out With the Old, In With the New Two iconic public displays--one in Austin and another in Houston--came down last week and are being replaced with something new. On Monday, a 100-year-old Austin building known for its was demolished to make room for a new high rise. The previous building's owners have expressed a desire to recreate the mural, which was commissioned for the annual South By Southwest festival in 2016. On Wednesday, the signage for what was formerly known as Minute Maid Park--the home field of the Houston Astros since 2000--was removed so that signage for the could be put up in its place. The old signage and logo will be auctioned off at a later date. Daikin, a Japanese company and one of the , signed a 15-year deal after last season for the naming rights to the ballpark. | Flying together with our sponsor This Team of Founders Has $350M in Exits Combined What do a rocket scientist, an astronaut, and the co-inventor of the desktop PC have in common? Attorney General Ken Paxton appealed the ruling, which determined that the content moderation requirements were likely unconstitutional. () ➤ Gaines County: At least 10 measles cases--seven of which have required hospitalization--have been reported over the last two weeks. This follows two measles cases in Harris County last month. () ➤ Harris County: Judge Lina Hidalgo lashed out at former District Attorney Kim Ogg following the dismissal of corruption charges she had brought against three employees in Hidalgo's office. Hidalgo called the prosecution an "outrageous debacle" and labeled Ogg "a dirty cop." () ➤ Alice ISD: Superintendent Anysia Trevino advised parents last week that their children could be questioned about their citizenship at a Border Patrol checkpoint if they attend a school event in South Texas. U.S. Border Patrol Chief Mike Banks dismissed the idea that agents would board school buses as "absurd." () ➤ Houston: Federal immigration agents have arrested Jorge Carvajal Castrejon, 36, who is accused of illegally entering the country six times and was previously convicted of DWI in Harris County. () ➤ Hutto: Texas State Technical College broke ground on a $47 million expansion at its East Williamson County campus last week. name: Joseph Bentivegna from Dr. Joe Bentivegna's Views
subject: Why Are Democratic Leaders So Outraged by Elon Musk?
body:
Could It Be Musk May Uncover How Much Money Taxpayers Are Putting in Their Foreign Bank Accounts?

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..9BJndVABpyy4ElHPgnb2Fh2bj6jYfk3M4divFtr3mj4?) for more
---
# [Why Are Democratic Leaders So Outraged by Elon Musk?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=156848876&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODQ4ODc2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxOTA5NDUsImV4cCI6MTc0MTc4Mjk0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fHM5TxVSnE9AWv4O503WOjSHuPuiPKojkMVZYnM9ctI)
### Could It Be Musk May Uncover How Much Money Taxpayers Are Putting in Their Foreign Bank Accounts?
| | [Joseph Bentivegna](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---
| Feb 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@jfbentivegna)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=156848876&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODQ4ODc2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTE5MDk0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzQxNzgyOTQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzY1MjAxIiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.jd9lSJEssvZKDfQ5UkZRVkg7DnoQ2lTvVDlPQxFUdQE&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=156848876&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODQ4ODc2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxOTA5NDUsImV4cCI6MTc0MTc4Mjk0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fHM5TxVSnE9AWv4O503WOjSHuPuiPKojkMVZYnM9ctI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=365201&post_id=156848876&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODQ4ODc2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkxOTA5NDUsImV4cCI6MTc0MTc4Mjk0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM2NTIwMSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.fHM5TxVSnE9AWv4O503WOjSHuPuiPKojkMVZYnM9ctI)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvamZiZW50aXZlZ25hL3Avd2h5LWFyZS1kZW1vY3JhdGljLWxlYWRlcnMtc28tb3V0cmFnZWQ_.MWvHlt5fICLMDTXpQwxvz1_JeENuzVCtXkV9AB0bJt4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/jfbentivegna/p/why-are-democratic-leaders-so-outraged?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

February 10, 2025
Readers who are political junkies know that regardless of one's viewpoint, political battles make sense. The brutal fight over Supreme Court Justice Kavanaugh's confirmation was about abortion. The funding battles over Medicare and Social Security determine whether the elderly and disabled have comfortable lives.
So why is the Democratic hierarchy so apocalyptic about Elon Musk's attempt to cull waste and fraud in government? The vast majority of the voters - even Democrats - agree on this.
After all, to the average Democrat, President Trump's first weeks in office have been a nightmare. He has attacked many Democratic sacred cows - stopping federal and international funding for abortion; crushing the Climate Change agenda by pulling out of the Paris Accords while blocking the funding of EV charging stations; banning the medical treatment of transgender minors; closing the border and publicly humiliating illegal immigrants by shackling them and deporting on military planes; pardoning the J6 protestors, even the violent ones who attacked the police; confirming all Cabinet appointees who are basically wearing MAGA hats during their confirmation hearings; and humiliating President Biden and many top Democratic leaders by revoking their security clearances.
You would think there would be daily riots while Democratic lawyers would be in court every waking hour to reverse these policies. Yes, there have been a few protests in Los Angeles and some judicial restraints have been placed on Trump's policies, but the Democratic response to these developments has been tepid at best.
But when Elon Musk discovered pork in USAID funding and gained access to the payment system of the US Treasury, the Democratic hierarchy attacked in full fury.
Senate Minority leader [Chuck Schumer](https://substack.com/redirect/7f325f68-c2c3-4ba6-ad66-49f8187a7edb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) stated:
Nothing screams democracy like having a secret squad of company men pull off a hostile takeover of Americans' Social Security and tax information in the dead of night. That's democracy? No openness? No hearings? No discussion?
Fairfield County Congressman [Jim Himes](https://substack.com/redirect/74f1adc1-d2a1-46ee-8cd7-a049a30abc85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) said:
"Elon Musk and his interns are treating the private data of Americans with a flippant and reckless disregard,"
The Democrats marched into court and were able to have an Obama-appointed judge, [Paul Engelmayer,](https://substack.com/redirect/729ad034-ee30-4892-ae5e-c0e895746ab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) not only rule that Musk must stop looking at Treasury data but must destroy what he has already collected.
But what did Musk discover? He disclosed that USAID had spent on the following:
$50 million to fund condom purchases in Gaza
$1.5 million to advance DEI in Serbia's workplaces
$70,000 for the production of a DEI musical in Ireland
$47,000 on a transgender opera in Colombia
And Musk had access to everybody's private banking and social security data.
Who cares?
A bright teenager can get access to anyone's banking and social security information.
And does anybody in their right mind believe that $50,000,000 was actually used to buy the Gazans condoms. If this were true, the Gazans wouldn't have time for terrorist activity.
The more likely scenario is that the $50,000,000 was rerouted. Was it given to politically-connect Hamas leaders in Qatar who then stashed cash into the foreign bank accounts of Democratic politicians via layers of shell corporations?
Elon Musk and a bunch of wiz kids were perusing this data with AI. If this money was used for bribes and graft, they would have found it.
And if this is the case, the Democrats' instinct for self-preservation will supersede the priorities of their voting base on climate change, abortion rights along with transgender rights and those of illegal immigrants.
We need legislation requiring all public officials to disclose whether they have foreign bank accounts. And Elon Musk must be allowed to go through public expenditures with a fine-toothed comb. Hopefully, Judge Engelmayer will be overruled on appeal.

Yes, there have been a few protests in Los Angeles and some judicial restraints have been placed on Trump's policies, but the Democratic response to these developments has been tepid at best. But when Elon Musk discovered pork in USAID funding and gained access to the payment system of the US Treasury, the Democratic hierarchy attacked in full fury. Senate Minority leader stated: Nothing screams democracy like having a secret squad of company men pull off a hostile takeover of Americans' Social Security and tax information in the dead of night. That's democracy? No openness? No hearings? No discussion? Fairfield County Congressman said: "Elon Musk and his interns are treating the private data of Americans with a flippant and reckless disregard," The Democrats marched into court and were able to have an Obama-appointed judge, not only rule that Musk must stop looking at Treasury data but must destroy what he has already collected. But what did Musk discover? He disclosed that USAID had spent on the following: $50 million to fund condom purchases in Gaza $1.5 million to advance DEI in Serbia's workplaces $70,000 for the production of a DEI musical in Ireland $47,000 on a transgender opera in Colombia And Musk had access to everybody's private banking and social security data. Who cares? A bright teenager can get access to anyone's banking and social security information. And does anybody in their right mind believe that $50,000,000 was actually used to buy the Gazans condoms. If this were true, the Gazans wouldn't have time for terrorist activity. The more likely scenario is that the $50,000,000 was rerouted. Was it given to politically-connect Hamas leaders in Qatar who then stashed cash into the foreign bank accounts of Democratic politicians via layers of shell corporations? Elon Musk and a bunch of wiz kids were perusing this data with AI. If this money was used for bribes and graft, they would have found it. And if this is the case, the Democrats' instinct for self-preservation will supersede the priorities of their voting base on climate change, abortion rights along with transgender rights and those of illegal immigrants. We need legislation requiring all public officials to disclose whether they have foreign bank accounts. And Elon Musk must be allowed to go through public expenditures with a fine-toothed comb. Hopefully, Judge Engelmayer will be overruled on appeal. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Joseph Bentivegna 541 Cromwell Avenue, Rocky Hill, CT 06067 ? ?

name: Thom Tills
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What do you think?

Friend,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zos1getqbca04fjpmpu9fi2hg7be5q096trkt0mg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i60ob2c5h2bs)**

Yesterday, I introduced Kash Patel at his confirmation, and he was immediately met with baseless attacks and cheap shots from the Left.

Despite the Democrats' desperate attempts to derail the hearing, Kash held firm and demonstrated he is the leader we need at the FBI.

Now, I want to hear from you.

**[Do you think the Senate should confirm Kash Patel as our next FBI Director?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsj7r6ihbd6qm2p3rcsceml0svishlidh4fpvngo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i60ob2c5h2bs)**

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: CTA: Stop the Corruption. Defund & Close USAID Now.
body:
Taxpayers deserve accountability—tell Congress to end this wasteful spending by shutting USAID down.
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** As we emailed about last week, it's time to close USAID. As the DOGE team uncovers more examples of government corruption as it audits agencies like USAID, it is clear that USAID hasn't been accountable to Congress for a very long time. And therefore, it hasn't been accountable to the American people.
**Congress must defund USAID and shut it down, and we need your urgent support to make this happen.****
****ACTION:** Tell your elected officials and the committees that control USAID funding that enough is enough. Use our [**Align Act form**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a99fe1e6/1edb9794a99ec829) to send a message to your congressman and senators, and use our [**Defund and Close USAID action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a99fe1e6/1edb9794a99ec82b "Defund and Close USAID action page") to send a message to the committees that control USAID.****__ **__** **** ************
---
| **** Many officials and bureaucrats are fighting tooth and nail to keep the American taxpayer-funded gravy train running. The left is also in meltdown mode, attacking these efforts to make sure that our government is run transparently and honestly. Who doesn't want honest, accountable government that only takes what is absolutely necessary to run our government? It's crazy!
Here are just a few examples of the unaccountable spending from USAID:
* **$500,000 USD** to pilot new voting technology in Bosnia and Herzegovina (Smartmatic)
* **$8.1 million USD** to Politico - just in 2024
* **$7.9 million USD** to "teach Sri Lankan journalists to state pronouns" and "avoid binary-gendered language"
* **$2.1 million USD** to help BBC "value the diversity of Libyan society"
* **$1.5 million USD** to "rebuild" the Cuban media ecosystem
* **$5.5 million USD** for LGBT activism in Uganda
* **$6 million USD** for advancing LGBT issues in "priority countries around the world"
Each year, the average American pays about $20,000 in taxes. Teaching Sri Lankan journalists to use leftist language alone consumed the entire tax bill of 395 Americans--money they worked hard to earn, gone in a flash. Meanwhile, another 405 Americans saw all of their taxes go straight to Politico.
This is wrong, and the leftist attacks are baseless. They claim shutting down USAID would starve children and endanger the world, yet the agency is burning through taxpayer dollars on partisan priorities--without accountability. These bureaucrats clearly feel entitled to spend your money however they please. **It 's time to stop them.******__ **__** **** ************
---
| **** In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a99fe1e6/1edb9794a99ec82d)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a99fe1e6/1edb9794a99ec82f)

---
Now that Elon Musk is running an audit of the federal government, the Deep State’s corruption is finally being EXPOSED...

**A report reveals that in 2019 – while I was serving as President Trump’s attorney – the USAID allegedly spent _$20 MILLION_ on a Soros-backed operation to dig up dirt on me and bury me alive.**
---
This is just a glimpse of what the Deep State has tried to do to destroy me _and_ President Trump.
---
And unfortunately, the fight isn’t over.
---
_I am facing bogus CRIMINAL CHARGES in the state of Arizona – where President Trump is PROHIBITED from saving me with a PARDON!_

And if fighting the Mafia taught me anything, it’s that when villains get exposed, they don’t run – they dig their heels in _deeper_!
