It’s honestly a miracle that after everything done to me and President Trump, not even an assassin’s bullet could end our movement.

I have to believe that miracle comes from God. But it also comes from the generous support given by kind souls like YOU, who’ve helped me prevail time and time again.

name: Thom Tills
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What do you think?

Friend,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziv82udf078066346agias0goin97a4qv1e6dn98_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj4chh2bs)**

Yesterday, I introduced Kash Patel at his confirmation, and he was immediately met with baseless attacks and cheap shots from the Left.

Despite the Democrats' desperate attempts to derail the hearing, Kash held firm and demonstrated he is the leader we need at the FBI.

Now, I want to hear from you.

**[Do you think the Senate should confirm Kash Patel as our next FBI Director?](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z12pmjg3p932370mgu4ldb1fo9is26mftjmp2upg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj4chh2bs)**

******************************************************[ANSWER POLL](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvps7f0bqtm9t2actsag4cd9braibfeobkpni8pg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj4chh2bs)******************************************************

I refuse to back down from the Dems' attacks on Trump's America First agenda, and I am fighting tooth and nail to confirm Kash as FBI Director.

name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99ujtathp052pir6gpmo3duirpmlvlc4bkclsd8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj0cjh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z710c53pgc5t8qd6vtn12579qhut21khnjv3mri0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj0cjh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zll27miav5cft0ltfngk1d9fkbd0vuq4rrukdb68_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj0cjh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z05ppe9j42grj29adbd05v7h9oo86bckq31067k0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i68pj0cjh2bs)

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: I’m no stranger to a tough fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’m coming to you for backup

Friend, it's Navy SEAL and U.S. Senator Tim Sheehy.

I'm new to the Senate, but I'm no stranger to a tough fight.

When it comes to confirming President Trump's team, a tough fight is what we're getting from Democrats. They're doing everything they can to obstruct the process.

But Senate Republicans were elected to win tough fights.

_If that means working nights, weekends, and holidays, so be it._

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Help us understand CRT’s influence
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqj243s6rs1ma0ben4390ojt3uh91bqj41354778_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i64oj2c9h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zacntlamk42po5sbs0lhri68dnf2f43p8d4cvce8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i64oj2c9h2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5m1unqt15g11o9nk9oatn0uhi8k4i8iis4h7md0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i64oj2c9h2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfg1kmqat98pg2p8ig791p5spil53dkbmlgm6lgg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i64oj2c9h2bs)
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Senate Update: Telephone Town Hall on Wednesday
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501276073%2501Senate%2bUpdate_%2bTelephone%2bTown%2bHall%2bon%2bWednesday%2b\(copy%2b3\)%250115402.44872239.6941232.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501276073%2501Senate%2bUpdate_%2bTelephone%2bTown%2bHall%2bon%2bWednesday%2b\(copy%2b3\)%250115402.44872239.6941232.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501Friend%2501)
---|---
| | | **February 10, 2025** |
---|---|---|---
| | |
### Senate Update: Telephone Town Hall on Wednesday
On Wednesday night, at 7:30 pm, Senator Angela Alsobrooks and I are hosting a Telephone Town Hall to answer your questions and provide an update on Trump/Musk's illegal actions and our efforts to fight back and protect our federal employees - both in Congress and in the courts. We'll be joined by Rob Shriver of Democracy Forward, an organization taking legal actions to stop this abuse of power. To join our call, you can sign up to be dialed in [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15402.44872239.6941232.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fEForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__fid%3d100074&redir_log=78022078659569). By signing up you will receive a call to join our telephone town hall at approximately 7:30 on Wednesday night - the deadline to sign up to receive this call is Wednesday morning at 9:00 am. If you'd like to listen in but not join the call via phone - or if you miss the sign-up deadline - [you can also join our livestream of the town hall on my website here.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15402.44872239.6941232.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2flive&redir_log=942008812194262) We hope you can join us on Wednesday night, as we take your questions and provide answers on how we're fighting back during this unprecedented and challenging time.

Hope you will join us to fight back! Chris Van Hollen
### **For more on what we've been doing in the past few weeks, [please click here to read my previous newsletter](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15402.44872239.6941232.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fview_newsletter.aspx%3fid%3d275874%26c%3dSenVanHollen&redir_log=723032523737603).**
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15402.44872239.6941232.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2f%2fEsurveyForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__sid%3d100007%26__crop%3d15702QQQ43394993QQQ6902949QQQ8303970&redir_log=71723308996870)

body:
We’re missing your signature...
| | **THIS IS AN AUTOMATED MESSAGE FOR TOP DEMOCRATS** We’re reaching to Democrats who have NOT added their signature to our exclusive petition to **STOP House Republicans from amending the Constitution to give Trump a 3rd term in the White House,** sent out on _January 28th, 2025._

**[Please confirm your signature is submitted before midnight:](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250210_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=18822%2E878179%2ExoewI-)** | [**25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: SAY NO TO A THIRD TRUMP TERM! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250210_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=18822%2E878179%2ExoewI-)

---
Look, this is one of the most terrifying headlines we’ve read all week...

**MAGA Republicans are willing to completely DESTROY the Constitution to make Donald Trump a KING.**

**[We’re gathering 25,000 signatures to show the GOP that the American people won’t stand for this attack on our democracy: Add your name by MIDNIGHT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250210_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=18822%2E878179%2ExoewI-)**
[**SIGN THE PETITION NOW »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250210_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=18822%2E878179%2ExoewI-)
---
**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump’s MAGA trifecta will make him UNTOUCHABLE — even if it means tearing down every pillar of our democracy.

**_BUT IF we band together,_** we can fight back and stop this scheme before it gets off the ground!

**[So please, SIGN NOW: Say NO to a third Trump term! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/trump-thirdterm/?source=VPP_20250210_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=18822%2E878179%2ExoewI-)**

name: Thom Tillis
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
What do you think?

Friend,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z90soju8cpr9ohvui33s55j0ebhc2m14l9dqtah8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62o34cdh2bs)**

Yesterday, I introduced Kash Patel at his confirmation, and he was immediately met with baseless attacks and cheap shots from the Left.

Despite the Democrats' desperate attempts to derail the hearing, Kash held firm and demonstrated he is the leader we need at the FBI.

Now, I want to hear from you.

**[Do you think the Senate should confirm Kash Patel as our next FBI Director?](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zu55k62c5re7kk139fisl4bmucga3j9070ad7fro_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62o34cdh2bs)**

******************************************************[ANSWER POLL](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2ztvbgkbcondd8i36jg90hdcb0r8lol3tv61er7gg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62o34cdh2bs)******************************************************

I refuse to back down from the Dems' attacks on Trump's America First agenda, and I am fighting tooth and nail to confirm Kash as FBI Director.

**[Will you stand with me as I work to give Kash Patel and President Trump's other nominees a fair confirmation process?](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zhmh89v6rlojh15mi0ss97pogj3qlrhk72ugp29o_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62o34cdh2bs)**

Sincerely,
[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zb5ate7v6a83p00lbno8e8ilbnb75jtca5vtl1sg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62o34cdh2bs)
Thom Tillis

You have unlocked this exclusive opportunity due to your incredible Team Marsha record of supporting President Trump. https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=533c756d33c622063182a658a5b6132177a1fe64aeb73af3d0d6b8a5b50d0cc3534c14fed1b3169df0b79fcf37284067cca75494098fe3d3d6b3cb1e06162f7d So, Peter, please take a minute to review and sign our letter at your earliest convenience: Dear President Trump, I am writing to express my unwavering support for your leadership as the 47th President of the United States. Your vision and values for the future of our country deeply resonate with me and I am eager to work alongside you in advancing the America First Agenda. I firmly believe that your leadership is exactly what our nation needs at this critical time. >From the beginning, I have been a proud supporter of your efforts: 1) Your dedication to securing our borders, lowering taxes, strengthening our economy, and prioritizing national security has proven time and time again that YOU are the right person to lead America. 2) Your commitment to defending our families and restoring common-sense policies has had a lasting impact on our country, and I am confident that YOUR leadership will bring prosperity and safety BACK to our nation for all Americans. Please know that you have my full support as you continue working toward seeing the America First Agenda through to the end and reversing all the radical policies that have been imposed by the Biden-Harris Administration. Thank you for your dedication to preserving the values that make America great. Together, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! Sincerely, https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=533c756d33c622063182a658a5b6132177a1fe64aeb73af3d0d6b8a5b50d0cc3534c14fed1b3169df0b79fcf37284067cca75494098fe3d3d6b3cb1e06162f7d X_________________ https://click.updates.marshablackburn.com/?qs=533c756d33c622063182a658a5b6132177a1fe64aeb73af3d0d6b8a5b50d0cc3534c14fed1b3169df0b79fcf37284067cca75494098fe3d3d6b3cb1e06162f7d >" alias="SIGN THE LETTER >>" conversion="false" data-linkto="https://">SIGN THE LETTER >> Thank you, Team Marsha Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. GOP Rep. Brian Mast **[set the record straight](https://substack.com/redirect/bdfcec92-1a12-442f-b78e-8b7d7a145646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** when CNN's Jake Tapper casted doubt on some shocking discovered expenditures from USAID, including "$15 million for condoms to the Taliban."
**["They lied to all of us!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/bdfcec92-1a12-442f-b78e-8b7d7a145646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Mast told Tapper.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bdfcec92-1a12-442f-b78e-8b7d7a145646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bdfcec92-1a12-442f-b78e-8b7d7a145646?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tapper pressed Mast on the existence of the line item referring to condoms for the Taliban, "I'm not saying whether its true or false, but I'd love to see it."
"Well I'm telling you it's true!" Mast fired back.
**[A press release](https://substack.com/redirect/d62e59dc-582a-4e18-97f9-deb60ff9ea7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** from the House Foreign Affairs Committee, which Mast chairs, listed several unbelievable examples of woke USAID budget waste uncovered by DOGE, including:
* _$15 million for condoms to the Taliban through USAID._
* _$446,700 to promote the expansion of atheism in Nepal through the State Department._
* _$1 million to boost French-speaking LGBTQ groups in West and Central Africa through the State Department._
* _$14 million in cash vouchers for migrants at the southern border through the State Department._
* _$20,600 for a drag show in Ecuador through the State Department._

PolitiBrawl asked people in Washington D.C. **[if they would support some of the outrageous line items from the USAID](https://substack.com/redirect/4c548394-d5ff-4c50-bd92-218e39955800?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with a donation. We weren't expecting what happened next...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4c548394-d5ff-4c50-bd92-218e39955800?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/1a3625a0-b0c1-4123-a55d-85b0ca032315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/1a3625a0-b0c1-4123-a55d-85b0ca032315?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.

# Greg Gutfeld SHUTS DOWN Jessica Tarlov over DEI disaster during explosive Fox News battle
Greg Gutfeld **[wrecked Jessica Tarlov during a heated conversation](https://substack.com/redirect/2fd68815-dd81-4e93-9380-4f7a58877b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on "The Five" about Trump seeming to blame DEI "for everything."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2fd68815-dd81-4e93-9380-4f7a58877b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2fd68815-dd81-4e93-9380-4f7a58877b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Tarlov said it is inappropriate for Trump to rush to blame DEI for everything, including the tragic plane collision over Washington D.C. "DEI is not a scapegoat for everything! I get it, it's what some voters want to hear about..."
Gutfeld's response was perfect: "DEI is the mirror to the Democrat's argument with racism or climate change, it could be used to explain everything! Racism or climate change was found under every rock, on every issue,... because the Democrats put it there!"
Watch the heated clash right here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/2fd68815-dd81-4e93-9380-4f7a58877b7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: Tim Sheehy
subject: This is Navy SEAL Tim Sheehy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’m coming to you for backup

Friend, it's Navy SEAL and U.S. Senator Tim Sheehy.

I'm new to the Senate, but I'm no stranger to a tough fight.

When it comes to confirming President Trump's team, a tough fight is what we're getting from Democrats. They're doing everything they can to obstruct the process.

But Senate Republicans were elected to win tough fights.

_If that means working nights, weekends, and holidays, so be it._

**[Whatever it takes to get President Trump's Cabinet in place so we can get America back on track.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zn6k2tfvjudjkklhcosb8jpvac8ho6t2iiene4r0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62p76c5h2bs)**

Friend, will you stand with Senate Republicans and me?

**[SIGN your name now to _demand_ Democrats end the obstruction and confirm President Trump's team. >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zklm2lc20prs6gpfcu8fga4q4lgeagam3lsjia4g_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i62p76c5h2bs)**

Thank you,

U.S. Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT)

name: Gerry Connolly
subject: I’m holding Trump accountable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gerry Connolly for Congress
body:
https://gerryconnolly.com/ [https://gerryconnolly.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-ONB2025-ONB-ONB?&refcode=E11945-2025-ONB1Gerry-SL-Other&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-ONB2025-ONB-ONB?&refcode=E11945-2025-ONB1Gerry-SL-Other&amount=25]

Friend,

It’s nice to meet you — I’m Gerry Connolly, and I’m proud to represent Virginia’s 11th District in Congress. But more importantly, I’ve got a job to do — and that’s holding Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies accountable.

As the Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee, I’m leading the charge to expose their corruption and fight back against the attacks on our democracy. From Trump’s hush money schemes to his dangerous abuse of power, I’m not letting anything slide.

This work is personal. I’ve spent my life fighting for our community, protecting programs like Social Security and Medicare, and standing up for the values we all hold dear. And now, with democracy itself on the line, I refuse to back down.

You won’t find me hiding in an office — I’m out in the community every day, talking to folks, hearing your concerns, and taking your voice with me to Congress. We’re in this fight together, and I’m honored to have you on this team.

Thanks for standing with me. There’s so much more to come.

- Gerry Connolly
https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly [https://www.facebook.com/congressmanconnolly] https://twitter.com/electconnolly [https://twitter.com/electconnolly] https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/connollyforcongress/]
Gerry Connolly is the Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee and a Democratic member of Congress representing Virginia’s 11th District, located in Northern Virginia. Gerry and his wife Smitty have lived in Fairfax since 1979 and have one daughter, Caitlin. Gerry previously served as the Chairman of the Fairfax County Board of Supervisors. In Congress, Gerry has worked continuously to grow Northern Virginia’s economy, to ensure a world-class education system, and to preserve Social Security and Medicare. Gerry has our backs in Congress, so let's have his back on the campaign trail. Donate to Connolly for Congress today! [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-onb2025-onb-onb?refcode=E11945-2025-ONB1Gerry-footer-Other&amount=25]
DONATE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/GCVA-11-Email-onb2025-onb-onb?refcode=E11945-2025-ONB1Gerry-footer-Other&amount=25]
Gerry Connolly for Congress
PO Box 563
Merrifield, VA 22116
United States

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: The fight to defeat Kash Patel’s nomination isn’t over
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Here’s why we’re saying NO to Kash Patel
#

Friends -
The fight to defeat Kash Patel’s nomination for FBI Director isn’t over. After his committee vote this week, Patel is heading to the floor for a vote from the full Senate. We must keep up our efforts to reject his nomination.
If you need a refresher, here’s why we’re saying NO to Kash Patel:
* Patel has aligned himself with the far-right political movement **QAnon.**

* Patel wants to **shut down the FBI headquarters** and says he would make it a “museum of the deep state.”

* Patel **sympathizes with insurrectionists** who stormed our nation’s Capitol on January 6, 2021.

* Patel is **backed by the extreme pro-gun group Gun Owners for America,** and a top GOA executive said that under Patel’s leadership, a “reckoning is coming.”

[**We are working hard to urge the Senate to reject Kash Patel’s nomination, and we need your voice in this fight too. So please, if you want to send a message that we don’t want a conspiracy theorist and gun lobby pawn as our nation’s FBI Director, will you contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-feb25.m4Qwdn&refcode=em250210-1-b&t=1&akid=9958%2E3935704%2EJwOTnp)

## The Daily Signal Names Keith Koffler as Managing Editor
The Daily Signal announced Monday the hiring of Keith Koffler to serve as the media outlet’s next managing editor. Koffler brings over 25 years of experience in political journalism and digital media leadership to the news organization. Koffler joins The Daily Signal from Fox News Digital, where he served as senior editor since January 2021, [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/CwxBaLvj2xr12Xs9Poa8wStkLIMKJrc0FhXHyteNLkmWzt0WVit04k_zLq0nk0yRYZE3KrzJfZVsWn0KF7h4nugTj18KWmKgY-HbWqD7u1hAiTyvjGLz927QzT8bG4tbAOvgzbv8ctXX-hJAMiDZpQ7Zht9tXhr0PcxYud-PCgWVZRhy_HSLFbXAmLA1mUtacEdRJkUtL5EuDdeH3TgKXx-dqPngQ6eAleEQvpEIExT1A8nUdJwv_WSqnRIIRCq9AKubV0-TOt--O_ghGEa_E2ss9tczvIs9MWHK4PuXZLnHRO1ANHLks9Nt62KFqCKU0gyTw481A6Z9MvircjzEgA/XQsON16dvKKn7SsoBS6s8aminNRNibEL/5)

## There Was Nothing Super About Super Bowl LIX
Greetings from the sports desk located somewhere below decks of the Good Pirate Ship RedState. Sammy the Shark and Karl the Kraken are fast asleep on the couch, so I’m typing this as quietly as possible—waking them would be a big mistake. In fact, I’m typing almost as quietly as the Kansas City Chiefs [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/W8WKMK3fmXTzLTos-wxp9u0VbZVzW52c4Lue9-8Hq6zPsXsDQK52BtM8GgpkpnGGcYeVZkeewFJ4Yr1_VfDk5i0GMMfv3Y9CifGdXYLJzilnOj6L4TmDB4VcNZKYqAUzo3FQiMtOPfKw1BCCLrqsKQgJcMEsjrx6Kg1C7OBN32Zzhv3gSl1ZB89OEyvg3uwKRtqfNKO9LrqiZ-Pk-MbIfoC2IRYhZEW6Akly9UTBRwTqadfHr6auAdZPuNHRBcRjvg1BHoK3N2mC6rdzeAWRZA54l2IbWc6eh699JbYPCRCzG9YTOCo6_HwcRzY2P0RIx09QX6s/cXcz3f0XyzvIIMbhXequVyXk_k78B0fV/5)

## Eagles fly high, ride dominant defense to Super Bowl LIX win over Chiefs * WorldNetDaily * by Joe Kovacs
The Philadelphia Eagles battle the Kansas City Chiefs in Super Bowl LIX in New Orleans on Sunday, Feb. 9, 2025 (ESPN) — Defense, the old coaches used to tell us, wins championships. 1️⃣ **_California:_ Democrats approve $50 million to defend progressive policies **
State Dems allocated $50 million in funding to defend the state’s progressive policies against challenges by the Trump administration. [They are gearing up for legal battles surrounding key issues like immigration and federal abuse of the Constitution → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoc5lroAYgnBM-pxs59wzI1RHA-_gftpK7KWi_Uh9RlotMAcLvUF3zSs5t5sxoeozxevY3pGjYMSXXrIo6sra8Svc558qLt8GSJ1l02oBBmSbK2dU89AtbJ0x5KQefREdNMiir7wSpUJVKeyCOC-GIHftoNS9JIY4EiTVEjLSzMCoMUq_kpxSQsreSPKeswmzaLPU--SuqWEK0SumwEPEzQO0bEh2N_4Nv9lIHjGC6RHkj43F1MjVE8bxkvsfL30vsVk-CJlj_jCmp_Bsmzj1F_8VVAi8A6oTidpQXdCLpMufEsSfDttaF__8q3TqLM3pJBWkp_F40PsmGsOPAeAG-hehl18JXDinqWbaMhYXPLE-1_JEJPi5qxFTQVv5DdbtzuEkfeDXW2nI3R0WlutjbMTXFp8mUjqmnoMfpOrnYekaMitBP4YKLso9kT9a3QOesaCB6EyFACt4nM2Cz9RKqkx9B7ed3k8CVkUunZA2wj7Wl5MbiM63OdK4CUaW22ZZRHPc3rrm8hNOPN4UAy-YL7RXek1Ip4QGOFRV3W1IYrdBYZchCtfr9wzaYIN-bK-iaUR-BTxcKtcZK-9ZoapTjxN8-RG3TAAJRqY6MW-2C-MhQUmz1U3G88wrsbOUrUCd5Q/4dw/akHpp1o_Tv6ByZ1mZj9qug/h1/h001.sglRICv8QMmcIO7QE01acXxhe55M3x-TYS9IuWlbnkw)
2️⃣ **_Virginia:_ Democrats are exposing the local negative impacts of federal cuts **
VA House Speaker Don Scott is forming a bipartisan committee to study the impacts of what's happening in DC on federal workers and the budget in Virginia. [Dems in state-level leadership positions are pushing back against the chaos created by Trump and his allies → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbLiaHJ-U5TfDcFwGLuhaTXKVeo4Xs6es9Nkj0aWv8bfsxq41uQQkDri5wvMK0SHgN0wbcMCaIb2AccKfUcmJLnb029EYay-hqEkcFD-RvMb_pvqWNOHSxqVWeUuC01__FxXyzwwt1GAW1o-Y7qjnqppiZhybOQZhUWTSGbauSe0qPnjfcjD82sBA4EG78aqoQ1m5mUymMxM3CoR9g33--SwJyCbd9EkV_Kl60M29j_1BcGkm6jEFTapiZiY65Iv7jwbF04Dv4EAVD-BtcddA0bgnUO2EnLL1BnBHxXmoCx67M8_bDJ0L_3Vquo-02_9bgy61g6bbKGxKa_w4-ohHkTdekBz_ol5J-xsk0zwwcHvotAQDigxl0WOJonxQ0fMLdQrDBYKMYvxstvgw8DLzllTftO3fN5bsGt-ri3Hj2XF8rQp2vInp9NWp3aJLgRkGwbqDghS-n684jPHY56EsFjK5ps-1yX7zudRq2dD98Daqinhm7re7RMD9Sv2JaR16UVqaerk9MmUIHaMMz_w4nVYRFFshH67zHWrba-rAnoUJvbjHim6NumVLHvQ02pHXALj2D9ikx9vm0TgecpLoOX0EjKBFkUuOMXguq-bsPtf/4dw/akHpp1o_Tv6ByZ1mZj9qug/h2/h001.kxGwzNOH-3jbQp_cBRU13mfU0piK5gs2vn6dc4ktQGM)

While Trump’s federal funding freeze threatened to raise costs and wreak havoc on people’s lives, Democrats in the states have sprung into action to protect targeted programs. [Check out how state Dems are fighting back here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pBUYHk_9rBVL6shyqawlDeeB0OWT3caV_icSI1vh4fbCL89-iFTk4LMv-gbiyxShZZkCNVCGAHwKIH7S2RqAVcZGSvCHet64mNf_Szupu5nTv6XRhRL5BCCLFlL9m12bICSzaVTzw3iSz-sJ7dGh1Yu1xkRdkSuZjeqPvkQDvJM1T35I9qn7vcFBEfN7GdSTtuK8Y4rHGeD9P_CHLdOV34mLLNEPOdff97OPjkLyW9JBQApwCXryo9VTrRGVjiaegjgt5irvJE-4I_w3n_5_GbufZFpj9pzl04cQfji48F7m8CCP_Pjeu-AaTgK7AiUM13icylMJtvu_2RGJRqqVM4NtibanNUrtyOP06HuCsOCueqj3OYI27sGppVGkK-uIbPefNBS_OfRhQmjRtL1KnqlFvEQYzMrK-p6UGFXSB0IPJnRcoR_wtO3n9CVFEmHIGobLJauefWy3P0M5jjz8YylFQaPSED_CmU-fd6VgS3NAgeFuGPb0xgY7xwVN7mfpwNNHWE81YyYk_-y2jCQVxqeg4D2c5ieEnZcdG7eNrk17PnByVLZJ5MRkcfNDbaC4l90DqO6KLlkjZK74y03pqsUgPK_JC97QbvnnJBPGnVA5wywVuWGqGiU3-Z2T1qkTLw/4dw/akHpp1o_Tv6ByZ1mZj9qug/h3/h001.LakDXEQ82jSyEHQfCoLvniItqht2Pq2U55mTSAoSEAw)
🔦 **_Spotlight:_ DLCC announces Maine Spotlight candidate **
The DLCC announced support for Maine Spotlight candidate Sean Faircloth. He is facing an upcoming special election to defend a critical seat in the Maine state House, and is ready to jump into the fight against right-wing extremism threatening his state. [**Read more about him →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pB67dGVixFv3g62Lrur5TzWCinNCDN8eOAv92j9-xnbdzxzWunIY16T4F7oPYwDJWJOAiBbzICimR6-reehmRW2KdTMqRKsgLK6zwuTQ6Gd1R6dldEb6eX_haZojP3ilF0oWHY9PR3YHQv6zlF-lvw5HfMCPY8RQCyEZs-y8VDb-1yYQRt294S_GkqShp1t9HtB2cIqi2Mo5XEMh6TeXnyvZ6oH6P0uva4c739jVgW3nfVWgvrUBRYCJn2N4IVVbPvNVsiCJrquHKMpvs81U8Ed1vcmVrLfe4hFnygXXak-99Ch7kpJMfbBVuZYb01F8f8KoIlGdjhMQBSNf-UOmFmtCWoIcmQMbpGkiXxKD7jT9NzRIXchMZbGB5ZhLAOneSNNpPhE9DkGvpAI1_sFz5InA9GV_N7ATUpL46IYt79ZVOBHnLlyuSJweU4yPxHG3_uzwDXQnawiaY5PWErAp76SyGe66DrOXrrFcSGFPThg2b4iyGWk6oNiCzJJRtpIRbBpB7okgsgriU1pIsbXZrYIevucrQgqnrSKjwwXic4LIw/4dw/akHpp1o_Tv6ByZ1mZj9qug/h4/h001.oKYYyi6eACpOeoMmm9ZnYnYzilbWdaYL9-_BqZo30as)

If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDxrBNcNHXqACsGS7rvbl8ETU3DLibhXWMNddjYOXOVS8W-YCuZr43Ftdwx8FQjdj0Ys6u1co3B0lLcVCOv20Oz6IlOgh6X9tVNr_Kmc5kSLy3s6uKkYU0N940mUEARcycyFHfQhkZG6rJOY_e4q4fmtQ-bUwXG09tH7OxrZw19SPxIFcjYwxBqlhnRrj4uEU7rUCSr-dlQVnRdhud6qWDtqzKoar3qAp_hG3plRTxIS-6Plh6R1lq4JpqNMayKjVRmo1bbqQhHQl3fc3DQeJxz-aaJOxkzTbhT8XLScDGaFqTY56pNBnfUhIIadWP9jsUYmK9J1krYrbOkSRw7DeG-c0z4EWel3E2tsKUw_jVApcb9nH7oGlL57v-lYdnDrLoobDHf55Mx5zioHOGzcHblo3lnorLIB8ojC1ew2uqPGKoKLZTRgsPxrZSk44kcdWnzwDbHsWWD9_WqKoh_dHoxW4S9ZJVaC1aa-H1RpTezq_YDO116xYnQVQqmZzwqFGlLpR6bJA35BdzbhX_f7nS1w/4dw/akHpp1o_Tv6ByZ1mZj9qug/h5/h001.WABgeUdFtkA308Tvx3Tk9KufPcGvKRaZheCIsaJDhKQ)

clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Monday, February 10th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ California: Democrats approve $50 million to defend progressive policies State Dems allocated $50 million in funding to defend the state’s progressive policies against challenges by the Trump administration. 2️⃣ Virginia: Democrats are exposing the local negative impacts of federal cuts VA House Speaker Don Scott is forming a bipartisan committee to study the impacts of what's happening in DC on federal workers and the budget in Virginia. 3️⃣ Trump Firewall: State legislatures safeguard key programs under attack from the GOP While Trump’s federal funding freeze threatened to raise costs and wreak havoc on people’s lives, Democrats in the states have sprung into action to protect targeted programs. 🔦 Spotlight: DLCC announces Maine Spotlight candidate The DLCC announced support for Maine Spotlight candidate Sean Faircloth. He is facing an upcoming special election to defend a critical seat in the Maine state House, and is ready to jump into the fight against right-wing extremism threatening his state. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Hillsdale College via American Briefing
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ziilms9l9m2svuiaoe2begsjb7s96bc8o5pjpik8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i6eor6clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zd7q27c91k9om1hrp0iunl6njosqjunk5n6lebko_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i6eor6clh2bs)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zljctkpqq9mn677qqb7ejbla2c3goveh8ik9sub8_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i6eor6clh2bs)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znsg6kqjuo3ltl76dvfjnlfvc6aqsscuf10nsqmo_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i6eor6clh2bs)
---
| |
---

American Briefing
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zdjq7pqts2qsjjaivefjhl23k9sts36c4om9elro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4cpie9o37c9h238h1e8he4937cpie4p37cdj6aoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z09ro7nifci05isn525la79se16daieqhtrdc9ag_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9i6eor6clh2bs)_

So we’re extending our 500% MATCH until midnight to bring in a RECORD-BREAKING haul and show Trump and Republicans that Democrats are united to defeat them! name: Black Beard Machete
subject: 20 Inches of CHOPPING Power at Your Side
body:
My NEW "Blackbeard Cutlass" may look like a throwback... because IT IS...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20248/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/a572ddccc742b1caece6fe4eafc4245fe614b51b). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.

| | I hope 2024 isn't the year that it ALL hits the fan...

But if I have to tangle with any Mad Max-style armageddon pirates, [this NASTY curved machete is the #1 blade I'd want in my hands.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20248/6374453/ded39f4daa61b2a9479b1529d77376e6178ec48e/a572ddccc742b1caece6fe4eafc4245fe614b51b)

My NEW "Blackbeard Cutlass" may look like a throwback... because IT IS.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20248/6374453/8399ec7f59ecc07425ef7121d21ddbb441595d67/a572ddccc742b1caece6fe4eafc4245fe614b51b)
---
Based on the legendary 1917 US Navy Cutlass, with a few state-of-the-art upgrades, it delivers 20" of raw pirate-chopping power -- more than an ax!

With a G10 handguard, rustproof black coating, and full-tang 3CR13 blade... this ain't your grandpappy's cutlass!

BEST PART: I'm running a Chop-A-Thon Blowout!

I've got 100 of these set aside for hotlist subscribers (like YOU) for 67% OFF + Free S&H.

That's UNDER $20 shipped to your door...

[Check here to see if there are any left.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20248/6374453/ded39f4daa61b2a9479b1529d77376e6178ec48e/a572ddccc742b1caece6fe4eafc4245fe614b51b)

Thank You.

P.S. This won't last long so you'd better get on this like a hobo on a ham sandwich!
---
|

body:
Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Jamie Raskin just called on every single one of us to step up and mobilize for this next election cycle. He knows Trump and Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into these upcoming special elections, and he knows it’s going to take all of us banding together to lead Democrats to victory. Before midnight: I need 192 gifts to mobilize our Democrats and make Jamie proud. Will you rush $14 to answer Jamie’s call? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Jamie fought tirelessly with me on the Oversight Committee to PROTECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] our Democracy and hold Donald Trump accountable.

BUT THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Mike Johnson spent $141 MILLION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to buy back the House Majority and put Donald Trump back in the White House.

AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie just called on all of us to step up and fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.
He's counting on grassroots supporters to keep this campaign running strong.
Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

Team,

Donald Trump doubled down on his horrific vision for the future of Palestinians in the Middle East—saying Gaza would be "turned over to the United States by Israel" after Netanyahu concluded his war.

Trump wants to "take over" and "develop" Gaza, fulfilling a campaign promise of displacing millions of people who live there and building resorts.

|
---
| [ ](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1OTYyMzExMzc4NTM1NDM5LFwiclwiOjE0NTk2MjM3NjA3MDQzMjU2OH0iLCJzIjoiZTZlOWYzM2VlNDYzZjIwZiJ9)
---
|

**_We have to stop this madness._** Congress is infested with Trump lackeys and MAGA loyalists who are fully in charge and driving the agenda.**

The good news is that _we will have that opportunity sooner rather than later_** , before Trump and President Elon Musk can inflict maximum damage: this election is happening on April 1.

The bad news—this compressed timeline leaves us very little time to do what we need to do to win.

Our campaign is rapidly closing in on **_over $2 million raised_** since we launched in December. We can win here if we keep up the pace and build a grassroots juggernaut capable of confronting MAGA head-on.****

|
---
**[With less than eight weeks until Election Day in this critical race, every moment counts. Can you chip in $10, $25, or more to help us retake the House and stop the MAGA Madness before it is too late?__](https://yqlzye.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEwODE2MzUsXCJsXCI6MTQ1OTYyMzExMzgxNjgxMTY5LFwiclwiOjE0NTk2MjM3NjA3MDQzMjU2OH0iLCJzIjoiYWIzNDcwYTc0NWQ5MTZiNyJ9)**

name: Nellie Pou
subject: Being "the first"
body:
I'm the first Latina elected to Congress in NJ.

| |
---
Team, I'm so grateful for each and every day I have the honor of serving you in Congress. I never take that responsibility for granted. And especially at this moment, I promise to be your fighter and always keep North Jersey in the bullseye with everything I do. As you know I am the first Latina elected to Congress in New Jersey. Being the first isn't always easy or convenient, but it does highlight the incredible opportunities this country affords. I've spent my career fighting for better schools, more affordable healthcare, and fixing our broken criminal justice system. I didn't spend it chasing a title. I spent it fighting for what's right. And that's the spirit I bring with me to Congress. As you know — I won my race in November with under 51% of the vote. It was a close one. And that means GOP dark money groups are already making spending decisions that involve targeting my district - NJ-09. It would mean a lot to me to have your support — and early — so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat. **[MAGA doesn't like my fearlessness, team. They put a target on me as soon as I cast my first vote and as I continue to oppose their extremist agenda, they'll only come after me harder. Can you rush a contribution today to help me fight back?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101875016/527351200/-3691057?refcode=250208_np_first_l1&ms=250208_np_first&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZlYzU1ZWQtYzJlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V4AnLx54vs6nT__hr-FeVfOF2rbCg1uMmLd_G9ltDx4=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101875023/527351207/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250208_np_first&ms=250208_np_first&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZlYzU1ZWQtYzJlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V4AnLx54vs6nT__hr-FeVfOF2rbCg1uMmLd_G9ltDx4=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101875024/527351208/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250208_np_first&ms=250208_np_first&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjZlYzU1ZWQtYzJlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=V4AnLx54vs6nT__hr-FeVfOF2rbCg1uMmLd_G9ltDx4=)

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately.
Being the first Latina elected to Congress from New Jersey is an honor for me. I wake up each day thinking about how we can make our community better, safer, and more prosperous for all. I won't take these opportunities for granted.
— Nellie
| | |
---|---|---

### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. clean_body: I'm the first Latina elected to Congress in NJ. | | Team, I'm so grateful for each and every day I have the honor of serving you in Congress. I never take that responsibility for granted. And especially at this moment, I promise to be your fighter and always keep North Jersey in the bullseye with everything I do. As you know I am the first Latina elected to Congress in New Jersey. Being the first isn't always easy or convenient, but it does highlight the incredible opportunities this country affords. I've spent my career fighting for better schools, more affordable healthcare, and fixing our broken criminal justice system. I didn't spend it chasing a title. I spent it fighting for what's right. And that's the spirit I bring with me to Congress. As you know — I won my race in November with under 51% of the vote. It was a close one. And that means GOP dark money groups are already making spending decisions that involve targeting my district - NJ-09. It would mean a lot to me to have your support — and early — so we can have the resources to fight back and protect this seat. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Being the first Latina elected to Congress from New Jersey is an honor for me. I wake up each day thinking about how we can make our community better, safer, and more prosperous for all. I won't take these opportunities for granted. — Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . body:
I know who I’m fighting for. Are you with me?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101876711/527355315/985656371?nd&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.10_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUxM2JmZS1jNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKB4RxI0hwgNUTg68kfU_Bf0iPmhljuLecMzDQi4kR0=) Peter, it’s Emilia. When I read this headline I knew I needed to reach out to you: **_“Republicans’ emerging tax package would put billionaires over families.”_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101876712/527355316/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.10_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUxM2JmZS1jNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKB4RxI0hwgNUTg68kfU_Bf0iPmhljuLecMzDQi4kR0=) We are only a month in, but the Republican Majority in Congress has wasted no time showing us exactly who they are – _and exactly who they answer to._ Slashing programs working families rely on to give a tax cut to billionaires. Rolling back anti-discrimination policies to appease Donald Trump. Disrupting everyday Americans’ lives in pursuit of a radical agenda. **House Republicans _are_ putting billionaires over working families – and I won’t stand for it.** **I’ve always been clear about who I am fighting for, Peter.** I’m not in Congress to serve the well-connected or the wealthy – I’m there for working families, for people doing their best to get by – for Northeast Ohioans who feel overlooked or left behind. So for me, “billionaires over families” just doesn’t cut it. I believe in “working families over billionaires,” in “democracy over oligarchy”, and in **“Northeast Ohio over everybody.”** **[I’m proud to be in this fight, and I want you in it with me, Peter. So I’m asking you to step up today by making a donation to my grassroots campaign. Please, will you chip in $10 or another amount to support my fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101876713/527355317/985656371?&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.10_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUxM2JmZS1jNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKB4RxI0hwgNUTg68kfU_Bf0iPmhljuLecMzDQi4kR0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101876714/527355318/985656371?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.10_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUxM2JmZS1jNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKB4RxI0hwgNUTg68kfU_Bf0iPmhljuLecMzDQi4kR0=) | [$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101876715/527355319/985656371?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2025.02.10_b1_es_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZGUxM2JmZS1jNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cKB4RxI0hwgNUTg68kfU_Bf0iPmhljuLecMzDQi4kR0=)

I believe in “working families over billionaires,” in “democracy over oligarchy”, and in “Northeast Ohio over everybody.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = __ = Yours in Service, Emilia A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change. In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country.Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results. = | = | Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. subject: ❄️ Winter Weather Advisory! ❄️
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw that Governor Glenn Youngkin has declared a State of Emergency as we brace for yet another winter storm. This allows the Commonwealth to quickly allocate resources to keep everyone safe during the storm. The N
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000194f091c042-caefdb2c-9c29-46c3-bc94-bb61661c88ba-000000/1u5sCGwTgglKSltspQ2aJNf1BdM=412)
---
| Peter, I wanted to make sure you saw that Governor Glenn Youngkin has declared a **_State of Emergency_** as we brace for yet another winter storm. This allows the Commonwealth to quickly allocate resources to keep everyone safe during the storm. The National Weather Service has sent out warnings about heavy snow, freezing rain, ice, and even some heavy rain that might lead to flooding, power outages, and dangerous travel conditions. In response, the Virginia Emergency Support Team will be activated to coordinate our state's efforts. Here are some key recommendations to help you stay safe: **If You Must Travel:**
* Use Headlights: Enhance your visibility to help you avoid slick, dangerous spots and ensure other drivers see you.
* Slow Down: Adjust your driving speed to the road conditions. Remember, reducing your speed gives you more time to react.
* Maintain Safe Distance: Avoid tailgating to ensure you have enough stopping distance on icy roads.
* Buckle Up: Always wear your seat belt for added protection.
* Prepare Your Vehicle:
* Check your battery, antifreeze levels, and windshield wiper fluid.
* Ensure your tires are in good condition.
* Keep an emergency kit in your car that includes blankets, bottled water, snacks, a first-aid kit, and other essentials.

**For Home and Personal Safety:**
* Stay Informed: Monitor local forecasts and follow the guidance of state and local officials.
* Minimize Travel: Stay off the roads unless it's absolutely necessary.
* Prepare Your Home:
* Verify that your home is properly insulated.
* Ensure windows and doors are well-sealed.
* Have extra heat sources available in case of power outages.
* Emergency Supplies: Assemble a kit with items such as a flashlight, batteries, a window scraper, warm clothing, and other essentials.

**For Power Outages:**
* Dominion - [https://www.dominionenergy.com/virginia/report-outage-or-emergency](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.dominionenergy.com%2Fvirginia%2Freport-outage-or-emergency/1/01000194f091c042-caefdb2c-9c29-46c3-bc94-bb61661c88ba-000000/PpHXCJGKpQ79wr98IZjhy5Z-O68=412)
* REC - [https://www.myrec.coop/outagecenter](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.myrec.coop%2Foutagecenter/1/01000194f091c042-caefdb2c-9c29-46c3-bc94-bb61661c88ba-000000/CDT048gllw7iIy0mobXkavNtEHc=412)
* NOVEC - [https://www.novec.com/stormcenter/index.cfm](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.novec.com%2Fstormcenter%2Findex.cfm/1/01000194f091c042-caefdb2c-9c29-46c3-bc94-bb61661c88ba-000000/ESXMHxS3ed6YQyBF63wPn1EteXE=412)

Please take these precautions seriously and start getting ready now. By staying informed and prepared, we can all do our part to keep our community safe during this winter storm. Yours in service,
---

name: Jay Jones
subject: Creating a more equitable Virginia
body:
jayjones.com [jayjones.com]

Folks, it’s Jay Jones, candidate for Virginia Attorney General.

My family has been rooted in the Norfolk area since the early 20th century, and we’ve worked hard to create a more equitable Virginia with each generation.

My grandfather had a long career fighting for justice as a Civil Rights attorney. He also was the first Black person on the Norfolk School Board and Virginia’s Board of Education. He was committed to ensuring that all children in Virginia – regardless of race – could receive the quality education they deserved.

My father, Jerrauld, was one of the first Black children in his elementary school. To attend the predominantly White school, he had to pass a special test to show that he was smart enough to be there.

Despite some difficult experiences with racism from peers and their parents, my father excelled in his education and eventually received his law degree from Washington and Lee University. He’s one of the few Virginians to serve in all three branches of our government. I’m proud to be the son of someone who has given so much to his community.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

I owe my opportunities today to my father, grandfather, and the countless others who committed their lives to advancing equality for all Virginians. Their hard work and bravery moved our state – and our nation – in a freer, fairer direction.

But the fight for justice is still ongoing, folks. Virginia is seeing major pollution and climate change threaten our air quality and waterways – especially in communities of color; shady corporations and landlords are driving up prices and displacing Virginians of color from areas they’ve lived for generations; and many state codes contain remnants of Black Codes and Jim Crow which leaves our justice system discriminatory and out-of-date.

I’m running for Attorney General because Virginians of all backgrounds deserve leaders who will fight to make their lives better.

As Attorney General, I will work tirelessly to stop unethical corporations from polluting our beautiful state and harming our health with their dangerous practices; I’ll combat price-gougers to make life in Virginia more affordable; and I’ll help modernize our state’s legal system to be more equitable.

If you’re ready for an Attorney General who will fight for justice for all Virginians, please make a donation to my campaign today. Whether you chip in $10 or $100, you will have a huge impact on my ability to connect with voters and win this November. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]

DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=10]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025?amount=50]

DONATE $200 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q42024?amount=200]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q12025]

Thank you for standing with me.
– Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Extremists Are Rebranding—We Can’t Let Them Win
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
This is Gay Valimont, running for FL-1, and with April 1st elections coming up, **I need your help.** **The Proud Boys are trying to rewrite history.** Enrique Tarrio, the former leader of this extremist group, just walked out of prison with a makeover—literally and politically. He wants you to forget his role in the January 6th insurrection. He wants America to move on while he and his allies plot their next move, and Trump has enabled this behavior.
---
---
We can’t let that happen. We’ve seen this playbook before—far-right extremists soften their image, rebrand their rhetoric, and hope we ignore the danger they still pose to our democracy. But make no mistake, the Proud Boys and groups like them are still a threat. **I’m running because I refuse to let extremists and their enablers take control of our government. Trump’s allies, including my opponent, want to normalize their influence. I won’t stand for it.**
---
**[This campaign is about defending democracy from those who would tear it down. But I can’t do it alone. Will you chip in today to help us fight back? We are only $2750 away from our weekly goal.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101880382/527364398/181761264?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc3NDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2MwZWZjMTYtY2FlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=russ7aEZVz4hkKoyNW-4BJ3NcaPx-qoMs1o7QgAJjdQ=)**

clean_body: | | | This is Gay Valimont, running for FL-1, and with April 1st elections coming up, I need your help. The Proud Boys are trying to rewrite history. Enrique Tarrio, the former leader of this extremist group, just walked out of prison with a makeover—literally and politically. He wants you to forget his role in the January 6th insurrection. He wants America to move on while he and his allies plot their next move, and Trump has enabled this behavior. We can’t let that happen. We’ve seen this playbook before—far-right extremists soften their image, rebrand their rhetoric, and hope we ignore the danger they still pose to our democracy. But make no mistake, the Proud Boys and groups like them are still a threat. I’m running because I refuse to let extremists and their enablers take control of our government. Trump’s allies, including my opponent, want to normalize their influence. I won’t stand for it. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Tarrio may have changed his look, but the extremism he represents is alive and well. In the last few days, Trump and Elon Musk continued their rampage on hard-working American people.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101880657/527365187/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc2ZTIzMC1jYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsnFjG9T4pfglSWnqPrV4TTIfS3mxDMgY3sId5ulBD8=&emci=107548a5-b7e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9376e230-cae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389)

| | **In the last few days, Trump and Elon Musk continued their rampage on hard-working American people.** Musk's new Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) gained control of the Treasury Department's payment system, including Social Security and Medicare payment information. **The fate of millions of Americans' highly sensitive personal information now lies in the hands of Trump's unelected co-president Elon Musk.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101880659/527365188/188667534?contactdata=e8X/bbFdwdW2u1kalzYQhJ0w1oABBC8OSgiSoMPnKJ6QaGke9cjNVLKdvqODN2hBcQG2CJzASL0c8rHp3s42e4tRwTZ1AEjbfQwuR29SWVy1q8yYyY7bUTRwpiCWEGRqSjAYbCo335nzAzHxBb1kDw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc2ZTIzMC1jYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsnFjG9T4pfglSWnqPrV4TTIfS3mxDMgY3sId5ulBD8=&emci=107548a5-b7e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9376e230-cae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389) While a federal judge temporarily locked Musk and any DOGE personnel out of the Treasury system, _the fight is far from over._ Musk's unfettered access to our government is dangerous. Musk and DOGE have the power to unilaterally and dangerously cut off payments for anything they deem as "wasteful." **This week alone, Musk targeted USAID – which helps strengthen our nation's reputation, showcasing our power and our values – and now, the agency has an uncertain future.** USAID delivers critical humanitarian aid overseas. Musk wants to rewrite history and demonize Americans who are serving our nation, often in difficult and dangerous places. No one elected Elon Musk, and we must fight back against this authoritarian takeover of our democracy by an unaccountable billionaire. We don't know which government program will be Trump and Musk's next target, and that should send a chill down the spine of every American. [**Today, we need to make sure our voices are heard. We do not stand for the illegal power grab by an unchecked, unelected Elon Musk. Sign your name demanding that Elon Musk stay out of our personal data and finances.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101880660/527365189/188667534?contactdata=e8X/bbFdwdW2u1kalzYQhJ0w1oABBC8OSgiSoMPnKJ6QaGke9cjNVLKdvqODN2hBcQG2CJzASL0c8rHp3s42e4tRwTZ1AEjbfQwuR29SWVy1q8yYyY7bUTRwpiCWEGRqSjAYbCo335nzAzHxBb1kDw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc2ZTIzMC1jYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsnFjG9T4pfglSWnqPrV4TTIfS3mxDMgY3sId5ulBD8=&emci=107548a5-b7e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9376e230-cae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101880661/527365190/188667534?contactdata=e8X/bbFdwdW2u1kalzYQhJ0w1oABBC8OSgiSoMPnKJ6QaGke9cjNVLKdvqODN2hBcQG2CJzASL0c8rHp3s42e4tRwTZ1AEjbfQwuR29SWVy1q8yYyY7bUTRwpiCWEGRqSjAYbCo335nzAzHxBb1kDw==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Mzc2ZTIzMC1jYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IsnFjG9T4pfglSWnqPrV4TTIfS3mxDMgY3sId5ulBD8=&emci=107548a5-b7e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=9376e230-cae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=26261389) More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

subject: Disbar JD Vance for threatening to ignore court orders
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [Disbar JD Vance for threatening to ignore court orders](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbc982f82-7413-4051-90ac-1c58fa4f1ecd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
[](https://default.salsalabs.org/T710a0bc7-f84b-41e1-b261-6f59da51d633/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
| JD Vance is making the stunning and dangerous claim that the president and the executive branch can simply [ignore](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tabe16add-3494-4d87-a895-8048f0de56fd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) court decisions that it disagrees with. This defies the Constitution and 200+ years of history, and it essentially turns the president into an autocrat who can do whatever he wants, without checks on his power.

As a lawyer with a degree from Yale Law, Vance knows better. And yet, he has repeatedly launched this broadside attack on a key pillar of our judicial system, a foundation of our very democracy itself.

**And there is no way in hell he should be allowed to remain a lawyer in good standing.** He should be disbarred immediately, and have his license taken away. If he is hellbent on defying and destroying our system of justice, he cannot be a sanctioned part of it. [**Add your name, and demand that Vance be disbarred.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2aaad30b-2e0b-443b-bd8f-e1b41a573b2c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | JD Vance is making the stunning and dangerous claim that the president and the executive branch can simply court decisions that it disagrees with. This defies the Constitution and 200+ years of history, and it essentially turns the president into an autocrat who can do whatever he wants, without checks on his power. As a lawyer with a degree from Yale Law, Vance knows better. And yet, he has repeatedly launched this broadside attack on a key pillar of our judicial system, a foundation of our very democracy itself. And there is no way in hell he should be allowed to remain a lawyer in good standing. He should be disbarred immediately, and have his license taken away. If he is hellbent on defying and destroying our system of justice, he cannot be a sanctioned part of it. | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on and * Follow Us | | | ---|---|--- | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

| | | | | PBS's free and educational programming has helped millions of kids across America learn reading, math, social skills, and so much more for DECADES – but it’ll all be taken away if Elon Musk has his say. Musk’s silly DOGE department wants to eliminate funding for public media even though these outlets provide critical programs for so many Americans. We can't let Trump and Musk gut our beloved PBS programming! We need Democrats to show a MASSIVE outpouring of support for PBS TODAY. [Will you sign our petition to save PBS?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T30259a62-ba41-40c8-a8d8-30d107552301/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T273a0181-67cc-45ec-8f48-9592a91fb375/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [Please add your name in support of PBS >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T869c3032-cf93-4694-9fa6-75749308ca17/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8143c680-5b4c-46af-8be9-c99f5e40f832/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

**Let 's dive into our show!** On this week's episode of The Qasim Rashid Show I am joined by Dr. Alvin Tillery, a national voice on DEIA. Dr. Tillery is a political scientist and co-founder of the 2040 Strategy Group. He joins to discuss:
* The history of DEIA and the right wing attacks to criminalize DEIA
* Trump and Musk collaborating to dismantle the Federal government will kill people
* Seven acts each of us can take to counter these injustices, locally and nationally

name: Team Crow
subject: Service has defined Jason’s career
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, your priorities are Jason’s priorities. Will you take our February issues survey today to share your thoughts with Jason on what matters most to you and your family? [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/feb-priorities-survey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/feb-priorities-survey]

From the start, Jason has been committed to serving you and your family in Congress.

In fact, service has defined Jason’s career — as an Army Ranger, a veteran advocate, and a member of Congress.

He is not afraid to go where the fight is. And right now, we have a lot of fights to take on .

Jason is working to protect affordable health care, create more good-paying jobs, and defend our hard-earned rights and freedoms.

Despite the challenges ahead, he is committed to putting the needs of our community ahead of Republicans’ partisan games and getting things done. He will always do right by Coloradans and deliver servant leadership in Congress.

Now, he wants to hear from you: How can he best serve you in Congress? Share your thoughts in our latest Priorities Survey. [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/feb-priorities-survey]

TAKE THE SURVEY [https://act.jasoncrowforcongress.com/a/feb-priorities-survey]

We’re stronger when we unite around your priorities, and we’re grateful for your input.

Thank you,

Team Crow

Now more than ever, we need strong leaders like Jason working for us in Congress. Jason is fighting for you, your family, and the American people in Congress — and he's not taking a dime of corporate PAC money. Will you pitch in now to help him continue working for us?
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-feb25]
Jason Crow for Congress
8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112
United States

Friend – Democrats are gearing up for an all-out fight to take back the Senate in 2026. They’re already recruiting radical candidates and setting their sights on battleground states. If conservatives lose the Senate, the Left will ram through their Big Government tax-and-spend agenda, undoing _everything_ we’ve fought for. _We cannot let that happen._ **That’s why Club for Growth Action is already preparing to go on the offense.** We’re building the war chest right now to ensure we keep a pro-growth, pro-freedom majority in the Senate. ️☀️️To all Democrats: 🇺🇸 ️Please don’t scroll past this one-minute read. ️It’s Monday, February 10. We are only a couple of weeks into Trump’s presidency. He and his extreme allies in Congress and his billionaire Cabinet are determined to pass destructive legislation and directives. Their plans threaten the very foundations of our democracy.
We can — _and will_ — fight back against Trump and his allies’ Project 2025 agenda. But to do that, we’ll need a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way. And we have to fight back **now**. Not tomorrow. Not next week. **Today.**
But the truth is that less than 1 percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up right now.

body:
If conservatives lose the Senate, the Left will ram through their Big Government tax-and-spend agenda

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zofdlc0etm93td1ebv60pgu09hqbtoi402qvlt00_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9h6cpj7c5h2bs)
---
Friend – Democrats are gearing up for an all-out fight to take back the Senate in 2026. They’re already recruiting radical candidates and setting their sights on battleground states. If conservatives lose the Senate, the Left will ram through their Big Government tax-and-spend agenda, undoing _everything_ we’ve fought for. _We cannot let that happen._ **That’s why Club for Growth Action is already preparing to go on the offense.** We’re building the war chest right now to ensure we keep a pro-growth, pro-freedom majority in the Senate. But we need your help. **[Will you chip in to help us fight back?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvcg4lqflajte27uotn8ue8ie9i76cmqknoc29o0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9h6cpj7c5h2bs)**
