name: Thom Tillis
subject: We need to confirm Kash Patel.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter,

We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time.

**[But I made some promises, too.

From the moment President Trump announced Kash Patel as his nominee to restore integrity at the FBI, I vowed to lead the charge to get him confirmed--and now we've met our moment. ](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/0rCV_BfrvGHFFRFwKbF9Qb9zMK4yijtLoHvA7woOduOU5Znz0375LfEhruZ8xWkt7nPI9AsFA1Mq_9N2KTvTKIbVwrjz1_NULQt0MgnfcBXBnYl7qw-JMLa9Yzs7OEK5pKw5wUy5kzMnjOqDkQ4krUHEgPDtxAxVGxeIXLGVAory9qmqD-vkXUSEzWWnImtZC5NnsqXQA03bWjXMlje0KSFy0l1_Kcot0UUr1ibpLw3JV-FdQn8VHyfzQL2YiGJBgWtsVa6g1-BxB3sgXzF-_80rqFcmwt7qrZ3XQaSRR8lvfCmwM0NNqdl8ClhwX9udMpzwEexECfYuv2tl8fZHpqMGWEFJntr4NVDGBvchYAh8x9KFI2-PnAjCbdEJw-KoJZwBaMdt8c3TZbdWvTiMz1G-QR5-HSRxL5pcbfcHNbbdqqmVdVj1VNZpe-Z3V5KCnVlpKu6pfhm0SsSo6R80YhQP59tn-mD0zZ0f4RtdgCFggVxBniJ1OhQe8Ap6Jcsxrp40MvceIevcSaUFA0FvB2YajhcWxK_Tvkrd1BqVPVjHbvY-YHi4f0AcZ5VX3fUUTHiyeMw308dAiZvbtRfbEW_IswwxtieUTaJbbVZ-G5u0RgmnzLZmzTfoafRB5bWa-9LJdLM8/0oWUPVfB8Fvhfm8yY2vii0wzFHS6VZkP/5)**

Yesterday, I introduced Kash Patel at his confirmation, and he was immediately met with baseless attacks and cheap shots from the Left.

Despite the Democrats' desperate attempts to derail the hearing, Kash held firm and demonstrated he is the leader we need at the FBI.

Now, I want to hear from you.

**[Do you think the Senate should confirm Kash Patel as our next FBI Director?](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/J0fxNlJtGPyPoEhJu6Ul30gQ97pMbLt7WZKLOSy8kC2ucsggtcYECEuft9HkNrufOx6sy-SE0DTd0ZX2t5I6fnW_-4aLKDhOC0q4gmPtCHNWiKkh28D-UC6yQyiyj5sGPr-mnOenwJMxFb9ZnigqMyJEhXIjyTkOWQsMqt_oxhZKBE3O1uiEGWKZY4uRZvuG4gA6I2ws4ED8badJ0DyUeLwQu0cEDCxe_R3BnQqByph7_YxM_StPPz7MIubXgzxGA7K5UVYhYw6jDRI5RgxF_U_WkKYejasUyFULwBV7Z2KV5WaMQ888qq44xCGm18Nw76X5FUncNajxyEO8zNHmUlj5VJa22j41wFDSiSZtERpxOKEqLW8s3ejIAfS67ta4NPx75KXhUDHstSjHa9ovsNeOQggMSnxQKcYLB4bknGSJIKH8bL_GnCzrYCsr1QJV4OSMaqnfb1E_bccYvsAWt4dX9DiBjyr6HmERBWGV45oy_x4iJf-EopHp1Mm55HT8XqmRZw3yyM8cHMbeQ6c2KRwDDmXACtdZ_ZocARPbRld5vAR86lX9L9KvjXVLWKub1CATlSPWmZohCxi5ym_bR2y8fduSNTHqdm3FmPJwjc02ZkEqXoGpJTinsXLSK6F_MvgtmYHK/EDJHBHjpTeTaw4PgNTVlUmaDpRG3H82J/5)**

clean_body: Peter, We're coming off the most important first week of any American presidency in history. President Trump made a lot of promises on the campaign trail, and it's stunning to see how many he's delivered on in such a short time. Yesterday, I introduced Kash Patel at his confirmation, and he was immediately met with baseless attacks and cheap shots from the Left. Despite the Democrats' desperate attempts to derail the hearing, Kash held firm and demonstrated he is the leader we need at the FBI. Now, I want to hear from you. ****************************************************************************************************** I refuse to back down from the Dems' attacks on Trump's America First agenda, and I am fighting tooth and nail to confirm Kash as FBI Director. Sincerely, Thom Tillis ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. name: COURIER Newsroom
subject: Trump’s CBS lawsuit just got even more absurd
body:
Now, he’s doubling the suit to $20 billion—absurdly claiming that CBS cost him financial losses by diverting traffic from his Truth Social platform.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101883802/527372269/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQxZDNiY2QtY2VlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=N4gZurLFxPGyhoDOOTW9D0r5OWi082BnRfAr-VepYg8=&emci=531d3bcd-cee7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=641d3bcd-cee7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
COURIER has been all over Trump’s efforts to intimidate and silence the media through fear tactics and bogus lawsuits.
Last week, we told you that CBS News was on the verge of caving to Trump’s $10 billion lawsuit simply because he didn’t like a _60 Minutes_ interview with Kamala Harris. Now, he’s doubling it to $20 billion—absurdly claiming that CBS cost him financial losses by diverting traffic from his Truth Social platform.
**Peter, this isn’t about journalism. It’s about intimidation. If CBS caves to Trump’s threats, as reports suggest, it will set a dangerous precedent.**
[**We’ll break it all down below, but first—can you chip in $25 to help COURIER stand up to Trump’s attacks on the free press?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101883804/527372271/2081197767?refcode=20250210-EM-CBS-Trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQxZDNiY2QtY2VlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=N4gZurLFxPGyhoDOOTW9D0r5OWi082BnRfAr-VepYg8=)
* * *
Fearless and factual, with legends like Mike Wallace and Walter Cronkite at the helm, CBS News once set the gold standard for American journalism.
Now, CBS is on the verge of joining a growing, shameful club—**the list of corporate media institutions bowing to Trump’s lawsuits and authoritarian tactics to silence the free press.**
According to reports, CBS News is preparing to settle Trump’s latest attack on the press—a $10 billion lawsuit over a _60 Minutes_ interview with Kamala Harris.
Trump claims CBS deceptively edited the interview to favor Harris—a blatant lie. The full, unedited footage, available online, proves CBS did not alter her statements or misrepresent her words in any way.
**[Support Fearless Journalism ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101883805/527372273/2081197767?refcode=20250210-EM-CBS-Trump&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjQxZDNiY2QtY2VlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=N4gZurLFxPGyhoDOOTW9D0r5OWi082BnRfAr-VepYg8=)**
This lawsuit is as absurd as Trump’s case against _The Des Moines Register_ , where he sued over a bad poll that showed him losing Iowa, and ABC News, which settled a dubious $15 million defamation claim over an offhand remark by George Stephanopoulos.
**Yet still, CBS is poised to cave—not because the lawsuit has merit, but because its parent company, Paramount Global, is desperate to push through a merger with Skydance Media. They fear Trump’s FCC will block the deal if they don’t play nice.**
If CBS really folds, it will send a chilling message:_Trump’s intimidation tactics are working._
**If major news outlets won’t stand up to Trump, we will. COURIER exists to counter his lies, expose his corruption, and deliver fearless, fact-based journalism where it’s needed most. Unlike CBS News, we don’t answer to billionaires or corporate executives—we answer to the truth.**

clean_body: Now, he’s doubling the suit to $20 billion—absurdly claiming that CBS cost him financial losses by diverting traffic from his Truth Social platform. Peter, COURIER has been all over Trump’s efforts to intimidate and silence the media through fear tactics and bogus lawsuits. Last week, we told you that CBS News was on the verge of caving to Trump’s $10 billion lawsuit simply because he didn’t like a 60 Minutes interview with Kamala Harris. Now, he’s doubling it to $20 billion—absurdly claiming that CBS cost him financial losses by diverting traffic from his Truth Social platform. Peter, this isn’t about journalism. It’s about intimidation. If CBS caves to Trump’s threats, as reports suggest, it will set a dangerous precedent. = Fearless and factual, with legends like Mike Wallace and Walter Cronkite at the helm, CBS News once set the gold standard for American journalism. Now, CBS is on the verge of joining a growing, shameful club—the list of corporate media institutions bowing to Trump’s lawsuits and authoritarian tactics to silence the free press. According to reports, CBS News is preparing to settle Trump’s latest attack on the press—a $10 billion lawsuit over a 60 Minutes interview with Kamala Harris. Trump claims CBS deceptively edited the interview to favor Harris—a blatant lie. The full, unedited footage, available online, proves CBS did not alter her statements or misrepresent her words in any way. = This lawsuit is as absurd as Trump’s case against The Des Moines Register , where he sued over a bad poll that showed him losing Iowa, and ABC News, which settled a dubious $15 million defamation claim over an offhand remark by George Stephanopoulos. Yet still, CBS is poised to cave—not because the lawsuit has merit, but because its parent company, Paramount Global, is desperate to push through a merger with Skydance Media. They fear Trump’s FCC will block the deal if they don’t play nice. If CBS really folds, it will send a chilling message:Trump’s intimidation tactics are working. If major news outlets won’t stand up to Trump, we will. COURIER exists to counter his lies, expose his corruption, and deliver fearless, fact-based journalism where it’s needed most. Unlike CBS News, we don’t answer to billionaires or corporate executives—we answer to the truth. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you for standing with us, The COURIER team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

subject: President Elon Musk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=L%2FO26fANQAS1z8ysFH959c2RKMagUNGwD%2BXQ%2FstmhNCx8%2B5DJiN9oh3oZqQ5d0IE%2BU2v57QM3VnGe98eIyZw7mn3U%2BvcHruSYbW%2BsIHavrOZN08jz7bZ0dWbjJtdlcwZO9VM2TYl6RqYdG8ISN0987AcB20CK3jsVV5vINalZxAGH6RAYbl%2FKhpqNv%2Btz%2B5%2FPiRcw0EOHIOxIuof6SpAnAeZFSVeNZfq12L8AO%2BaChITk4FbdLZcg23pmTzchn4flfvpOpvudXyrCQKcViK6wKMhlZRm62WnrGfddrIDd1K7ozpqUZQBufukfakfAiWWHJLzdWuDC3qjH21q721%2BZb414ptZZCvU0WIxk4vChMp2P%2F12%2FsJEFLTPum0wu1jR4fQlFX6QT5vuvDski1MaMm4pXAnFttG1JGhN5q%2BrWOX7sJ%2Bu8SUq44jxdXxx4T3X)
---
| |
---
**Elon Musk is an unelected and unvetted billionaire. Yet, he’s acting like the President of the United States.** From shutting down critical programs like USAID to seizing access to Americans' data at the Treasury to sending his “cost-cutting squad” into the nation’s Medicare & Medicaid center, Musk is doing more damage to the federal government than anyone imagined. **_The lack of oversight on President Musk’s actions cannot continue._

We need to take back the House in the midterms and put up roadblocks to Musk and Trump. name: Concealed Carry
subject: Your CCW Permit is approved! download here ✅
body:
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20249/6374453/2e3f1d290e92279c9c43a0bee972a62f10874473/c805442629e5ddfa79b965f70ba602ad7626d249)
---
| | |
---
_February 10th, 2025_
---
| | |
---
It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20249/6374453/fa31d216222ef33df853baad8b74c3781e6906bf/c805442629e5ddfa79b965f70ba602ad7626d249). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20249/6374453/fa31d216222ef33df853baad8b74c3781e6906bf/c805442629e5ddfa79b965f70ba602ad7626d249).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20249/6374453/fa31d216222ef33df853baad8b74c3781e6906bf/c805442629e5ddfa79b965f70ba602ad7626d249)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!
---
| | |
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/20249/6374453/2e3f1d290e92279c9c43a0bee972a62f10874473/c805442629e5ddfa79b965f70ba602ad7626d249)
---

name: Team Bennet
subject: ICYMI: Bennet has been fighting back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act]
Hi team,
Since Donald Trump was sworn into office on January 20th, Michael has been fighting back against this new administration's deluge of damaging decisions and actions.
During Robert F. Kennedy’s HHS confirmation hearings, Michael grilled him on his record [https://x.com/MichaelBennet/status/1884691250856489248] of spreading dangerous conspiracy theories regarding the COVID-19 pandemic, Lyme disease, pesticides, and AIDS. His record is disqualifying for someone nominated to lead our nation’s health.
https://x.com/MichaelBennet/status/1884691250856489248 [https://x.com/MichaelBennet/status/1884691250856489248]
He also questioned former Representative Tulsi Gabbard, Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence, on her record and experience. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XmCWPKMnBmw] It quickly became clear that she holds beliefs that are antithetical to what we should expect from a leader charged with our national security.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XmCWPKMnBmw [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=XmCWPKMnBmw]
With only Republican support, RFK Jr. and Tulsi Gabbard will be headed toward full Senate confirmation votes. Michael will continue speaking out on the dangers of these unqualified nominees, and urging his colleagues across the aisle to vote against their confirmation. Watch Michael and Rachel Maddow discuss the confirmation process and these dangerous nominees below. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-bennetmaddowappearance?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act&nvep=&hmac=]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-bennetmaddowappearance?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-bennetmaddowappearance?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act]
The Trump administration’s chaos has not been limited to nominees.
Last month, they ordered a reckless and shortsighted decision to freeze all federal aid that would’ve wreaked havoc on Colorado police and fire departments, schools, and hospitals that rely on federal grants. Thanks to furious pushback from Michael and so many others, the Trump administration was forced to back down from this threat.
While Democrats may be in the minority, that isn’t stopping Michael from using every tool at his disposal to hold the Trump administration accountable. As a member of the powerful Senate Intelligence and Finance Committees, Michael is demanding the American people get answers to what Elon Musk, an unelected billionaire, and his Department of Government Efficiency “DOGE” and are up to.
It may be a tough time, but Michael is a fighter, and he isn’t letting up anytime soon. Can you make a contribution today to support his work? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250210_febicymi_act]
Thank you,
Team Bennet

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States

name: Hillsdale College via Freedom Nation Today
subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/piWSGaq2Viba4INyOMbn1FzSK5rlQS_vPYW3tOLLMqJ6cVXI2rFXaaPKs5fUePr43-jqwluA6v9A08URZljH-LonHWoYO8G8Iu0WmbovoRLt5HkLBbrwHjl9c-msR4iVh_Ktz1pqBRi-k54ZjIhLY1GUWZKHQXZh7hlGxq2duYdg4jozvp6o9qpHE2F4oqSgMJNmWKtzTjlog81zVVJ1FoWD1KLlcvPXiY8Cg9UXaICpQLfrMhki0kFA_rAOVcMWR753QhThIuWz4GnTgDU9ji6PLO52q9-NfuzbKENcezSYlgsWpig2d_PlEj99SaSunz1pOUku37TK47qv5vuiXLlTQ7aDm4M65QsdV8vDCUrc7XFFEPvRLvMGTPNQi3fan920mldDN6WrUy4Tv7GbiH92vX8R8g7x2CRsSyjYAKUDrVnP9lXIXg/yLrcaRILYvqISnBkuwPSuruEuGZRNhFz/5)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/-tksK_Co9rr9XDbzqCGSvIs6l5GROjtD0dvFIw7qVXIlXi5nzFUVFXDO05scgPvNd51Z0mJaPjWmUl6sdYr9CYZEXPjG9T4cYrDHXM3xjMZP3i2uwZfzbJdt3sg9z1HNi7M44CYp5ws7MS_sR9ApJ_6y0df9aQsmHiizz9QH4HsHaic1W1Waq4veffiMdBq3FxOg3NlAzepL8LF7hbxowjb3OA3oEXh8ClukO8b2ld9ekpXVrA4km6WB4p9QVT_8qV6XqjJzWWbd7Vv-780NvITC5wmZr1nwyBB71F1hZdA3xrLH0S5TFThH9xpLXprLxlgx-ZENUoCmspAUsN5q3w3-M4G6Uvu2TtUjLCx-2iyznQ1_aER2hWxZrc6KNijDA1t9J2wKmz1V8Sdj9XW5_rqhknHhQ0OAkjEP-oLimZuJwptcbX80Ag/dE8zLSkwIPl-gzH_QrhbnLhdIfXFgmcU/5)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/SIHe3t3T4b2YEFBSv3LbsjVOUchGmrA18hZCz1RjrLY3TEj7KUL5xQSw29JnDv9lghWSfRjmRUHQZfgxIBWAK7AsSdcZJtdBTzV5Vs2WTBZBGNqKOG42JnBJ3TQygL6vnU_Tia50QpBpK0GeTLHmimRHauS6dhRw5_sjKBUmUHA58WGfimrgtgRbHONAPUnYDsELhFiQmjio0OpQRhgYM1lMv8LplSUFCp-cHGbZq-GnjmmaXo1CsQJZzKvppIT0dR4D7jPvGttnpT_m8OqX8EDdLRaEa3-4uj7_IjCAsoAzZQyiSpkSccCQAzfU-7M0VBPxkmMTe76LlH8iH96FqmucKkPvnocBi7c1oIg4ZJY0h7zocn30f9SEppsJiyI-wjAPCe6m4HiXPsQP7THWHdzaCPKoBrprG8ahYjZ-6xli1-7Co11k6g/aaR8I7qTpLdjj0VoJikHT5xjbe_5QmAi/5)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

clean_body: Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | | | Dear Fellow American, I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments. CRT has been around for decades. Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just another crazy fringe academic theory." Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse. Now , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege." To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse... What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists." This should NOT be happening in America. Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education. But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT. Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action. Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now: When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles. name: Congressman Troy Downing
subject: Liberals are HELPING illegals avoid ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
ICE needs our support more than ever

| | | [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
_**Liberal politicians are actively working to HELP illegal immigrants avoid deportation.**_
---
Just this week, a Denver councilwoman encouraged people to report ICE activity—not to help law enforcement, but to warn illegal immigrants so they can escape deportation.

This is unacceptable. We were elected with a historic mandate to secure the border and enforce our immigration laws – but far-left cities are turning themselves into safe havens for illegal criminals.

**If ICE can’t do its job, our communities are at risk. Crime will rise, and law-abiding Americans will pay the price.**

Peter, I refuse to stay silent while Democrats undermine our immigration laws. **But to fight back, I need YOUR help.**

[**Will you chip in to help amplify our America FIRST message, hold these reckless politicians accountable, and demand real border security? Every dollar fuels our fight to secure the border and protect American communities.**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._M9lNX4q4Jpb5Q)
---

name: Office of U.S. Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: Senator Alsobrooks Newsletter: Telephone Town Hall
body:
|
---

Dear friends and neighbors: On Wednesday night, at 7:30 pm, Senator Chris Van Hollen and I are hosting a Telephone Town Hall to answer your questions and provide an update on Trump/Musk's illegal actions and our efforts to fight back and protect our federal employees - both in Congress and in the courts. We'll be joined by Rob Shriver of Democracy Forward, an organization taking legal actions to stop this abuse of power.

To join our call, you can sign up to be dialed in [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14189.5239911.5032239.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2foutreach.senate.gov%2fiqextranet%2fEForm.aspx%3f__cid%3dSenVanHollen%26__fid%3d100074&redir_log=78022078659569). By signing up you will receive a call to join our telephone town hall at approximately 7:30 on Wednesday night - the deadline to sign up to receive this call is Wednesday morning at 9:00 am. If you'd like to listen in but not join the call via phone - or if you miss the sign-up deadline - you can also join our [livestream of the town hall here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenAlsobrooks&crop=14189.5239911.5032239.7190525&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.vanhollen.senate.gov%2flive&redir_log=942008812194262).
We hope you can join us on Wednesday night, as we take your questions and provide answers on how we're fighting back during this unprecedented and challenging time.

Hope you will join us to fight back! Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks
United States Senator

[Click here to Unsubscribe.](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/EForm.aspx?__cid=SenAlsobrooks&__fid=100022&__crop=14189.5239911.5032239.7190525)

We'll be joined by Rob Shriver of Democracy Forward, an organization taking legal actions to stop this abuse of power. To join our call, you can sign up to be dialed in . By signing up you will receive a call to join our telephone town hall at approximately 7:30 on Wednesday night - the deadline to sign up to receive this call is Wednesday morning at 9:00 am. If you'd like to listen in but not join the call via phone - or if you miss the sign-up deadline - you can also join our . We hope you can join us on Wednesday night, as we take your questions and provide answers on how we're fighting back during this unprecedented and challenging time. Hope you will join us to fight back! Sincerely, Angela Alsobrooks United States Senator

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101887044/527382799/2105508926?refcode=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmM2ZGIzLWQyZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vn47qiVxeBnmVnZb6LeRxqQosqD_SnT_rWUXyBGY7OQ=) Hi there. It’s Sally Field. I’m proud to call Jane Fonda a dear friend, and I fully believe in the necessary work of her climate PAC. The past month has been devastating for our hometown of Los Angeles. Fires ripped through my neighborhood, destroying homes, memories, and dreams. Thanks to the heroic efforts of my neighbors and first responders, my house miraculously survived — but many others weren't so lucky. My heart aches for them. What happened in Southern California is a powerful snapshot of our climate nightmare. Climate disasters are happening everywhere — wildfires, floods, hurricanes — all fueled by the fossil fuel industry’s greed and a government that won’t hold them accountable. And now, with Trump’s administration gleefully rolling back climate protections and empowering polluters at every turn, there’s no time to waste. While we fight Trump’s deadly agenda, _we need to be strategic._ We do that by investing in candidates at the state and local level and building a robust layer of climate policy to protect our neighbors and our communities from this administration’s deadly agenda. In 2024, Jane’s team helped elect nearly 100 leaders at every level of government across the country. Now, they’re hitting the ground running to identify as many climate champions as possible to support this year and beyond. But they need you on their team. **That’s why I’m asking for your help today. If you can, please join me in supporting their crucial work with a contribution of any amount.** I’ve not only had the great pleasure to work with Jane on-screen as an actor, but I’ve also been right there on the front lines with Jane as an activist — marching, protesting, and yes, even getting arrested together when we refused to stay silent about the climate crisis. This fight is deeply personal, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. **[Whether it’s $10, $25, or $100, your donation will make a powerful difference. Together, we can fight back against Trump, Big Oil, and anyone else standing in the way of protecting our planet. Are you with us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101887045/527382800/2105508926?refcode=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmM2ZGIzLWQyZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vn47qiVxeBnmVnZb6LeRxqQosqD_SnT_rWUXyBGY7OQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101887046/527382801/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmM2ZGIzLWQyZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vn47qiVxeBnmVnZb6LeRxqQosqD_SnT_rWUXyBGY7OQ=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101887047/527382802/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ms=ea.43fc6db3-d2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQzZmM2ZGIzLWQyZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vn47qiVxeBnmVnZb6LeRxqQosqD_SnT_rWUXyBGY7OQ=)

clean_body: | = Hi there. It’s Sally Field. I’m proud to call Jane Fonda a dear friend, and I fully believe in the necessary work of her climate PAC. The past month has been devastating for our hometown of Los Angeles. Fires ripped through my neighborhood, destroying homes, memories, and dreams. Thanks to the heroic efforts of my neighbors and first responders, my house miraculously survived — but many others weren't so lucky. My heart aches for them. What happened in Southern California is a powerful snapshot of our climate nightmare. Climate disasters are happening everywhere — wildfires, floods, hurricanes — all fueled by the fossil fuel industry’s greed and a government that won’t hold them accountable. And now, with Trump’s administration gleefully rolling back climate protections and empowering polluters at every turn, there’s no time to waste. While we fight Trump’s deadly agenda, we need to be strategic. We do that by investing in candidates at the state and local level and building a robust layer of climate policy to protect our neighbors and our communities from this administration’s deadly agenda. In 2024, Jane’s team helped elect nearly 100 leaders at every level of government across the country. Now, they’re hitting the ground running to identify as many climate champions as possible to support this year and beyond. But they need you on their team. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. If you can, please join me in supporting their crucial work with a contribution of any amount. I’ve not only had the great pleasure to work with Jane on-screen as an actor, but I’ve also been right there on the front lines with Jane as an activist — marching, protesting, and yes, even getting arrested together when we refused to stay silent about the climate crisis. This fight is deeply personal, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With love and gratitude, Sally Field P.S. — I know not everyone is in a position to afford making a financial contribution to emails like this one. Whether you can contribute or not, on behalf of Jane and the JanePAC team, we’re beyond grateful to have you on our team, and will keep you posted about new opportunities to get involved. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

subject: re: ending Trump’s reign of terror

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?t=1&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=2&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D) [**This could change EVERYTHING!!**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=3&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=4&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D) We could FINALLY slow Trump's reign of terror - if things are this bad in the first weeks, imagine how bad the next FOUR YEARS will be!!

We need these impeachment articles to pass ASAP, but it will go NOWHERE without support from AT LEAST [91] more Good Democrats.

[**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to co‐sign the impeachment articles against Donald Trump ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=5&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D) | [CO-SIGN TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=6&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D)
---
Look - here's what Trump has done in just his first weeks:

- pardoned every single January 6th rioter

- accused USAID of being corrupt and dismantled it

- investigated FBI agents who worked on Jan. 6 cases

- froze funding for Medicare, Social Security, and more

- tried to enact 25% tariffs on Canada, Mexico, and China

- gave Elon Musk unlimited access to government servers

- withdrew from the World Health Organization and the Paris Climate Agreement
We're TERRIFED about what he could do in the next four years.

That's why we need the House to impeach Trump. And we can REALLY DO THIS!! Just look at what Jamie Raskin said:
That's why we're rushing to get 1O,OOO citizen co-sponsors on the articles of impeachment to convince two Republicans to get on board and end this madness.
[**_Add your name before 11:59 p.m. to co‐sign the impeachment articles against Donald Trump ->_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=7&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D)
[CO-SIGN TRUMP'S IMPEACHMENT ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-impeach-trump?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Impeach-Trump-ST_B1_F1_S1_C1_main_N&t=8&akid=22850%2E4449941%2EBnK91D)
---
Still fighting,

_Fight for Reform_

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Share your thoughts on CRT and its influence
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Hmh18cwNRm7Gwk71vchTIoIEhAcBVzM63h_P6-Nu_1yN6nd4i2hfLU0zL6NVI2GOc9Lo2gNaHpUF5wXVgvTTc8OTIzxoRz-F6B9Q5a1neCsjp9f_m74opFprf_jyfdXqyKlbTBbqexKJHgDpHVniTdq6a0wJSt6WHggvMV6xb_eTMNCe3RqIx9nqZoG2iAv6xLHW_NwU8uwYr620VPo4F2Zxm4FL_y_eJR7cBL2ErsGzca__5UyONf8epypmB4YuNKARb5i88R8IQOma5Y-SBsIUT97Xr8kS8wh2cb7_yaEQsgDOKHuaAH-cP0ZdHz_rOz07M2QHxPzq-sKcuqI4Es4AvPFIYfSJZ52vqRJ7tU5f0MlgxPPcxnPzuAjo6Rm6Yp4Rkp1mhkB8hOtS6hLd8XEGdusskOuWgiYKihwxMLAjlSzO-opnmQ/q63jsp1wI1xCAvd0dUcOgUK8Q7G8GJAs/5)

| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/ST0hTBfJYQcQXqdcNH6eo2ZZtzhgYa75V4riO2RS6y1O3gIKY6OnWmuUYdXJKBmD3YU4OTLAG32l1GpDqYrMw4kWBo9TVs-1E6K00bE6M__tAVNcFlIlr7ck1uMCJJtwPZeSsdhDVJlLUGAKtyWW92UW10WaXefHUcQamyfceHl8JLpL9mcgjE29MhX7ub3uvVP6lLSl-_XteN1MfbW9lJYR4M9O_7bP14wcV9A3uYCNpI9JRMlyzNN30HRZgH5k5SANFz7A5qyC7DWEwbmNFmHK5AMWq0DpgtelcaWb4eGg0wbzNwSg8cjRDSErPd3CSpinW3_nekphVROd3Wx1YAwF6pgyQ4ZDat9zgvoFDTPrGVsQ76UmmGd5OJMSAtfe-18mV3qprNb5bfGYuu4cy_x5qadkzLh-PgW_-skyVoG44ukjMW_pMw/EAod9Y8ZTpb8GmpsqtdxAeCk3_7o1NN2/5)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/Up5WhjQrLKzgaDGP0-smnBWpKDLXeFyPRC1tmt2197BPCbUuMA1R9kSfc0CSwzoBQQ7VAT55DJiDb03Nb_JkwB5DddV0Y4-hBrBi8v5k_l-a_3lclpTVxS9Gq-Z1t-pu0v0ca4uGuiADY6Qy97N_-vTDVZWBg4kcSQcXSu_2VTshnjBmNq4W8PqS0Enh8nL1RvrjDD82M7UJlnrEJfRb8z40EEY4ntxXtSw06QNjly8C-lefF_GISownh6ritCFvfTXGbJI0_94Ov5eeKHB-Ml7Wbh-yBW13cDy4T9MR2DNKWXqbuN1r4XQ8pRVlrJKp0j-l-k6hv65Ad_e8K4TE_JIXB5vZxdfDW1rKS3Ng87TywIjj6LYk1cgqzIntq1_aVybQUvSdeGEA_n18wsaswroEJHvxXto-4_XrpV3yYDBiNrS5gz3NyA/mpwWgaxraKzJhWdDGuxfab6z1zE7T2Jr/5)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

name: Mark Warner
subject: The Trump Administration wants to “traumatize the federal workforce”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
We’re only three weeks in, and the impacts are being felt everywhere

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101887702/527385126/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FedGov_250210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZTlhNy1kNGU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62kXExF2Pav79lKo9THXReooctYRe6S7M-Un3XPmKJo=) Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [_**pitch in to my re-election campaign**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101887703/527385127/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FedGov_250210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZTlhNy1kNGU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62kXExF2Pav79lKo9THXReooctYRe6S7M-Un3XPmKJo=) – but first I wanted to take a minute to talk about what happened last week.

Thursday night – over my strenuous objections – the Senate voted to confirm Russell Vought to run the Office of Management and Budget. **A man who outright said he wants to “traumatize the federal workforce” is now in a top position to implement the agenda he laid out when he wrote Project 2025.**

Even before Vought’s confirmation, it’s been clear that the Trump Administration’s actions has already traumatized federal workers – the same ones who come to work every day looking to help others and make our communities better and stronger, who work on issues like national security and intelligence, veterans’ benefits, Medicaid, and education.

And it’s clear that their agenda of cutting and clearing, no matter the consequences, is far from over: News outlets are already reporting that the White House is preparing an executive order to fire thousands of federal health workers.

Friday, after a late night trying to stop the onslaught of Trump nominees, I spent the day meeting with Virginians to hear from them about how this chaos is already affecting their lives, from religious leaders to folks in the space industry. Over and over again I heard that folks don’t know what’s coming next. But they’re ready to keep fighting for our country.

[_**I will always keep fighting for Virginians and for all Americans. It won’t be easy, but it will be worth it. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll pitch in to my re-election campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101887704/527385128/2047032710?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_FedGov_250210_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Yjc0ZTlhNy1kNGU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=62kXExF2Pav79lKo9THXReooctYRe6S7M-Un3XPmKJo=)

We are just starting this fight – we have a long way to go. Thank you for being with me.

Mark Warner

clean_body: We’re only three weeks in, and the impacts are being felt everywhere | | | = Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to = – but first I wanted to take a minute to talk about what happened last week. Thursday night – over my strenuous objections – the Senate voted to confirm Russell Vought to run the Office of Management and Budget. A man who outright said he wants to “traumatize the federal workforce” is now in a top position to implement the agenda he laid out when he wrote Project 2025. Even before Vought’s confirmation, it’s been clear that the Trump Administration’s actions has already traumatized federal workers – the same ones who come to work every day looking to help others and make our communities better and stronger, who work on issues like national security and intelligence, veterans’ benefits, Medicaid, and education. And it’s clear that their agenda of cutting and clearing, no matter the consequences, is far from over: News outlets are already reporting that the White House is preparing an executive order to fire thousands of federal health workers. Friday, after a late night trying to stop the onslaught of Trump nominees, I spent the day meeting with Virginians to hear from them about how this chaos is already affecting their lives, from religious leaders to folks in the space industry. Over and over again I heard that folks don’t know what’s coming next. But they’re ready to keep fighting for our country. = We are just starting this fight – we have a long way to go. Thank you for being with me. Mark Warner **= | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

subject: Take our Critical Race Theory Survey
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=557c802302ba42f6b2c63da9486ba949&_e=r6AoIVY8oHHUngs4XNDtIG_sxdh-cszc1ykyyywlr0laNJE6oHoNupksqyUBzV5DJWw3bat6OxaSTgylOQ3HDNWZH2ONm2vMBm1WI8aVpVE_xUBZgJIt9CewH1irYP2xW1b780vqZ2PwyW6GHIHn80Jol3PyYfEShbwcFFLKC7bxRTt2a-0OfHjD5vfIbYuB-Gu4UWmgEsN8V46vwOt0OtT1GqSzVdGl293jVKtsEhWrKh8BfuwAOADZKoBhOooDK9BW0VNZZWebSJQhMaPdxSlsztqJSlpGY4vp_EdNOcaRBOEkPX018XhxsPO7S4bxJrWlx6EiCigwqVoB1y7LXc_JzvSy1BF5VjaG-Zyw4K7WhlI8s55qYEnF-Ma7A9mZ)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=557c802302ba42f6b2c63da9486ba949&_e=r6AoIVY8oHHUngs4XNDtIG_sxdh-cszc1ykyyywlr0laNJE6oHoNupksqyUBzV5DJWw3bat6OxaSTgylOQ3HDNWZH2ONm2vMBm1WI8aVpVE_xUBZgJIt9CewH1irYP2xW1b780vqZ2PwyW6GHIHn80Jol3PyYfEShbwcFFLKC7bxRTt2a-0OfHjD5vfIbYuB-Gu4UWmgEsN8V46vwOt0OtT1GqSzVdGl293jVKtsEhXtkDrX9ZAXYWrWZQ12lW3K3XGJ9zpPNVN2qN8liIpmzLSPpg0Efqx46I4i5B7PR7uEQpQg_e0XD9yQCwHLImuacKu1nMSPOq1kYy2QtRH-__FLNbbCUVdZ3ILd2E6ADOepmwoeEuApgUGE1mTTLXDq)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=557c802302ba42f6b2c63da9486ba949&_e=r6AoIVY8oHHUngs4XNDtIG_sxdh-cszc1ykyyywlr0laNJE6oHoNupksqyUBzV5DJWw3bat6OxaSTgylOQ3HDNWZH2ONm2vMBm1WI8aVpVE_xUBZgJIt9CewH1irYP2xW1b780vqZ2PwyW6GHIHn80Jol3PyYfEShbwcFFLKC7bxRTt2a-0OfHjD5vfIbYuB-Gu4UWmgEsN8V46vwOt0OtT1GqSzVdGl293jVKtsEhXuacVfF7LnHTDteXsoj_BHEjAYPat6pVadjFZYJN4xmSu-z7f8innvxr8tHzLjtomslv-b_FokOj17RdKvwsb1n4TdIX2ebe9rt62Z1cHrU7LCDbWxociEMnlQut50wrHdoguncDqweohaVf7YKIAB)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=557c802302ba42f6b2c63da9486ba949&_e=r6AoIVY8oHHUngs4XNDtIG_sxdh-cszc1ykyyywlr0laNJE6oHoNupksqyUBzV5DJWw3bat6OxaSTgylOQ3HDNWZH2ONm2vMBm1WI8aVpVE_xUBZgJIt9CewH1irYP2xW1b780vqZ2PwyW6GHIHn80Jol3PyYfEShbwcFFLKC7bxRTt2a-0OfHjD5vfIbYuB-Gu4UWmgEsN8V46vwOt0OtT1GqSzVdGl293jVKtsEhXd4bHPnsiY-VL3IISse1_53YPaTdayEc4oNssazChWxZij9kTKagPPZlsHezU-ZRkhJldd0VhC-sq5TxgIqbo0k3wRPqU9osMeWs-S9Isnz3wEeZi5m8oQlKbNqnD7p5zC1FstY9fn-UdG_WHUrUbu)

| **About the Republican Party of Florida**
* * *
The Republican Party of Florida will promote the principles upon which our nation and our state were founded: freedom, liberty, personal responsibility, and accountability.

We will advocate fiscally-sound, common-sense solutions that will promote job and economic growth, provide the best education to our children, and create a path to prosperity for Florida and America.

Members of the Republican Party of Florida will be united by these principles and will work to elect Floridians with integrity who will work to enact such solutions. We will seek to be the most effective state party in the nation and serve as a model for other party organizations.

# **Indiana Governor Mike Braun Stopped By Terre Haute To Talk Property Tax Reform**

| | [](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/Cr4NUB4KlXip4QxxLFKr7YaQ-L_XiUNN47SJQspBQEwVwsyeJ6H1XTNoWQqFSHdIIl0nwNjyNbQbd3ZCUyDD-icEP-WWa_8wwq5sOYXt9GD-oEfVq9Rui9d47vZKzLbKVrGzH-iwaTBIyXUqw4caYVSMy2MQ-yVBWb2TftCSFQ6kRFBzEuBH0VuZvJPrFXCTVaAfbwFtmMfNVl-wR-Iyo2y3oFaTH8J_Jt5ASrJLooh_ESywaBc_YQ5ulggnYNiFdKYJciLg9twWTryJZPjsLOlmiK3H1SIsy6Bp5V6hayHt5sX1KkktVS0TMFM9l0sM3PckWDOoJEK5aTHRiW_G-p9POqigUPvN7kMeTAWInw0ThmmVILDElBfPCr6dngktGbsJPf-dxVJjRNvXYdzguxJty0T51CJ0ikbVdQHwO9zzNn3h2-sYpZD8w1r3BiE/tEyKVtnGcXQYBwaRkGAfrnU5kJ_lhxEb/5)

WTHI-TV Ben Verbanic February 7, 2025
[https://www.wthitv.com/news/indiana-governor-mike-braun-stopped-by-terre-haute-to-talk-property-tax-reform-here-is/article_20dc7eb8-e586-11ef-9d66-532a607ec07b.html](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/ns-0jTb-4LrNkh1GSl-N6Q5zqHaUwYyBlOTI_7AsCZGdWG9x_gQQ-BdcZ6TT2d-MYI6yFR6uwKgkVrHcd406-XdEOIJF6_3_TZU1VeYf0tXFUXCDFlkojQrKQSC5oHNq9XnZpuhTpVWpp01SbWzTuBXt-PrCBFUxsN039dmrjF97cMfUxZQiKaLRAlQnjtETgd4sddcYM8tbXlEyE82qCzE73kuEHcKyRZSARucRHy3ufywd2x6YdwZ1sFGkWWkS4b6vGIXt9NfQUE4IKbEU2SqvKDF_KNIipGSfWYieHoanfBYiTLlhhzBbKPuNfdtFA5nXrbA3oWqNXxNfhgvjC3XhOQmi6x1aBYG17ScZqbHz1_83-HcZnQ7MUaVtnNsmhUbDyMZklga_UEy1Ct7jr9YcqlGrQsrHgnai0_NUUBr8vl4clL_hKcqtP5kATCk/wP3ISUwNKHxmtc9lafxlK2fV-jxefqYJ/5) [Click Here To Watch The Video](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/NxLHVLc8lc3w55_5b_pFDhAaauvz5mU8CzDBFp73xpJm84c82rjY_mpuH_3eEwG6I9J4M82pGPeVPcc4YEQAfxuEi4F8XDf54sYIwuDmjarza__JigX-oovswc8nmrIuzMptt8qpoZ9A-dt6EKNcFsXqaNyZtrxUaRAG1iTOrvCfTeJ5j1LPjq2ZtKetv7KGV6hwz1Gu4_jgw6hQXo46VOFPlV5xnHOxCtcAiNQtd70Zq4adCbFPPEE2_sYkg9wUei8M33iQYpJ3U21v4JvmuASQp6W_UCFr2Yag7I4ysokUytOYVS4d-WySt8JO5ur2G2Neg6quP9JHUa6V7S6UNtpRTa_-psw2tEbYM8_Vr-4GRHpggXR0sfPCWz_YQrAORkGjOLkuENyLUHoC8bvSfLQ0hnnQQ7kkw7IGGlEO1gW-MWyHgWGPka4uzgZXwGI/ZxB1nX_FXEKBmay6h41aO92sYklgV7Us/5) It is no secret that property taxes are a top issue for Hoosier voters. Since 2021, property taxes in Indiana have skyrocketed alongside inflation. During his campaign, Governor Braun promised aggressive property tax reform, and he is already working on legislation to ease the burden on Hoosier homeowners. Governor Braun says that his administration is committed to public safety, and his administration will be working to ease the burden on communities like Terre Haute that are in a "less favorable" economic position. However, Braun also says that it will be the city's responsibility to trim excess fat. "I want to keep control local. Figure it out, come to the state if you have a really good reason you need help. And I am going to be looking at the places that need it most, and cut the places that seem to be in good shape already" says Braun when asked about making up lost revenue. Another key part of this proposed legislation includes a transparency portal, that will keep homeowners, businesses, and local governments up to speed on all property tax related changes. News Ten asked Governor Braun why transparency is so vital when dealing with a legislative overhaul of this magnitude. Braun says that transparency is important...not just for residents, but for those local governments that will be impacted by the reform. "I'm talking about a cut or setback for the most culpable, cap it going forward at a robust rate of economic growth, and the flood the whole system with transparency. And when I describe it like that, I don't even have schools or local governments against me" says Braun. This bill is still in the early stages at the Indiana Statehouse, and could still be changed before it becomes law. [To Read The Full Article Click Here](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/1BQ89cbMpyS7kGsu_hx33jBBTgHgvsewYLPu1rma4n_-0HAS-rdXFOD4bCcQ_-fw3P5hsxYXBh5YENCdtoduitw-12A3CocsVrUDLnASxc48O9CiDdocVw1wJAQgb0PeDcUqUSkNS8rh48-80D8PebhQT3Opy0mzBePfjJQ89PGr40QOzH-3G6wKVGr4ark6COVyhf9T-UY0DIUw30FZ65zcPYKrPOPYOF2Tl52Vgw02BxtqtqCoRrt_lzm_wf4J1xMtY01eR-YfVt3-T080WBeqnUI61N3BGNy2ZNeDEhG3issAHqZcnJ5nwqaXIt0fdFyaWT552LwrwBlGNGvyOdRKZIX3myhB0UZSNlp1PnH5QCwsQ7fwazrKMHPnUW71eq3D0DwikYAtBZ26kZjS9bdDNts4qRbXZn0Gm7SxowX-T0u2sMAKzZ1Fy9m1nxg/bprQf0NR8ToEcH8-9on3On6YzDyWOYzn/5)

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I won’t leave families and farmers behind
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
So many Kansas families are feeling the squeeze of higher prices at the checkout line

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101888795/527388711/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU0Y2RiZC1kN2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7XmunW-GTLJ_BDQ9tUqLVgr64rqoopOZOZoc0pUbNcw=) We all know that hardworking Kansans are desperate for solutions to the cost of living crisis. So many Kansas families are feeling the squeeze of higher prices at the checkout line, forcing them to drain their savings just to afford everyday essentials. For years, I’ve worked in Congress to lower the cost of groceries, prescription drugs, energy bills, and more. **But the President’s recent executive orders threaten that progress by _raising_ costs on families while benefiting large corporations.** [_**I’ll explain more, but before I go any further: If you believe our government shouldn’t leave families, farmers, and small businesses behind, will you chip in to support my work to lower costs for all Americans, not just the ones at the top?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101888797/527388713/-1118985384?refcode=email_021025_Costs&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU0Y2RiZC1kN2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7XmunW-GTLJ_BDQ9tUqLVgr64rqoopOZOZoc0pUbNcw=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101888800/527388715/-1118985384?refcode=email_021025_Costs&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU0Y2RiZC1kN2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7XmunW-GTLJ_BDQ9tUqLVgr64rqoopOZOZoc0pUbNcw=)
---
Look, President Trump ran on lowering costs for working-class families. But since he’s taken office, he’s done the exact opposite.
He eliminated the $2 cap on generic prescription drugs for seniors on Medicare, forcing Kansans to pay more for life-saving medication.
His allies have openly admitted their plan to slash Social Security and Medicare, two programs that thousands of Kansans rely on to pay the bills. Cutting them would be nothing less than a cruel handout to the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.
President Trump has even announced his intention to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada, two of our country’s largest trading partners. **If Trump goes through with this plan, it would dramatically raise costs for Kansas farmers and families, costing them _thousands of dollars extra_ per year.**
I’ve made it clear that I’ll work with anyone to bring down the cost of living — and yes, that includes President Trump. But right now, Trump is putting partisan politics over the needs of hardworking families, and it needs to end.
[_**Congress needs to pass legislation that will take concrete action toward lowering costs for every American, not just a select few. If you agree, chip in today to help me find common ground and deliver a real solution to this issue for the people of Kansas.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101888804/527388717/-1118985384?refcode=email_021025_Costs&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU0Y2RiZC1kN2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7XmunW-GTLJ_BDQ9tUqLVgr64rqoopOZOZoc0pUbNcw=)

clean_body: So many Kansas families are feeling the squeeze of higher prices at the checkout line = We all know that hardworking Kansans are desperate for solutions to the cost of living crisis. So many Kansas families are feeling the squeeze of higher prices at the checkout line, forcing them to drain their savings just to afford everyday essentials. For years, I’ve worked in Congress to lower the cost of groceries, prescription drugs, energy bills, and more. But the President’s recent executive orders threaten that progress by raising costs on families while benefiting large corporations. = | | = Look, President Trump ran on lowering costs for working-class families. But since he’s taken office, he’s done the exact opposite. He eliminated the $2 cap on generic prescription drugs for seniors on Medicare, forcing Kansans to pay more for life-saving medication. His allies have openly admitted their plan to slash Social Security and Medicare, two programs that thousands of Kansans rely on to pay the bills. Cutting them would be nothing less than a cruel handout to the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families. President Trump has even announced his intention to impose tariffs on Mexico and Canada, two of our country’s largest trading partners. If Trump goes through with this plan, it would dramatically raise costs for Kansas farmers and families, costing them thousands of dollars extra per year. I’ve made it clear that I’ll work with anyone to bring down the cost of living — and yes, that includes President Trump. But right now, Trump is putting partisan politics over the needs of hardworking families, and it needs to end. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, -Sharice | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m a pilot. Gutting NOAA is absolutely nuts.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Every pilot, every airline, every shipping company in the country depends on the weather forecasting data NOAA provides through the National Weather Service with their sensors and satellites.
#

Hey everybody — it's Mark Kelly.
Elon Musk’s underlings are targeting the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration. Current and former NOAA officials have been told to expect a 50% reduction in staff and a 30% reduction in funding.
Again, and I can’t emphasize this enough: Elon Musk has no authority to dictate or impose these cuts. Congress authorizes and appropriates NOAA’s funding, and neither President Trump or Elon Musk have the authority to cut it unilaterally.
But beyond that, I’m a pilot and someone who sailed on a merchant ship across the oceans. Gutting NOAA is absolutely nuts. Every pilot, every airline, every shipping company in the country depends on the weather forecasting data NOAA provides through the National Weather Service with their sensors and satellites. Every American, from Hawaii to Maine, needs that data to prepare for adverse weather conditions like hurricanes and tornadoes. Farmers need it to raise their crops. Ship captains need it to chart their courses.
The dollars Musk and the Trump Administration might save pale in comparison to the collateral damage we would incur by gutting this agency.
I am going to use every lever of power at my disposal as a United States Senator to defend NOAA from Elon Musk and the White House as they try to slash our country’s vital infrastructure to the bone.
But I can’t do it without you.
[**I’m asking you to chip in $3 and help me counter what the Trump Administration and Elon Musk are trying to do. We’ve got to stand against them.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-feb25/.w4QhX4&refcode=em250210-1-f&t=1&akid=5961%2E6688874%2EfwOifk)

| | [](https://substack..LviXXdAUEccS0aqb5XGYFBUuim8ITBpCtN9Del9lcx8?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/katieporteroc/p/call-your-elected-officials?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

One of the questions I most frequently get right now is "how do I do anything to counter Trump??"
There are lots of answers to that question. As a former congressional candidate, I'll always tell you to go knock doors come election time and donate money to campaigns. I also believe that volunteering in your community in non-political ways--whether that's at a food pantry, or at an animal shelter, or in a school--allows you to support those affected by Trump's policies, and engage with people who may not have voted the same way you did.
**But if you want to make your voice loud and clear** _**right now**_**, consider taking a few minutes to call your elected officials.**
In my congressional office, every single call we received was recorded. Many offices produce daily or weekly reports for the elected official showing how many constituents called in on each side of a particular issue.
**Here 's a really helpful link where you can find out who your elected officials are and quickly see the phone number to call them at: [https://www.usa.gov/elected-officials](https://substack.com/redirect/95a8c1d0-8357-43b4-929a-700abd126bcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
When calling your elected official's office, it's helpful to make a hard, specific ask. Do you want them to issue a public statement? Sponsor a bill? Host a town hall? Asking an office to "keep something in mind" is dangerously vague.
Don't feel bad if you only ever talk to staff members. Their job is to report back your opinions and ideas to their bosses.
Many folks don't realize that you can request a meeting with your elected officials, from your state representative all the way to your U.S. Senator, their website should have a tab that says "request a meeting."**Elected officials love a reason to go on a "field trip." If you run a business, non-profit, or organization that your elected leader should visit and learn from, let them know about it**. Whether or not they agree with you politically, this can be a really great opportunity for them to see firsthand what you and other people in your community experience every day.
Whether your representatives are Democrats, Republicans, or a mix of both, you have every right to make your voice heard. Take a few minutes away from the doom-scroll and give them a call!
(Here's that link again: **[https://www.usa.gov/elected-officials](https://substack.com/redirect/95a8c1d0-8357-43b4-929a-700abd126bcc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg))**
--Katie Porter
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22ec3bf7-1cf5-45f2-a6e9-68bce8899088?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
subject: This is what it means to be an EMILYs List member
body:
This is our first membership drive of the new presidential administration, and we have an ambitious goal to hit. |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101890995/527395487/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=) Peter — This is our first membership drive since Trump took office, and we have an ambitious goal to hit: we want to register 25,000 EMILYs List members _in just four days._ I want to see your name on our roster, Peter!

[**Donate on the *first day* of our February Membership Drive to become a part of the team that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women from coast to coast.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101890996/527395488/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=) | [JOIN THE TEAM](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101890997/527395489/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=)
---
Your membership is crucial — it ensures our candidates have the support they need to build winning campaigns this cycle. And over the past 21 days, it has been EMILYs List women leading the charge against the extremism of the Trump administration:
* **Rep. Becca Balint (VT), Rep. Yassamin Ansari (AZ), Rep. Julie Johnson (TX), Rep. LaMonica McIver (NJ), Rep. Jasmine Crockett (TX)** & many others publicly called out Elon Musk outside the Treasury Department after being denied access to the building.

* **State Sen. Sarah Anthony (MI)** reassured Michiganders from the floor of the Lansing Capitol that despite the dysfunction at the White House, local leaders will continue putting people first.

* **State Sen. and candidate for lieutenant governor Ghazala Hashmi (VA)** is on the frontlines protecting Virginia doctors and spearheading the legislation that now shields in-state doctors from prosecution for providing reproductive health care to Americans in need in other states.

The fight against this administration is happening in Congress, on the campaign trail, and in state capitals across the country — and your membership makes it all possible.

[****[**I want to invite you to join our efforts in the year ahead as we help our current pro-choice champions and recruit future candidates who will fight and WIN across the county. Donate today to become an EMILYs List member:**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101890999/527395491/2025016054?refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:_ [DONATE $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101891000/527395492/2025016054?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101891001/527395493/2025016054?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFE215_20250210_FebMembership_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1055689&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZmJhMDc0My1kYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k3ZobVH5JN5kvvrX7HD0wjrswPaXcV3UscIkTCc4Qpw=)

body:
Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority.
Critical reinforcements are needed >>
|

Friend,

Three crucial House seats are headed to special elections, and we need your immediate support to defend our majority. _**These seats are the key to maintaining our America First agenda, and Democrats are already mobilizing to take them from us.**_

| | | [- 2X SPECIAL ELECTION MATCH - ](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=653900a5aef54abfb847f1b46a3c6210&_e=5GMP8WCF-fhm-ML-DoXdZMVxG0-BlzYFrZI-KTr9hP0huuAi5Ra-ihHQdd0O0iajsLDCsd_y3Ysgno4cn5ybBKURTIprd8mLo8Yw0onC-jgyCQOucLRQKs0tBKrxmsBTNtn8AYhui1F7Gd4TRMB7IKob8liroPQCVCvyAtzOOaL-Ne8PNBPcq6k-dpM_poRoOfyjQcbEH7b199F1gx92My9FV7BTVSU1hOAmkzj22Zx4JWm2yzAtO1nj2pFBvlPzw6kjKDGICHiiyWzEOV9eEmODQU0F0EHm6Kt3e3a_hITAx9fORO69ySRItKbzvfCnz5jZmNXnr9J7x_PVzw23bUUjU_1q6fIjFIl5sE1m25CAtOz7m4Wy22cyhHsVta7WAR18X5oRDlXnSfbmxgCQLg%3D%3D "Generic Button")

_Active for 30 minutes_

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: Join the fight against Critical Race Theory
body:
Now, CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/QAxjsBl3k1zsw6GKDIckBwqXvUkq1jx2FN2Zu2mxgO2mXPmlwIBZ64qFyX1_Lx6igz8Y-oojtJPVhSDmBqhh-XO_kJlzkMF5wxvNxiCYhA5Sk8gfml9-316ODTkxn1QF9EJOOrwPpyhJkZmb22scEbzKhlPSoOJYGO48X0OZtlXc7z_i69_rumxYh1uU9zRoain83ZpZv3dhbMUOL_Zy3Qb8kyIKcmSGdpJz6CKCqQjyr7RPlCF5Ey5wMqmpxSm76JM_QZNO0OnOxe-Kp0W43evm3Hjokj1CiNP8BuMApis6_dJDm1XSbLGDSpQsBKuUf_kkqgPyJKcoXYsOfQs9qUiZbcRqxGYhh02soe5OT2UEjaKQqqcGy_b_JlXy60qLBKBz4dJwV_fTE3WS_rwnjZmoVJgzpYqwCJbSnSIeqJYGa9HVQgbUuw/pEdtVXnI-lz976vxwzIg6OyNpRa5n4-Y/5)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

[**Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT).**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/DcyVrzHiSIhlNjpSCMgVjVuw78UXIj6HnHuOP_lHbpFvVERj1E4G5QKfNKORSRbO93FzbNeyRmd9bejYRH3CjDbgDeTQKLx2JFJScCm55NX-6tLPXQW_z9SPSjhIZVHFgzu42BBNREwopW8xMHSf44ytsz3FwD0vQWs_WK4T5qGbQxeIdvSFERvWgW3JevISQMEI989eNCO0PU9dkW0zG2h9Y0izGxOfpxYvscDgKwNE0egyHe72ngI7XoV0MhSJdeoYHVEqltUx7lfzWRFWAXDrO7uc2uslSeE4i1hemYfcandXSOl91KGJGbTk09IpYJfeShwlmLgEMd2hz12XkdfCOHnq4aU-skFhwsE1Xy3j-wV10HFJv1GgT8mZ2Bk4A4ki1Dd7XanEKQyr3PiSExjD-Pg6ogG6MdgAe43hvVAN7dokX2rEdQ/kAvr-5xrpuHUEhc3rp8CPAE6BRfnv8cM/5)

I'm reaching out because you're an informed patriot who cares about this country. The situation is urgent, and your response will only take a few moments.

CRT has been around for decades.

Feminist academics used to make arguments about "unpacking their invisible knapsacks of privilege." However, at the time, CRT was rejected for being "just _another_ crazy fringe academic theory."

**Today, the situation is much different ...and much worse.**

_Now_ , CRT infiltrates our schools and workplaces. It's not so laughable for you to have to sit in a meeting or seminar that explains to you your "invisible knapsack of privilege."

To speak up often means you can lose your job, or worse...

What's frightening for the direction of this country is that federal agencies have labeled some parents who oppose CRT as "domestic terrorists."

**This should NOT be happening in America.**

Hillsdale College--where I work--teaches the principles of liberty and justice that our country was founded on. And we're fighting to defend them on the battlefield of education.

**But we need YOUR help to defend our constitutional principles against CRT.** Sharing your opinion with us is one important way you can take action.

**Complete your National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory now:[https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/z1PTd6q0eRB8M6mmeRPqM6Tnl02AFRqyfxVrsnNM5YDew9lcEmTeAW51uP2Pzf2T-HIXpMAf7RRub36zhYLXu3AKSDFc-T3oeu_7XcWw1oMcRC8zd6a5MhoQSb0LAqtPdFaNTql4O5UPUnoQvw6YlKlLeFtcfCE-H3jqi_f1T_IU00OKla6Gu5hnq3Se8d1lEj4HNHDNQoRSAuTnX2R2LSQ_mFWMcIm78MtDxq_rhH7SLDk3a7NflH0hiVyRF9pjAA_zQqDTAzTfiWYoQSVPO93zbxpvFvlsfx7nb8OZHOxhMqm70PW1h8pvtN8Yg4DB-v4nLccCGOHzyoOx2exsWZG4hWhxxaQB7xkwjjyBlZNNmVH5fuUbh7H8o3Dx0Bb-5FRHMhUapwXPYon9srL_2b9glxq4eXRp5Td0y7pXhWSZfFLhU2IV9w/cnX3mO66KJ1UULGa_fyf4OzQ0NLkPMTV/5)**

When you participate in our survey, you will help us gather the information needed to address CRT's threats to our liberty and find solutions that restore our constitutional principles.

When you finish taking your survey, please consider giving a generous gift.

Our NATIONAL EDUCATION CAMPAIGN--which includes _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and K-12 curriculum and school network--educates millions of citizens about our Constitution and founding principles.

We need your help expanding these initiatives. And because we do not take a single penny of taxpayer funding, even indirectly through federal and state student grants loans--all of our work is funded by informed patriots like you.

Thank you for joining us in our mission on behalf of liberty.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. Your participation and support are essential in our fight against CRT. Please complete the survey and consider a generous gift to help us continue our educational mission at this secure link:

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/9Q4FvsLtwGqSCoiMLn6egZRVvlYGsjRNJlZKvyRG9y170RTuwSyZkjnz0qAfSNFAtLHfLILmQuufDbWnbad843ciJAywM0hvgQi16h5QRH769S442sGk5u34u8V95chmw2QpbrAoCARFzcSOa7WlckxqQMUmT32Zob8HbZlqbrgTqxoQsiF7Bl9hLXn1Yd8WMfTBQYChtXaYSOE_NA7uLUWh9OiuVWAUY-SETKNHlMC_Mw4rmI1P-dftTYd8_YHuhfwUbhy8Ykq5SWtBdwKRIfiqx56jO9XcOUcqBt24rY4sO9PmldSTdulSi0H7xQTqITcArxvFq5ZH2ccpREmz_UG-RmXkjOnsEFyK5Oa1Oytrepaf1ZwkSnDKvk6nE9X3hHe98h9sn8eENRVZwMn7bVPwB4CVqHGMjOvj0jjH-uKVY8GdG-KsWg/w1FrN4Fws47-ogqCXfEHot7iJ6jx6b9O/5)
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/u/psH4Mi6Vep4bERQll-7ur604m7RFJs9_9M9n_NINpifRDIK1PclrWGa9gbGZXusxFKeb6BiaUWt6WPgp95AFKYshbgZCzEynDDb6o4OcQjVcQmfTRUm0EOsl59yz5cOC7gsrhe6eSQ8iz6IsHDxrMQ_LvzpQaL8TptMAqROy4SgxPsfkrcsp0pBAeDtH69VDiq_7f-V60kpLGQOwggV5NrOvtMxAWj_pqw/T1opddviFLVNpQ-rXuXyXBVoBOXg6OWQ/5)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/fzebe90F13fdmsXpaOk1_DilbFbe7PhtR75UofFiTwkkwDut-sb7_3bLXnOcT51uK_Hq-I-w28RzT8Np1CgtwaWJwK128v93aCI3AV80gnYTIGVJOXtqk9H5wqOrBpF5cEoNjbhm_CS90cvz51ZnUofWj9dpGcVGWfjPeH3jOP4hJXBGR6O6Z0nx2KnbKyhCzejFXmEmnKs3_-ffik0PhcyfE-ffbNZXF5bonDjheeMG1JsgBdMXU01_ohWki3PWPwLlcBTnTR0VB_spQESGzvbn_7snHWz39nR3tZSw0mfM1XbyH1qVViMN57YZBEeHQWsDtlJBj0wp71HmWaAJSp2kgK30/uTbWdMmI-RV6tVinkZebkurObC-VOcp5/5)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/fCIl1y6tJhu6Xsttxse69LZ-IFQphJYewNLJ20aT1yszFOkRzo48N9ETCGv6tNp0g-jUEkxEI8fCQukKptGjzUvf0GuecbaZCIKIz8rbohM1YR9q-yq1aTh8NL0cGkkNLHX1lSmw2Dwxr7mi9mNrXya3Szl3DxjNZ5CSbGxWryqU3f8vgeNZOh9UPbRoDnrOSQvhlV5IGnhgmHc7wk4TV40HGN2nYyfMJhEO9YC-U4emx_UrgmqT2aiF2b9vbUdwbKjt1dQGsMDbL8Q1OONF2Zu7ohLHVyVXOvXv/zubz-53rMbIpKLrtjbfl4K7baX_bE9GE/5)_

subject: RFK 🥴

body:
The aging politicians in DC must be replaced with a new generation.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250210-1&t=1&akid=1719%2E587540%2ERigowY)
Peter,
The Senate is on track to confirm Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as our top health official.
RFK is a well-documented conspiracy theorist and vaccine skeptic who does not belong anywhere near our government, let alone at the Department of Health.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250210-1?refcode=em20250210-1719&amount=5&refcode2=1719_587540_RigowY&akid=1719%2E587540%2ERigowY)
The fact that the MAGA GOP wants to put our nation’s health in this man’s hands should tell us everything we need to know. The aging politicians in Washington are putting us all in danger. **They must be replaced with the next generation.**
Leaders We Deserve exists to elect young progressive leaders like Sarah McBride, Oscar De Los Santos, Molly Cook, and Bryce Berry – all candidates we elected last year who are now fighting on the frontlines in Congress and state legislatures.
Our candidates represent a bold new vision for the Democratic Party and the future of our country. **But we can’t keep electing them without your support.**
**[Can you contribute $5 or anything you can to power this work right now? No donation is too small, Peter. Every dollar makes a real impact in the fight.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250210-1?refcode=em20250210-1719&amount=5&refcode2=1719_587540_RigowY&akid=1719%2E587540%2ERigowY)**

Leaders We Deserve
