With the GOP holding only a slim majority in the House, flipping this seat would send a clear message: MAGA extremism isn’t what America stands for. But here’s the truth: winning this race will be an uphill battle. The GOP is already pouring resources into keeping this seat under their control. That’s why I’m asking for your help today. = = This is our chance to bring new leadership to Northwest Florida and send a message loud and clear: Congress is no place for chaos. It’s time to focus on solutions, not scandals. Whether it’s $10, $100, or whatever you can afford, every single donation gets us closer to victory on April 1st. And trust me, the only April Fools we’ll celebrate are the MAGA extremists who underestimate us. = Thank you for believing in this campaign. Together, we’re going to build something amazing – and it starts with you. Let’s get to work. With hope, Gay Valimont Democrat for Florida’s 1st Congressional District = [content goes here] Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress Contributions to Seth Moulton For Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. An individual or federal PAC may contribute up to $3,300 per election; $6,600 per cycle. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal government contractors, and foreign nationals (non-citizens without “green cards”) are prohibited. Federal law requires our best efforts to obtain and report the name, address,occupation, and employer of individual contributors.

As if the world’s richest man dropping $250 million to influence our elections wasn’t bad enough, now Elon Musk is unraveling critical government programs and agencies.
This is serious stuff, Peter.
_USAID has already been unlawfully shuttered, we’re on the brink of a trade war with our allies, and even Medicaid looks like it’s on the chopping block._
**_Now the GOP is saying that the Department of Education is next._**
Whether it’s Donald Trump or Elon Musk calling the shots, the end result is the rich get richer, and millions of families could suffer.
**Elon even recently tweeted out a list of people he wants to push out of Congress, targeting me by name because he knows I won’t give him a free pass.**
**[Elon Musk shouldn’t have a position in government, let alone this much power. Will you sign our petition DEMANDING Musk be removed from the government?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101899010/527425406/1942135118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdhZjlmZS1mMWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-osFs5Ff73vI1DJ64o16bea1LHFLyhNYJwcly4bmvyw=&emci=ad6fc63d-c4e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=117af9fe-f1e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=19018609)**

subject: It all starts right now

body:
If conservatives lose the Senate, the Left will ram through their Big Government tax-and-spend agenda

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbm959l2rqvtlm26ocluhsucgpm6cpubq2dhidp0_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9j69oj4cph2bs)

Friend – Democrats are gearing up for an all-out fight to take back the Senate in 2026. They’re already recruiting radical candidates and setting their sights on battleground states. If conservatives lose the Senate, the Left will ram through their Big Government tax-and-spend agenda, undoing _everything_ we’ve fought for. _We cannot let that happen._ **That’s why Club for Growth Action is already preparing to go on the offense.** We’re building the war chest right now to ensure we keep a pro-growth, pro-freedom majority in the Senate. But we need your help. **[Will you chip in to help us fight back?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn3fp0dvplet06057u4fajhivv1nr2buknoh2rbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj4s9j69oj4cph2bs)**

_Via Democracy Now_ Democrats are fighting for the hard-working civil servants and government employees who are being targeted by the GOP’s assault on our democracy. [**Will you add your name right now to stand in support of workers’ rights?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101899280/527426162/1021062942?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEyZDczNGYtZjJlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h713ipiEQ3pppa07Z1ybqzMJOK4-kXZCOGfKt4tRLN8=&emci=31834e48-f2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d12d734f-f2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9307116) | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101899281/527426163/1021062942?refcode=AU_AZD_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDEyZDczNGYtZjJlNy1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=h713ipiEQ3pppa07Z1ybqzMJOK4-kXZCOGfKt4tRLN8=&emci=31834e48-f2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=d12d734f-f2e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=9307116)

Team, the strength and solidarity of labor couldn’t be more important than it is right now.
The GOP is working diligently to gut critical government agencies to give tax breaks and handouts to their wealthy, unelected, billionaire buddies.
Meanwhile, Arizona Democrats like Representative Yassamin Ansari, Governor Katie Hobbs, and our coalition in the state legislature are working alongside community organizations in every county to pass policies that will actually benefit working families. That means supporting pro-union legislation, pushing for an increase to the minimum wage, and protecting Arizona’s workers from extreme heat.

name: Team Sarah
subject: 💪🏻 Week in Review: America is Back & Arkansas Is All In
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Governor |
body:
| | |
---
| | Peter, welcome back to Team Sarah's week in review! A strong Arkansas means a stronger America, and this week, Governor Sanders stepped up to support President Trump as he leads America’s comeback! Check out how the Governor and Arkansas are helping build a stronger America:
---
|
---
| | **🇺🇲 AMERICA IS BACK, AND ARKANSAS IS ALL IN:** Governor Sanders: We're just getting started
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/la_7JHiIBDkMs79CiDFlyo26hGRQKOw-lxbVYOlkG7fYmMzTZQ9kCrEeMG4Q-1l7c26ydR0kthKjJSmGwy2LxWms13HgbWN298B_GtHIFGSS-tU_Hf2MOHSLXr0bqQqDb7LI6r-RTBOdGnZuz4g_HJm6bFDrUnjypwZDbBdtXVsB7l1NG0z0Tbm2LX2yRQc_3bcXeRnf8TvZSf_In4IJzC8v-M-33NfdQQ1fEp1epiAJy3dp-MTyeI9CjhAtKOpqbKO0DAGRqeHcsNg_LKa3GVqt2GCcNnW5g63he2vNiEtuirJsYcg/LZo1ALtm2dVPnnIGV5JQtz-Rwat2oQD_/5)
---
|
---
▶️ **"I WILL ALWAYS BET ON PRESIDENT TRUMP":** Governor Sanders talks with Fox News about President Trump leading from a position of strength
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/MMlmW27kDQnrvXzgB6gyR7fXHVb6u1ziwKFNTa3s7iZHhO1FPhIiz5kQiB-E5tu-I7n1Zj0SO5HHOEjpLZUHFHe8u41eHguGzP2hjsa9GT5_TGRvB6fkFWJrrv451svzj3JqLl5EUU2W1d-48bz13Otn8GUFzS56vo2lCSDyTURvs7aeFjYT3b_wEzUbLIVMRxGpaeJWVf9tGz2tcK_KMTw2wGseB6YkKtkTFPq5LUJHNFnAtn6S7yFUry9fM8aAW50XGv6mkQhfSh7ktWcT6uVT0Sioig/wy8uVBM-P8E4YdbWAPjPSw20T-RWgjXb/5)
---
Americans are sick of getting ripped off. Watch Sarah talk about how President Trump is unleashing American energy, securing our border, and renegotiating international agreements to put Americans first.
---
[**WATCH SARAH’S INTERVIEW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/Q9dk1Z16JoX8UauPZL9pVD9EodYu3cD_kNOqJRNnrFe4Y-0iRR-r5_ZnbV5eX-MIDn8v70ABKLoolE-yf5BMKbQrtB-dg3wz5phmyO6YqV2GjzSLCXSQmqwmxOUMZlzLXs4gr9Qg_bOI_aDM3KaJgLECZAVNn57Jx7AmYrO0jCpmxaQyZCgiHB90UZ_Q5lHN--sGoJK81EYT3uOPAjFHPavrKI2yioSn3zbo2AzupYklcqbdpVs_8uOyK7iC6pAiqoQI1C9Xu9zKJMl9QRL0am85f7kVtg/ntkoAOdC3_3Go_br8UAIFQcAE7_OxeVp/5)
---
|
---
🏥 **HEALTHY MOMS, HEALTHY BABIES ACT:** Governor Sanders announced the Healthy Moms, Healthy Babies Act to improve maternal health in Arkansas
---
[](http://links.shsforgov.com/s/c/hUtxVTAFLSKhaoIuooip1gD2ba5r12iXK66PpCRS2XH8EuQHwF_eAFzphKTxKJ9Br2VGq-GLvkWtgDMpr5bK9yT9rXpOpVDxsaSX45hoy0TIIVULg--bu9S-aDmkvDTYnTWPNJJ2KAeeUCInxhv1AiQiIEg2kTsn6P9DfYpdYyDexO0sQ23Ctc0YSyjxxDBwFmZhKRi6YMSxw7jLgvhZu9ZPcP3M3lrHivOsGmMVPY3ja9VN0647lWbmWe3PiXkjvzswGhkOcz8hhh6KeYFwXQWFKETZe3vK4pjW31Y1OzYEY47djmFGnK7aNHAElMUwNItasIsoRak2KRbSDxwFyfq2QWi3bGQ2Xc9TooHI/V4e1lMOynAaesjIfP_Lm3omUTgXwFXIN/5)

_“I’m a mom, so I know how important maternal healthcare is to helping healthy moms have healthy babies, which is why my administration has been focused on building a comprehensive, coordinated approach to maternal health in Arkansas,”_ **\- Governor Sanders** Sarah’s plan will invest $45.3 million annually in maternal health to make real, lasting changes to Arkansas’ maternal health landscape. This is what keeps us safe.| | | Friend, **Attorney General Jason Miyares has done so much for the Commonwealth of Virginia that we can’t fit it all in one email...**

_**So we’re going to send you a whole series!**_ Let’s start with some of the ways Jason has fought to keep the people and institutions of our Commonwealth safe. Safety is more than just fighting crime, friend. Here’s what we mean: **1.**[**Jason Miyares stood up for our national security by joining a coalition that argued for the removal of student visa holders who provide support to terror groups.**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/L2ZxxIGppxU0Vi00UKZINhKi4qAmu2q85GSMkDwCdhULpawg1O5OX4ZTB--rGekg-C9yAFyBbxHb3nshfKbRkSEfCk0ld61qdWrKaeyUDyfKp6gA2O9aR01WynnpXZruKv7XS_weZSjiotk6K4VlJ5P47dZN1I_jcIhCz4Xpz5EjCb7h3hhEGy1P7xCUH5gq6JsRJQ6r3eXgJ2Q8chpHXIL5B85Ke2GlKg7anBbIGLguIkgVJkUCA7G_CK7l9fYnFXrHmk41VoT0siFBY6N5UpC4mKe5dahMS7cRwxAZWdV-N-EjbOjJE1rVw-AS68RV-Xj8c39JAx9SQ5z1ZQHrHFqanH-6FcHujb3sKS3asWPM1mKzZsTOkCDF9JDTqzEiyyT1GIUavbUB1py4CvLEXGpWbCZ67ou2q0uwLB3Br_lvklOWgRE4Y8N6WihOXpKDyWCFtUsDMfqzy6VfggBF_P0ldbrQoE4n4oq24D2r186gs1F4V8OwC3FI/7LtJEIAJNKF1vQ8gwYUo684aBEi-TYEd/5) _“Foreign student visa holders endorsing or supporting terrorist organizations do not deserve the privilege and opportunity provided to them.” —_ AG Miyares **2.[Jason Miyares stood up for our elections by appealing to the Supreme Court—and winning—when a Colorado judge attempted to remove President Trump from the ballot.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/Sp4vBrmCh-M1Gu62apC47BBFYfnvdugguObHcJx3V0dv_CXV0iN_3VUikKw2H9WjnGUx1GWzm88cTtpXkFFY6mL89U7LBMNnyHYubf4c8dKCzAdT04SQVG0ZSceZOGFyBO2Pxu5TaBq6zc5dV9WDXYaS4NvoKlZSSI2W8OqCjAAGPhYSwxWb0rJyJlhTH0pgLrxOpS0eI_pAUsFlVEKN-zv774FqkXqXKIZC3Z_TItQsWPpg1XGmqbMNJici6Egpm0PajwyY8Sy42huUsFwuD5YegRFEco5kQFfO2HcoU3yFflnvqN6B5e0E_0ld-gKU7psFWGfRRWVhpJYbqwR7RSKDqkFllahonbEHd94hBAs5k2PUMRZ2A2kb0tGHDn6fUO_sSL3pExeFJBks8zdm5OhjDRedrjKkgoBL4shCBt3PxaMc8ucNwo_Osf-q34z2i50sfg-XMmQ/cW5YKmQXyV3zTVaSm60ZYuSFsmipjiXp/5)** _“In the United States, voters must maintain the power to choose their president. Removing your political opponent from the ballot is not ‘democracy’.”_ — AG Miyares **3.[And Jason Miyares stood up for our most vulnerable Virginians by kicking off the “It Only Takes One” initiative to fight fentanyl with First Lady Suzanne Youngkin.](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/7a2adbWqIt-XFaS2ZQyiEcLVzmS4cv_P-jcOLaHJQNQmwBuXDu277dST1n4pbK48G7tFVjGnSmyHmOEGKQPxCfrqWJDg4EEJk2pVp5AtA0rVByaw05_RMcpU2DBfgizaFkXUDTiJl_dZoradzeAwXtiQdAxZtepcr2JdrJGJm7UMyxWq8Tp-1RGO6zCFbQ-rhSmd98McODVRm8faKwhnbnWoFLqcp4oNp6UR7dmCmIdG4Q4-JgWsKgcenCWPp4q_7YRnZgkONzDiGOsPljH3ECBO-KEwKc8eobW4MEgD23cWaw/aJbfIisTbMIctC4xqAXCO7vlA05BmrY5/5)** _"By increasing awareness, we can help prevent future tragedies." — AG Miyares_ And that’s just the beginning. Stay tuned — we’ve got more highlights to share with you. And thank you for being a part of our team, friend.

**\- Team Miyares**

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=88bf8d56d9724fde831d1dc3f3d05c30&_e=W_gA7UxewB2MftsM5MzQSXAvlfVjmrb3Ja34OxOF0wLX56NAdgl0p8sMeo60a4fML0_52QFT0NkLvfiL9uOI8MiQyWHe2Py14SXh8HkBcGaUv48_HMAqxdWf1wjHEcNQv7uqg0UsCwCsEywf59soWXSgKXoLY_X7cXXmtqIOkMjqklithW0KiIDfxXNoNThS5h0OA7Pus0xznl0YOa0kfY7SDf6OCBg66gUOLrX8AR5PQDDbG3uFvKQSIfqnuBQUo-EbGLGy3svS8rG25w_4Q-UVqoIquQerF4qtp1-zi_PzWyaYZz36oRyNYmbWVsMXg5ZKz6bHWssJD-N481ejCg%3D%3D)

name: Team McBride
subject: The Labor Department is next
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Sarah earned the endorsement of all of Delaware’s local unions in 2024, and she’s fought for working people her entire career.
#
Trump’s “Department of Government Efficiency” (aka DOGE) spent the past week gutting USAID and rooting around at the Treasury, and now they have their eyes on the Labor Department next:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250210-1?refcode=em20250210-1745&amount=5&refcode2=1745_21716_gLV9nV&akid=1745%2E21716%2EgLV9nV)
**DOGE’s goal is clear: They’re trying to pick workers’ pockets so they can enrich the unelected billionaires running Trump’s government.**
Sarah earned the endorsement of **_all_ of Delaware’s local unions** in 2024, and she’s fought for working people her entire career. She’s not going to sit back and watch as DOGE decimates the federal government and sells it for parts.
She’s committed to holding the unelected billionaires surrounding Trump accountable and ensuring every worker gets a **living wage, basic protections, good benefits,** and the support necessary to thrive.
[**But Sarah needs you with her in this fight. Can you pitch in $5 or any amount right now to help Sarah keep standing up for workers in Delaware and across the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250210-1?refcode=em20250210-1745&amount=5&refcode2=1745_21716_gLV9nV&akid=1745%2E21716%2EgLV9nV)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250210-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250210-1745&refcode2=1745_21716_gLV9nV&akid=1745%2E21716%2EgLV9nV)**
In solidarity,
Team McBride

clean_body: | | | We can now reveal our second Impeach Trump Now billboard design, slated to go up in Queens, New York - where Donald Trump grew up. Friend, support for our ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard and advertising campaign is POURING in. Our first ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard in Pittsburgh, PA is already in production, and should be posted by the end of next week. Now, donors like you have funded a second ImpeachTrumpNow.com billboard in Queens - the New York City borough where Donald Trump grew up before his lifelong crime spree. The more we raise, the more billboard designs and locations we’ll be able to reveal! Democratic Rep. Al Green has already promised to re-introduce impeachment of Donald Trump into Congress. Thousands of supporters like you have already used our letters-to-congress tool at ImpeachTrumpNow.com to register your support. Let’s keep up the pressure on Congress so we can see this headline again.... ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. body:
BREAKING: Trump administration orders purge of some online health data. What will that mean in WA? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101899965/527428211/120040556?refcode=em25_250210_dapurg_fndd_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250210_dapurg_fndd_gq_act___DrKS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e9cdd9eb-f5e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOWNkZDllYi1mNWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6GRdtqWk4vU8XXGjfg71iD5cSG8irUwmsYcKgqe2hD4=)
**BREAKING: Trump administration orders purge of some online health data. What will that mean in WA?**

_A message at the top of the CDC’s main page says, “CDC’s website is being modified to comply with President Trump’s Executive Orders.”_ Peter – Trump is launching an all out attack on our public health, ordering purges of vital public health data right here in Washington.

The Washington State Department of Health is scrambling to save what they can, but this data should never have been at risk in the first place. **Public health data helps track disease outbreaks, inform policies, and keep our communities safe.**

Deleting it puts Washingtonians at risk – _plain and simple._

As a woman doctor in Congress, Kim has always fought tooth and nail to protect public health, and will always work to ensure these reckless decisions don’t endanger Washington families. But doing this work takes resources, Peter.

[**Will you chip in $5, $10, or anything you can today to help Kim fight back and keep our communities safe? clean_body: BREAKING: Trump administration orders purge of some online health data. What will that mean in WA? = BREAKING: Trump administration orders purge of some online health data. What will that mean in WA? A message at the top of the CDC’s main page says, “CDC’s website is being modified to comply with President Trump’s Executive Orders.” Peter – Trump is launching an all out attack on our public health, ordering purges of vital public health data right here in Washington. The Washington State Department of Health is scrambling to save what they can, but this data should never have been at risk in the first place. Public health data helps track disease outbreaks, inform policies, and keep our communities safe. Deleting it puts Washingtonians at risk – plain and simple. As a woman doctor in Congress, Kim has always fought tooth and nail to protect public health, and will always work to ensure these reckless decisions don’t endanger Washington families. But doing this work takes resources, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, DrKimSchrier.com Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. subject: maybe you’ll listen now

body:
Tim Walz, Jamie Raskin, Pete Buttigieg...and you? | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?t=1&akid=22849%2E4449941%2EqlxwWR) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?t=2&akid=22849%2E4449941%2EqlxwWR) **TIM WALZ TOLD YOU** the Electoral College “needs to go”!

**PETE BUTTIGIEG TOLD YOU** “America would be better off if we got rid of the Electoral College.”

**But you STILL haven’t signed our emergency petition to abolish the Electoral College?!**

_We have just 19 hours to meet our 20,000 signatures goal_ – you’re the LAST Democrat in your area who hasn’t signed!**Maybe you’ll listen to Jamie Raskin:** | [**Don’t let Trump coast his way into another undemocratic win! Add your name to demand we abolish the Electoral College »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Raskin-EC-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=3&akid=22849%2E4449941%2EqlxwWR) | [ THIS IS YOUR LAST CHANCE: ADD YOUR NAME TO OUR ABOLISH THE ELECTORAL COLLEGE PETITION BEFORE MIDNIGHT »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/pet-raskin-ec?source=LOC_EM_PET_2025.02.10_Raskin-EC-M_B2_F1_S1_C1_main_RS&t=4&akid=22849%2E4449941%2EqlxwWR)

# [CFPB Is Suspended & We Are All at Risk](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156864386&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODY0Mzg2LCJpYXQiOjE3MzkyMjMwNzMsImV4cCI6MTc0MTgxNTA3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.g-QGLvqpP1SbkhFgdvppz8R6snRzg2pkSzpACe0_rdU)
### What shutting down the CFPB means for working Americans and the billionaire class
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Feb 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=156864386&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2ODY0Mzg2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczOTIyMzA3MywiZXhwIjoxNzQxODE1MDczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KVXjA-6f3-EEevs8I6tQgd0QUiU_oDaDlWPtXYgKpxA&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

A quick story to start. Before jumping full time into human rights law, my first job out of law school was at a major bank. My team worked to ensure it complied with Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) mandates. The bank had just been fined $210 million for unethical collection practices. That led to a job opening via formation of a new legal compliance and litigation team, and thus I was hired. My team was tasked with ensuring that the entire operation--spanning a multi-billion dollar portfolio--was brought into compliance. I think about those days, nearly 15 years ago, as I now watch Trump gutting the CFPB. What does it mean for you, the ordinary American working trying to make a living, and how will it affect your day to day? **Let 's Address This.**
**Earnest Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join 114,000+ fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..52k9FKG8svQp8i6WGktgeJtX13z2WPLVpF4VHvwNuRk?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=156864386)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0825ab59-a3e7-40c6-a3b0-38894b79bbeb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Why Was the CFPB ‪Even Formed?**
The CFPB exists because of the devastating 2008 financial crisis--a crisis caused by unchecked corporate greed and lack of oversight. The CFPB was designed to prevent the next crisis by holding financial institutions accountable. Now, Trump and his billionaire donors are tearing it apart, removing one of the most significant checks on corporate financial abuse. The CFPB was first and foremost about protecting consumers and ensuring that every law firm and vendor the bank worked with also followed ethical and legal guidelines.
With that mandate, at my bank we built a compliance framework from the ground up, forcing the bank to fundamentally restructure its entire infrastructure with consumer interest at the forefront. It was a grueling, painstaking process--and to be clear--it was not altruism. The bank did not act on its own--it acted because the CFPB forced it to act.
And the result? Within 30 months the bank became the gold standard of compliance, earning praise on the House floor as an example other financial institutions should follow. And other institutions did follow. The CFPB's oversight didn't just clean up one bank--it forced an industry-wide shift, ensuring that billions in unethical fees and charges were either returned to consumers or never extracted from them in the first place. Were we perfect? Of course not, but with knowledge that the CFPB was watching, we were that much motivated to ensure future policy didn't cut corners and harm customers.
## **What Has The CFPB Done For Us Anyway?**
Claims that the CFPB is inefficient are claims founded in myth, not fact. Since the CFPB was formed, it has protected hundreds of millions of Americans by eliminating billions in exploitative bank charges. The numbers speak for themselves:1
> * **$17.5 billion** - The amount of money the CFPB has put back in Americans' pockets in the form of monetary compensation, principal reductions, canceled debts, and other consumer relief resulting from CFPB enforcement and supervision work
> * **$4** **billion** - The amount of money CFPB has imposed in civil money penalties on companies and individuals that violate the law. This money is deposited into the [victims relief fund](https://substack.com/redirect/7453251b-b023-4bb5-9df4-1189cd44b6d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) which provides compensation to people who have been harmed by violations of federal consumer financial protection law
> * **200 million** - The estimated number of consumer accounts eligible to receive financial relief from the CFPB's enforcement and supervision work
> * **$175 million** - The amount of monetary relief resulting from 39 public enforcement actions that involved harm to servicemembers and veterans
> * **50.1 million** - The number of users who have accessed answers to hundreds of common financial questions via the CFPB's [Ask CFPB](https://substack.com/redirect/ba0a9614-bd98-4f61-909f-f5418176efdd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) database
> * **4 million** - The number of consumer complaints the CFPB has sent to companies for response on behalf of consumers. Our public Consumer Complaint Database has published over 3.8 million of those
> * **3,000** - The average number of complaints the CFPB handles each day
> * **180** - The number of languages that consumers can use to file a complaint
>

And meanwhile, banks still made record profits, proving yet again that the CFPB didn't stifle business, it protected consumers. Yet, even with those reforms in place, consumers still paid more than $5.8 billion in overdraft and NSF fees in 2023 alone. That tells you how much work remains to be done. And now, Trump is working to dismantle the very agency responsible for these protections.
## **Trump 's War on Consumers: Dismantling the CFPB**
Over the weekend, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was effectively dismantled. All of its activities were suspended, its funding was cut, and its headquarters were temporarily closed. Acting director Russell Vought issued an immediate order to shut down all enforcement and oversight, writing in a letter to:
> "Cease all supervision and examination activity. Cease all stakeholder engagement. Pause all pending investigations."
This is a disaster for working people and a massive gift to billion-dollar banks and predatory lenders. Even worse, Vought ordered that the CFPB's internal systems be opened to staffers from Trump's newly created fraud scheme, the so-called "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE)--a move that has left employees scrambling to protect sensitive consumer data. This is the same DOGE that was revealed to be employing a white supremacist who decries "race mixing," (who has since been rehired at DOGE) as well as a staffer previously fired for leaking company secrets.2 These are the people Trump is handing our private financial data over to.
## **Why This Matters: A Return to Outright Fraud?**
Let's go back to the $210 million fine my former employer paid. That fine wasn't just about punishing the bank. It was about ensuring that every single vendor the bank worked with--debt collectors, law firms, financial servicers--was also held accountable. The excuse of "_We did our best, but we can 't control our third-party vendors_" was no longer an option. The CFPB removed that loophole, making it clear that outsourcing corruption was still corruption.
With the CFPB now in shambles, that safeguard is gone. Banks and corporations will once again be free to exploit consumers with little fear of consequence--as will their vendors who often provide the direct customer interaction each of us experience daily.
## **The Fight Back: Unions and Legal Challenges**
The good news? Labor Unions are stepping up, as they always do. The National Treasury Employees Union, which represents CFPB employees, has already filed two lawsuits to stop Trump's destruction of the agency. NBC3 reports:
> One lawsuit seeks to block the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) from accessing CFPB employee data. The other demands a judge rule that Vought's orders to halt CFPB enforcement are illegal.
This is why we need unions. This is why we need regulatory agencies. And this is why we need every American--left, right, and center--to wake up and see what's happening. If you're a working-class American--Republican, Democrat, or Independent--this affects you.
* Do you have a bank account? Your fees are about to skyrocket.
* Do you have a mortgage, student loan, or auto loan? Expect fewer protections and more hidden charges.
* Do you use a credit card? Late fees and interest rates will climb without oversight.

This is not a partisan issue. This is class warfare, waged by Trump and his billionaire donors against the working people of this country. It is critical we stand united against this exploitation, because red or blue, we're all financially screwed if we allow this corruption to ensue.
## **What You Can Do**
✅ [Call your elected officials](https://substack.com/redirect/980df479-f8ad-42dd-9849-fefd2424267e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--demand they support legal action against Trump's attack on the CFPB.
✅ Support consumer advocacy groups--organizations like Public Citizen and the National Consumer Law Center are fighting this battle.
✅ Join a union--because when corporations and billionaires collude to exploit you, collective power is your strongest defense.
✅ Stay informed and spread the word--media isn't covering this enough. Share this article. Tell your friends and family.
✅ Subscribe to independent media--corporate outlets won't fight for working people. But I will. Subscribe and support this work.
The bottom line is that this injustice is not normal. This is not okay. This is economic fascism in real time. And we must fight it by standing united for economic justice.
**Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

My team was tasked with ensuring that the entire operation--spanning a multi-billion dollar portfolio--was brought into compliance. I think about those days, nearly 15 years ago, as I now watch Trump gutting the CFPB. What does it mean for you, the ordinary American working trying to make a living, and how will it affect your day to day? Let 's Address This. Earnest Ask! I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. Subscribe and join 114,000+ fellow activists. | | ---|---|--- Why Was the CFPB ‪Even Formed? The CFPB exists because of the devastating 2008 financial crisis--a crisis caused by unchecked corporate greed and lack of oversight. The CFPB was designed to prevent the next crisis by holding financial institutions accountable. Now, Trump and his billionaire donors are tearing it apart, removing one of the most significant checks on corporate financial abuse. The CFPB was first and foremost about protecting consumers and ensuring that every law firm and vendor the bank worked with also followed ethical and legal guidelines. With that mandate, at my bank we built a compliance framework from the ground up, forcing the bank to fundamentally restructure its entire infrastructure with consumer interest at the forefront. It was a grueling, painstaking process--and to be clear--it was not altruism. The bank did not act on its own--it acted because the CFPB forced it to act. And the result? Within 30 months the bank became the gold standard of compliance, earning praise on the House floor as an example other financial institutions should follow. And other institutions did follow. The CFPB's oversight didn't just clean up one bank--it forced an industry-wide shift, ensuring that billions in unethical fees and charges were either returned to consumers or never extracted from them in the first place. Were we perfect? Of course not, but with knowledge that the CFPB was watching, we were that much motivated to ensure future policy didn't cut corners and harm customers. What Has The CFPB Done For Us Anyway? Claims that the CFPB is inefficient are claims founded in myth, not fact. Since the CFPB was formed, it has protected hundreds of millions of Americans by eliminating billions in exploitative bank charges. The numbers speak for themselves:1 $17.5 billion - The amount of money the CFPB has put back in Americans' pockets in the form of monetary compensation, principal reductions, canceled debts, and other consumer relief resulting from CFPB enforcement and supervision work $4 billion - The amount of money CFPB has imposed in civil money penalties on companies and individuals that violate the law. This money is deposited into the which provides compensation to people who have been harmed by violations of federal consumer financial protection law 200 million - The estimated number of consumer accounts eligible to receive financial relief from the CFPB's enforcement and supervision work $175 million - The amount of monetary relief resulting from 39 public enforcement actions that involved harm to servicemembers and veterans 50.1 million - The number of users who have accessed answers to hundreds of common financial questions via the CFPB's database 4 million - The number of consumer complaints the CFPB has sent to companies for response on behalf of consumers. Our public Consumer Complaint Database has published over 3.8 million of those 3,000 - The average number of complaints the CFPB handles each day 180 - The number of languages that consumers can use to file a complaint And meanwhile, banks still made record profits, proving yet again that the CFPB didn't stifle business, it protected consumers. Yet, even with those reforms in place, consumers still paid more than $5.8 billion in overdraft and NSF fees in 2023 alone. That tells you how much work remains to be done. And now, Trump is working to dismantle the very agency responsible for these protections. Trump 's War on Consumers: Dismantling the CFPB Over the weekend, the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau was effectively dismantled. All of its activities were suspended, its funding was cut, and its headquarters were temporarily closed. Acting director Russell Vought issued an immediate order to shut down all enforcement and oversight, writing in a letter to: "Cease all supervision and examination activity. Cease all stakeholder engagement. Pause all pending investigations." This is a disaster for working people and a massive gift to billion-dollar banks and predatory lenders. Even worse, Vought ordered that the CFPB's internal systems be opened to staffers from Trump's newly created fraud scheme, the so-called "Department of Government Efficiency" (DOGE)--a move that has left employees scrambling to protect sensitive consumer data. This is the same DOGE that was revealed to be employing a white supremacist who decries "race mixing," (who has since been rehired at DOGE) as well as a staffer previously fired for leaking company secrets.2 These are the people Trump is handing our private financial data over to. Why This Matters: A Return to Outright Fraud? Let's go back to the $210 million fine my former employer paid. That fine wasn't just about punishing the bank. It was about ensuring that every single vendor the bank worked with--debt collectors, law firms, financial servicers--was also held accountable. The excuse of "We did our best, but we can 't control our third-party vendors" was no longer an option. The CFPB removed that loophole, making it clear that outsourcing corruption was still corruption. With the CFPB now in shambles, that safeguard is gone. Banks and corporations will once again be free to exploit consumers with little fear of consequence--as will their vendors who often provide the direct customer interaction each of us experience daily. The Fight Back: Unions and Legal Challenges The good news? Labor Unions are stepping up, as they always do. The National Treasury Employees Union, which represents CFPB employees, has already filed two lawsuits to stop Trump's destruction of the agency. NBC3 reports: One lawsuit seeks to block the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) from accessing CFPB employee data. The other demands a judge rule that Vought's orders to halt CFPB enforcement are illegal. This is why we need unions. This is why we need regulatory agencies. And this is why we need every American--left, right, and center--to wake up and see what's happening. If you're a working-class American--Republican, Democrat, or Independent--this affects you. Do you have a bank account? Your fees are about to skyrocket. Do you have a mortgage, student loan, or auto loan? Expect fewer protections and more hidden charges. Do you use a credit card? Late fees and interest rates will climb without oversight. This is not a partisan issue. This is class warfare, waged by Trump and his billionaire donors against the working people of this country. It is critical we stand united against this exploitation, because red or blue, we're all financially screwed if we allow this corruption to ensue. What You Can Do ✅ they support legal action against Trump's attack on the CFPB. ✅ Support consumer advocacy groups--organizations like Public Citizen and the National Consumer Law Center are fighting this battle. ✅ Join a union--because when corporations and billionaires collude to exploit you, collective power is your strongest defense. ✅ Stay informed and spread the word--media isn't covering this enough. Share this article. Tell your friends and family. ✅ Subscribe to independent media--corporate outlets won't fight for working people. But I will. Subscribe and support this work. The bottom line is that this injustice is not normal. This is not okay. This is economic fascism in real time. And we must fight it by standing united for economic justice. Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- 1 2 3 Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Timeless lessons to the young and old alike | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=41916accb9cb4bac9ebd8175f784f0c6&_e=2CLkrQBDFOXU3THL9a1Vnr2gVPneVc6kNb7_-EJ2eRaJR8AZAJZEkdHb0vDyPwQSBnQ541t1atVK4QRqijXspxpDQI6iEgdemfYOdL09nfkEXOIdOgIi55eXrAqrsu1SF0F29S7NO3V42fLmgDrrZRO7rFNywyXEq2W3ayRoAK8AyrEjQAlzyv_jUrWBt22oWMcf0_89EuLoruyabi3qAinJGJQsFvROA9ENKKvoLgeztwGGbIq-cFciNFDqWe5qFxgQ5QPm3WXtTSmxJTg9JZJs1R2Gkj0ZEXmNcKNVWTATEjhtnragC3KXjoXfcAzxY_7zt5UlBTElGHVVNwsDODEootcqU2gDjP66aCmAbjYSxsJyCFdhuYevKeB0NXtmF3oNzlauRvJVu5DlGQzNgKWOyqWBklU_0lfJswEZeoyi6zMV0HLZegBCE7zUG-Tc)

| | Dear Fellow American, Classic children’s literature is being ignored and eliminated from our nation’s classrooms at an alarming rate. Beloved classics like _The Wind in the Willows_ , _Treasure Island_ , and _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ are just a few of the foundational books that are rarely being taught to our nation’s children today. Not only does this rob young people of classic tales of adventure and friendship, but they also rob children of fundamental lessons about the world and how best to live.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College released a free online course titled **“Classic Children’s Literature.”** Perhaps you’ve had a chance to watch a few lectures. **Today, I’m excited to tell you that the course is now available on DVD! And you can get your very own box set right now!** [**“Classic Children’s Literature”**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=41916accb9cb4bac9ebd8175f784f0c6&_e=2CLkrQBDFOXU3THL9a1Vnr2gVPneVc6kNb7_-EJ2eRaJR8AZAJZEkdHb0vDyPwQSBnQ541t1atVK4QRqijXspxpDQI6iEgdemfYOdL09nfkEXOIdOgIi55eXrAqrsu1SF0F29S7NO3V42fLmgDrrZRO7rFNywyXEq2W3ayRoAK8AyrEjQAlzyv_jUrWBt22oWMcf0_89EuLoruyabi3qAinJGJQsFvROA9ENKKvoLgeztwGGbIq-cFciNFDqWe5qFxgQ5QPm3WXtTSmxJTg9JZJs1R2Gkj0ZEXmNcKNVWTBXA-40m8NAOKIO0leQW4BlHIdcJVlBWiqDcgIwhvG5ucNhBE39BwET-_jwb0bEh0444NyTuDolIFJsMBGyrrmBdKXIiZUxIvofQKj9Ug3IPhc_GImtWpXxAa6cBnIgtTzr1taovFrSYUgCVgvaIfcN) explores some of the greatest works of children’s literature, from Aesop and the classic fairy tales to _Treasure Island_ and _Winnie-the-Pooh_ , and so much more. When you get your box set today, you will not only delight your family, but also evoke a sense of wonder while teaching timeless lessons to the young and old alike.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=41916accb9cb4bac9ebd8175f784f0c6&_e=2CLkrQBDFOXU3THL9a1Vnr2gVPneVc6kNb7_-EJ2eRaJR8AZAJZEkdHb0vDyPwQSBnQ541t1atVK4QRqijXspxpDQI6iEgdemfYOdL09nfkEXOIdOgIi55eXrAqrsu1SF0F29S7NO3V42fLmgDrrZRO7rFNywyXEq2W3ayRoAK8AyrEjQAlzyv_jUrWBt22oWMcf0_89EuLoruyabi3qAinJGJQsFvROA9ENKKvoLgeztwGGbIq-cFciNFDqWe5qFxgQ5QPm3WXtTSmxJTg9JZJs1R2Gkj0ZEXmNcKNVWTBPraeBE0epFYa1Gau3nDpvELD2x2deRV149X6TusPnK5Bz4ZNH0U8yA_sFcMoJzuXKI6hYKNQgu7m-FmuLfOcpaYQr-NQ30-6UXzVCTL9YTjIgoYpAjl7lINdY_9O0F1DuBctWIZ4T-YUhhdiy6WBQ)
---
| | Speaking from my own experience, this course has brought great joy to my family. It has inspired us to read the classic works covered in this course together. And I hope you can share this same experience with your loved ones as you learn more about what makes these beloved stories so important. **You can get your DVD box set of “Classic Children’s Literature” by making a tax-deductible gift of $100 to Hillsdale College using this secure link:** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-classic-childrens-literature-today**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=41916accb9cb4bac9ebd8175f784f0c6&_e=2CLkrQBDFOXU3THL9a1Vnr2gVPneVc6kNb7_-EJ2eRaJR8AZAJZEkdHb0vDyPwQSBnQ541t1atVK4QRqijXspxpDQI6iEgdemfYOdL09nfkEXOIdOgIi55eXrAqrsu1SF0F29S7NO3V42fLmgDrrZRO7rFNywyXEq2W3ayRoAK8AyrEjQAlzyv_jUrWBt22oWMcf0_89EuLoruyabi3qAinJGJQsFvROA9ENKKvoLgeztwGGbIq-cFciNFDqWe5qFxgQ5QPm3WXtTSmxJTg9JZJs1R2Gkj0ZEXmNcKNVWTD2VluP2my0FL6nx7xov6rOVah-Lacu_5Oh-4ETYAPx2-LPddIc66onWUCDGRYy3Cl4h8n6kCHcZXCLo768xYzhXkFhtSm_3SncMqm9iuqrcBz5adojvlCGazAR97TJGpOSFFPWYAxktxikvoif4obU) And when you do, you’ll also help expand nationwide educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, such as:
* Increasing the number of students taking free online courses.
* Growing the readership of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty.
* Restoring excellence to K-12 education through an American classical curriculum.
* Promoting constitutional education through social media and the radio.

Thank you again for your support of Hillsdale College and for partnering with us to educate our fellow citizens, especially our youngest citizens. clean_body: As I met Virginians this weekend, we discussed the importance of protecting Virginians’ fundamental rights, strengthening Virginia’s local workforce and economy, and working effectively with legislators from across the aisle to deliver for Virginians. | = | Peter, I wanted to share a little update from the campaign trail with you! Earlier this month, I met Virginia Veterans, business owners, and community members across Hampton Roads, with stops in Norfolk, Virginia Beach, and Chesapeake. = = As I met Virginians this weekend, we discussed the importance of protecting Virginians’ fundamental rights, strengthening Virginia’s local workforce and economy, and working effectively with legislators from across the aisle to deliver for Virginians. = Hearing from people like you is what fuels my campaign and my mission to keep delivering for Virginia. It’s also genuinely one of my favorite parts of campaigning! So thank you to everyone who came out. I know I’ll meet many more of you as our campaign grows, and I’ll need your support to keep up this campaign as we work towards November! = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

# **[NEW PODCAST EPISODE OUT NOW!](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=155daee630&e=5bd167f239)**

---
Kitchen Table Issues. A look at Latino Independent Voters
with Dr. Derek Wakefield
The Latino Vote Podcast Season 2025 Episode 3
| Chuck and Mike welcome our first guest of Season 2025, **Dr. Derek Wakefield** , a political academic whose groundbreaking research **challenges conventional wisdom on Latino voting behavior**. They break down how Latino voters**—especially independents—prioritize economic issues over the traditional racial or immigration-based appeals**. Dr. Derek findings reveal why Republican messaging made inroads with Latino Independents in past elections and the Democratic Party’s missteps in voter outreach.
---
|
---
| | | |
**Today's Headlines:**

[The Latino Vote Podcast's latest guest Derek Wakefield's Dissertation](https://vote.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e84c756a73b2b9193783ffd1&id=a7b6a71c97&e=5bd167f239) By: Dr. Derek Wakefield Research

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101901544/527433908/-1346133780?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU2NTI4Zi1mYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKLasjYfjj7LTyFx0pQIEMlBDALahzzDbS48cKU6cmE=)
---
Peter — Republicans want to cut tax breaks for billionaires, and they’re willing to put millions of lives on the line to pay for it. Their plan to fund these tax cuts is to slash federal funding for Medicaid and rip away health care from 1 in 5 Americans. **That’s over 70 million people.** Just last week, the Trump administration temporarily shut down Medicaid portals across all 50 states. Peter, no amount of backtracking on Donald Trump’s part can hide the fact that this is an all-out attack on American citizens. It’s time we show our collective dissent, and continue fighting to elect more Democratic Senators who will put people’s lives over politics. **[_**We can’t let them get away with taking our healthcare. Sign on in support of lifesaving federal programs like Medicaid and securing a Democratic House majority >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101901545/527433909/1728277015?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU2NTI4Zi1mYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKLasjYfjj7LTyFx0pQIEMlBDALahzzDbS48cKU6cmE=&emci=6090d488-fae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b656528f-fae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30620316)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101901546/527433910/1728277015?refcode=AU_FSP_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTk2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjU2NTI4Zi1mYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MKLasjYfjj7LTyFx0pQIEMlBDALahzzDbS48cKU6cmE=&emci=6090d488-fae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=b656528f-fae7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=30620316)**

It will take all of us to stand up to House Republicans’ extreme agenda and take back the majority. By adding your name to our petition today, you’re helping us send a message that these attacks will not go unanswered.

clean_body: | = Peter — Republicans want to cut tax breaks for billionaires, and they’re willing to put millions of lives on the line to pay for it. Their plan to fund these tax cuts is to slash federal funding for Medicaid and rip away health care from 1 in 5 Americans. That’s over 70 million people. Just last week, the Trump administration temporarily shut down Medicaid portals across all 50 states. Peter, no amount of backtracking on Donald Trump’s part can hide the fact that this is an all-out attack on American citizens. It’s time we show our collective dissent, and continue fighting to elect more Democratic Senators who will put people’s lives over politics. | It will take all of us to stand up to House Republicans’ extreme agenda and take back the majority. By adding your name to our petition today, you’re helping us send a message that these attacks will not go unanswered. Thank you, Fair Shot PAC = Fair Shot PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States | mailto:info@fairshotpac.org | Paid for by Fair Shot PAC

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101901845/527434992/1080914824?amount=10&source=SBD_DPG_EM_FR_021025_1_1_McBath-BHM_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGY4OWZmYi1mYWU3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=taBrL7EUDP0lha4craJ32ukr1gvAnp4FqO2sKXRxgKc=) Peter, this Black History Month, the team here at the Democratic Party of Georgia wanted to put the spotlight on the Black elected leaders committed to our fight for progress here in Georgia.

Since the tragic death of her son at the hands of senseless gun violence in 2012, Lucy McBath has fought relentlessly to ensure no parent has to undergo that same pain.

She championed legislation stipulating universal background checks for all gun sales and Red Flag Laws to limit access to firearms for those who are potentially dangerous, both of which passed the House.

We couldn’t be prouder to have Rep. McBath representing the Peach State — not just during Black History Month, but 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year.

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | = Peter, this Black History Month, the team here at the Democratic Party of Georgia wanted to put the spotlight on the Black elected leaders committed to our fight for progress here in Georgia. Since the tragic death of her son at the hands of senseless gun violence in 2012, Lucy McBath has fought relentlessly to ensure no parent has to undergo that same pain. She championed legislation stipulating universal background checks for all gun sales and Red Flag Laws to limit access to firearms for those who are potentially dangerous, both of which passed the House. We couldn’t be prouder to have Rep. name: Adam Schiff
subject: People keep asking me, “What can I do?” Here’s an answer →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —
People keep asking me, “What can I do?” And let me tell you, there’s a
race happening in Wisconsin that isn’t getting nearly enough national
attention — but it should be.

Voters will elect a justice to the state Supreme Court for a 10-year term.
And Republicans are laser-focused on flipping it. Just look at this
nonsense:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&t=1023&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]Elon Musk on Twitter: Very important to vote Republican for the
Wisconsin Supreme Court to prevent voting fraud!

Why are they so dialed in? Because they know that controlling the state’s
highest court gives them the power to uphold extreme voter suppression
laws, attack reproductive rights, and rubber-stamp whatever gerrymandered
maps they need to stay in power.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.b0JeFC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1024&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]If I’ve already said enough, and you’re on board to help Democrats win
this race, please take a moment to split a contribution between Judge
Susan Crawford and my campaign >>

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Adam Schiff and Judge Susan Crawford will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1025&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1026&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1027&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1028&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=250&t=1029&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1030&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

You better believe MAGA money from the likes of Elon Musk is going to be
FLOODING into Wisconsin. Here’s the thing: Wisconsin’s races come down to
razor-thin margins — Every. Single. Time. Take a look:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&t=1031&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]Wisconsin's Razor-Thin Election Margins

We’ve seen this playbook before — massive super PAC donations, misleading
attack ads, and outside spending drowning out grassroots campaigns. And
because Wisconsin is decided by razor-thin margins — sometimes just a few
thousand votes — every single dollar and every single voter mobilized
could be the difference between victory and defeat.

And here’s the truth: with all the distractions of the Trump
administration, it would be easy to be debilitated by the chaos. That’s
their goal. If we’re constantly reacting to the latest stunt, we’re not
focused on what actually moves us forward. But we cannot afford to let
their manufactured crises consume us — we have to be just as relentless in
our pursuit of progress. We can’t forget about important state and local
elections that have a direct impact on people’s lives.

We’ve seen what happens when the right builds power at the state level.
While they use chaos as a strategy, we have to use clarity, urgency, and
action as ours.

So if you’re wondering, “What can I do right now?” — here’s an answer:

Pay attention to this race, split a donation right now, or get involved
however you can, and make sure the people in your life know what’s at
stake.

That’s why I’m urgently asking:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.b0JeFC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1032&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]Ahead of the upcoming Supreme Court of Wisconsin election, please show
your support for Judge Susan Crawford with a split contribution.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split
donation to Adam Schiff and Judge Susan Crawford will go through
immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.WaF6cB&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1033&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]EXPRESS DONATE
$10

$25

$250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=feb2025_abs_em_crawford.TvalM-&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250210_PM1_V2_S1&email=&t=1038&akid=8294%2E5257348%2E7cuQbD ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Supporting leaders who will defend the rule of law and stand up for what
is right has never been more important.

Thank you,

Adam

Just look at this nonsense: [ ]Elon Musk on Twitter: Very important to vote Republican for the Wisconsin Supreme Court to prevent voting fraud! Why are they so dialed in? Because they know that controlling the state’s highest court gives them the power to uphold extreme voter suppression laws, attack reproductive rights, and rubber-stamp whatever gerrymandered maps they need to stay in power. [ ]If I’ve already said enough, and you’re on board to help Democrats win this race, please take a moment to split a contribution between Judge Susan Crawford and my campaign >> If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Judge Susan Crawford will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT You better believe MAGA money from the likes of Elon Musk is going to be FLOODING into Wisconsin. Here’s the thing: Wisconsin’s races come down to razor-thin margins — Every. Single. Time. Take a look: [ ]Wisconsin's Razor-Thin Election Margins We’ve seen this playbook before — massive super PAC donations, misleading attack ads, and outside spending drowning out grassroots campaigns. And because Wisconsin is decided by razor-thin margins — sometimes just a few thousand votes — every single dollar and every single voter mobilized could be the difference between victory and defeat. And here’s the truth: with all the distractions of the Trump administration, it would be easy to be debilitated by the chaos. That’s their goal. If we’re constantly reacting to the latest stunt, we’re not focused on what actually moves us forward. But we cannot afford to let their manufactured crises consume us — we have to be just as relentless in our pursuit of progress. We can’t forget about important state and local elections that have a direct impact on people’s lives. We’ve seen what happens when the right builds power at the state level. While they use chaos as a strategy, we have to use clarity, urgency, and action as ours. So if you’re wondering, “What can I do right now?” — here’s an answer: Pay attention to this race, split a donation right now, or get involved however you can, and make sure the people in your life know what’s at stake. That’s why I’m urgently asking: [ ]Ahead of the upcoming Supreme Court of Wisconsin election, please show your support for Judge Susan Crawford with a split contribution. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Judge Susan Crawford will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Supporting leaders who will defend the rule of law and stand up for what is right has never been more important. Thank you, Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502 [ ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ ]Privacy Policy PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Wes Moore
subject: Winning this decade
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101902372/527436771/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NTVjYzM3Yy1mY2U3LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=q9xEvPUpCldMCayvSyrmMjbh2Fo9p-A5lzFEfJ37ZBw=&emci=a4434e75-f7e7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&emdi=955cc37c-fce7-ef11-90cb-0022482a94f4&ceid=24635485)
Friend, As Maryland faces a budget crisis like no other, we need to create a tangible plan that targets **both** our strengths and our weaknesses. And, if we’re going to make this Maryland’s decade, we need to take action immediately. This is why I’ve introduced **The Decade Act of 2025.** This legislation aims to **sharpen the tools in the State’s economic development toolbox** by revamping, relocating, rebranding — and in some cases, repealing — programs to maximize returns on investments. So, how are we going to accomplish this? It’ll take four steps. Here’s what it will look like:
1. We’re going to apply lessons learned from the administration of economic development programs to improve them.

2. We’ll ensure that programs are straightforward to market and utilize.

3. We’ll also ensure that our economic tools are complimentary of one another by focusing on high potential, priority industries.

4. Finally, we are going to eliminate programs that are ineffective or have served their purpose.

While Maryland is safer and more competitive than it was two years ago when we took office, there is still plenty of room for improvement. Marylanders expect their elected officials to**invest their tax dollars wisely.** And we also need to ensure that where we increase investment, **we grow. ** **Growth** will continue to be our north star. Because **a growing Maryland leads the rest of the nation and has the resources and the willpower to deliver results for the people we serve** — no matter the obstacles thrown our way. Together, we can win this decade. It will take hard work and determination, but we will get this done. Elevate, Wes
---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

subject: BREAKING: Musk may have your Social Security Number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
The richest man on Earth may now have taxpayers' most sensitive information.
| | | **BREAKING via _Washington Post_ : "Elon Musk has your Social Security number. _It's as scary as it sounds._ "**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21060?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250210-LivePoll-MuskSSN1QS-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250210-LivePoll-MuskSSN1QS-ETG-sl1&akid=19579%2E9716520%2EDgYc7f)
**Do you trust Musk with your Social Security?**
| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/21060?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250210-LivePoll-MuskSSN1QS-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250210-LivePoll-MuskSSN1QS-ETG-sl1&akid=19579%2E9716520%2EDgYc7f)

name: Senator Lashrecse Aird
subject: 2025 General Assembly Session: The Crossover Report
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
body:
logo [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/Screen%20Shot%202023-11-12%20at%207.15.37%20PM.png]
2025 General Assembly Session: The Crossover Report
February 4, marked the official halfway point of the 2025 General Assembly Session, often referred to as crossover. While we began this session with more than 2500 introduced bills and resolutions crossover marks the deadline in which each chamber must act on all its originating bills and those not acted upon are effectively dead. Additionally, each crossover week marks the period where the Senate and House reveal its amendments to the Governor’s Introduced Budget. This week’s newsletter will give you information on both, as well as some additional updates from this session.
https://www.facebook.com/airdcampaign [https://www.facebook.com/airdcampaign] https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird [https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird] https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/ [https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/Untitled%20design%20%2830%29.png] LEGISLATIVE UPDATE
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/feb/Screenshot%202025-02-10%20at%2011.20.14%E2%80%AFAM.png]
We began the 2025 legislative session with 20 bills and two study resolutions. As of the crossover point we are sending 13 bills and our two study resolutions to the House of Delegates for final action. Most notable are the following: (SB1267) allowing for civil penalties for property owners failing to adhere to zoning codes for multifamily residences; (SB1221) aiming to prevent the number of vulnerable individuals from being evicted from public housing authorities; (SB1230) ensuring our schools have the ability to keep more quality long-term substitutes in classrooms when needed to prevent new substitutes being replaced every 90 days.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/feb/Screenshot%202025-02-10%20at%2011.21.06%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Also now under consideration in the House of Delegates is (SB1383) relating to the sanctioning of nursing homes. From 2018 to 2024 complaints increased by 59%, in 2024 alone the Virginia Department of Health (VDH) received 939 nursing home complaints. Our legislation not only stands to improve the quality of care being offered but it empowers the VA Health Commissioner to prevent problems discovered from escalating to serious conditions. I had an opportunity to discuss this critical legislation with WTVR Channel 6 news as part of their ongoing coverage of nursing home concerns. Take a look at the story here. [https://www.wtvr.com/news/local-news/nursing-home-legislation-jan-28-2025#google_vignette]
As it relates to our study resolutions (SJ262 ) requests the Joint Legislative Audit and Review Commission (JLARC) to study the need for and feasibility of creating a Secretariat of Rural Affairs in the Commonwealth, and (SJ263) requests the Department of Transportation to study the need and options for constructing a bridge.
While there were several bills that failed in committee, I regret that the formation of the Virginia Autism Advisory Council ( SB1232 ) was one that did not move forward. A formal recommendation of the Behavioral Health Commission in which I serve, our legislation would have transitioned the existing council into a commission. Annual reports from DBHDS show a 339% increase in the number of individuals with autism using Developmental Disabilities (DD) services through Community Services Boards (CSBs). This dramatic increase highlights the growing need for autism-specific services and a commission with this focus. I look forward to working with all of the community partners to move this forward in a future session. Information on all of our bills, the full language under consideration and their status can be found here. [https://lis.virginia.gov/bill-search/?q=eyJzZWxlY3RlZFBhdHJvblR5cGUiOlsxXSwic2VsZWN0ZWRQYXRyb24iOjUwOSwic2VsZWN0ZWRTZXNzaW9uIjo1N30=]
Further, I received numerous calls and emails from around the district regarding opposition to a bill proposed by a legislator in the House of Delegates ( HB232 ) that proposed to divert casino generated revenue from the City of Petersburg to the entire region. I am pleased that this bill was not acted upon by crossover and therefore was left to die in the Finance Committee. While the delegate released a statement indicating that “revenue sharing was part of the discussion surrounding the Petersburg casino project,” I can confidently say this is completely false . As the patron of the casino legislation and as someone whose intentions around the casino has been extensively covered publicly, I can say with great clarity that not only was this not ever explored, it was never even considered. This attempt to usurp the decision making authority around the use of tax revenue from the citizens of Petersburg by a legislator that does not represent this community and worse, supported by the sitting delegate for Petersburg was not only unprecedented but entirely inappropriate. Again, this outcome was the right result and I hope the last we will see of any such attempt.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/Untitled%20design%20%2830%29.png] SENATE BUDGET OVERVIEW
The state budget affects everything that the state has oversight for, from funding for our schools, healthcare services to compensation and more. While last session we adopted a new budget, on February 2, the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee revealed its proposed amendments [https://budget.lis.virginia.gov/sessionreports/2025/1/?emci=feb547eb-38e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&emdi=e4d6befd-50e2-ef11-88f8-0022482a97e9&ceid=1245387] to the 2024-2026 budgets, specifically FY2025-2026. Their proposal takes into account Governor Youngkin's proposals released in December, a nearly 3-billion dollar surplus, any legislation introduced that has a cost to implement and the individual budget amendments from all 40 members of the Senate.
At the start of this session and in my State of the Commonwealth Rebuttal, I made it clear that Senate Democrats would be prioritizing putting more money in the pockets of families and this is fully represented in the budget proposal released. Most notably the following tax relief recommendations were offered:
* Working Virginians Tax Rebate: Provides a tax rebate of $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers up to their tax liability by October 15
* Expiring Standard Deduction Extension & EITC: Extends the expiring tax provisions tied to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act to December 2027
* Standard Deduction Increase: Increases the standard deduction to $8,750 for single filers and $17,500 for joint filers, a nearly $250/$500 increase respectively
* Refundable Earned Income Tax Credit: Increases the refundability of the state earned income tax credit from 15-percent to 20-percent of the federal credit
Additional budget recommendations include the following:
* $1,000 bonus to teachers and school support staff ($134.4 million)
* 1.5% bonus for state and state-supported local employees in addition to the planned 3% salary increase in FY2026 ($83.1 million)
* $15 million for rental assistance pilot program to strengthen housing stability
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/feb/Screenshot%202025-02-10%20at%2011.25.57%E2%80%AFAM.png]
In addition to the abovementioned proposals, also included in the Senate’s budget is $222.9 million to lift the cap for school support staff funding 27.89 positions per 1,000 students. For 16 years this has been a public school priority and we have been incrementally carrying legislation chipping away at this cap for years. This year our legislation ( SB1236 ) while not acted on in committee was ultimately incorporated into the budget. We were proud to join the Fund Our Schools Coalition and legislative partners in celebrating this milestone moment! Additional coverage on this proposal was featured on WRIC Channel 8 and can be viewed here. [https://www.wric.com/news/politics/capitol-connection/virginia-democrats-push-budget-amendments-to-fund-more-support-staff-positions-in-schools/]
To view a complete chart of the Senate Budget, the House Budget and the Governors proposal take a look at the chart available here [https://thecommonwealthinstitute.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/02/Key-Budget-Policy-Choices-2025-committees.pdf] courtesy of the Commonwealth Institute for Fiscal Policy.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/feb/Screenshot%202025-02-10%20at%2011.27.04%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Without question the actions taking place at the federal level have left many uncertain of how those decisions will affect them here in Virginia. Whether you're a federal government employee/contractor, dependent on federally funded healthcare access or assistance I know these decisions matter to you. That’s why I joined my colleagues in a joint press conference to publicly express concerns regarding the actions of President Trump and his administration and how we are working to identify ways to protect Virginians during this tumultuous time. We will also be preparing how to provide resources that may be impacted while billions of dollars are being froze. If you have already been affected by these changes please don’t hesitate to let us know so we can be of support to you.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/89018/images/Newsletter/feb/Screenshot%202025-02-10%20at%2011.30.34%E2%80%AFAM.png]
With the 2025 Session scheduled for adjournment on February 22, there is still time for you to schedule your visit or get in contact with our office. As always, we can be reached via email at senatoraird@senate.virginia.gov [senatoraird@senate.virginia.gov] , phone at 804-698-7513 or by visiting our website at lashrecseaird.com. The honor remains mine to represent you.
https://www.facebook.com/airdcampaign [https://www.facebook.com/airdcampaign] https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird [https://twitter.com/lashrecseaird] https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/ [https://www.instagram.com/lashrecseaird/]
Paid for and authorized by Friends of Lashrecse Aird
Friends of Lashrecse Aird
Post Office Box 3943
Petersburg, VA 23805
Aird for Delegate
PO Box 3943
Petersburg, VA 23805
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/VXhHiX9aqU2_G1kIp6ZGpQ2?unsubscribedata=hbYFLdS%2BenVX90EkvFSccDxnZhVroJ8hWaBnM8spk4gpNlGRIhYTulVAa54PCSa7Vw1NNFvWNl%2B4E9rK%2FJMyIQOCs7sXfeoR7LpONZ%2BXkyG7pkSnlfn4lCjRaV51vRRjHb73pOqOfB%2FfZ%2BufEHRdT2lu6%2Bsr7d7yZTzRK0xlL7uDn7FNnPB%2B3SavWkLMqL4wJ9sGdw63iXJSqt%2ByrI2doa8j5BEsgZ7Zi1K7LKuxPGUMU0iAtzLrXWPVd2SC7Ju5DuUYJpiVbzjTdyPw5zqAxD8XzhqqiZ5IEOomYevj52wVWGlReu3g2FjNk7jy31dyV5Ir%2Fox5Hc7LAuJQFLFE9NJHV%2FfNk5D9S3XavJmNYZ77XlH9lCdEP5fbPs%2FJBGDW2bMjnPdaf7bLNnPRG0CXXo2TzHofMzgWowmr0wa8wxQXW0a5ZRsFqjGlwok%2BJrE8 .
