A formal recommendation of the Behavioral Health Commission in which I serve, our legislation would have transitioned the existing council into a commission. Annual reports from DBHDS show a 339% increase in the number of individuals with autism using Developmental Disabilities (DD) services through Community Services Boards (CSBs). This dramatic increase highlights the growing need for autism-specific services and a commission with this focus. I look forward to working with all of the community partners to move this forward in a future session. Information on all of our bills, the full language under consideration and their status can be found here. [=] Further, I received numerous calls and emails from around the district regarding opposition to a bill proposed by a legislator in the House of Delegates ( HB232 ) that proposed to divert casino generated revenue from the City of Petersburg to the entire region. I am pleased that this bill was not acted upon by crossover and therefore was left to die in the Finance Committee. While the delegate released a statement indicating that “revenue sharing was part of the discussion surrounding the Petersburg casino project,” I can confidently say this is completely false . As the patron of the casino legislation and as someone whose intentions around the casino has been extensively covered publicly, I can say with great clarity that not only was this not ever explored, it was never even considered. This attempt to usurp the decision making authority around the use of tax revenue from the citizens of Petersburg by a legislator that does not represent this community and worse, supported by the sitting delegate for Petersburg was not only unprecedented but entirely inappropriate. Again, this outcome was the right result and I hope the last we will see of any such attempt. [] SENATE BUDGET OVERVIEW The state budget affects everything that the state has oversight for, from funding for our schools, healthcare services to compensation and more. While last session we adopted a new budget, on February 2, the Senate Finance and Appropriations Committee revealed its proposed amendments [] to the 2024-2026 budgets, specifically FY2025-2026. Their proposal takes into account Governor Youngkin's proposals released in December, a nearly 3-billion dollar surplus, any legislation introduced that has a cost to implement and the individual budget amendments from all 40 members of the Senate. At the start of this session and in my State of the Commonwealth Rebuttal, I made it clear that Senate Democrats would be prioritizing putting more money in the pockets of families and this is fully represented in the budget proposal released. Most notably the following tax relief recommendations were offered: Working Virginians Tax Rebate: Provides a tax rebate of $200 for single filers and $400 for joint filers up to their tax liability by October 15 Expiring Standard Deduction Extension & EITC: Extends the expiring tax provisions tied to the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act to December 2027 Standard Deduction Increase: Increases the standard deduction to $8,750 for single filers and $17,500 for joint filers, a nearly $250/$500 increase respectively Refundable Earned Income Tax Credit: Increases the refundability of the state earned income tax credit from 15-percent to 20-percent of the federal credit Additional budget recommendations include the following: $1,000 bonus to teachers and school support staff ($134.4 million) 1.5% bonus for state and state-supported local employees in addition to the planned 3% salary increase in FY2026 ($83.1 million) * $15 million for rental assistance pilot program to strengthen housing stability [] In addition to the abovementioned proposals, also included in the Senate’s budget is $222.9 million to lift the cap for school support staff funding 27.89 positions per 1,000 students. For 16 years this has been a public school priority and we have been incrementally carrying legislation chipping away at this cap for years. This year our legislation ( SB1236 ) while not acted on in committee was ultimately incorporated into the budget. We were proud to join the Fund Our Schools Coalition and legislative partners in celebrating this milestone moment! Additional coverage on this proposal was featured on WRIC Channel 8 and can be viewed here. [] To view a complete chart of the Senate Budget, the House Budget and the Governors proposal take a look at the chart available here [] courtesy of the Commonwealth Institute for Fiscal Policy. [] Without question the actions taking place at the federal level have left many uncertain of how those decisions will affect them here in Virginia. Whether you're a federal government employee/contractor, dependent on federally funded healthcare access or assistance I know these decisions matter to you. That’s why I joined my colleagues in a joint press conference to publicly express concerns regarding the actions of President Trump and his administration and how we are working to identify ways to protect Virginians during this tumultuous time. We will also be preparing how to provide resources that may be impacted while billions of dollars are being froze. If you have already been affected by these changes please don’t hesitate to let us know so we can be of support to you. [] With the 2025 Session scheduled for adjournment on February 22, there is still time for you to schedule your visit or get in contact with our office. As always, we can be reached via email at senatoraird@senate.virginia.gov [senatoraird@senate.virginia.gov] , phone at 804-698-7513 or by visiting our website at lashrecseaird.com. The honor remains mine to represent you. [] [] [] Paid for and authorized by Friends of Lashrecse Aird Friends of Lashrecse Aird Post Office Box 3943 Petersburg, VA 23805 Aird for Delegate PO Box 3943 Petersburg, VA 23805 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

The Trump administration is working to dismantle this bloated agency, which has been criticized for its chaotic and inefficient delivery of humanitarian aid. Meanwhile, Democrats and the liberal media are spreading misinformation about the administration's efforts, claiming they'll harm the world's poorest. But we know the truth. clean_body: | Fellow Conservative, As we stand together to make America great again, it's crucial we address the . They're crying foul over President Trump's freeze on foreign aid, but they're conveniently ignoring the billions of dollars wasted on questionable programs abroad. Take, for example, the recent controversy surrounding . The Trump administration is working to dismantle this bloated agency, which has been criticized for its chaotic and inefficient delivery of humanitarian aid. Meanwhile, Democrats and the liberal media are spreading misinformation about the administration's efforts, claiming they'll harm the world's poorest. But we know the truth. We know that President Trump is committed to . And we need your support to continue fighting for this mission. | | | | | | | | | | With your help, we can hold Democrats accountable for their reckless spending habits and ensure that our tax dollars are used effectively to benefit America, not foreign nations. |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101902976/527439133/-2092847731?amount=&amounts=,,,,&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.10_Carville-Cabinet_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyODVhZjkzLWZlZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HLxL9sCjZp7gb0GF9zo0OKy9qaxRCfXlUlxsET2G90Y=) I don’t know about you, but I haven’t been able to think about much of anything besides Trump’s nutjob cabinet nominees.

Let’s talk about some of ‘em.

**RFK Jr. (Secretary of Health and Human Services):** an infamous anti-vaxxer and anti-abortion extremist who aims to demolish our public health systems from the inside out;

**Pete Hegseth (Secretary of Defense):** an unqualified maniac who supports privatizing veterans’ health care and was credibly accused of sexual assault and getting drunk on the job;

**Kash Patel (FBI Director):** best known for appearing on Qanon-related podcasts, pushing conspiracy theories, and publicly releasing a list of enemies of the MAGA movement;

**Russell Vought (Director of the Office of Management and Budget):** an anti-government lunatic who’s gunning to cut billions from Medicare and Social Security;

**Pam Bondi (Attorney General):** Trump’s personal lawyer during his first impeachment trials, who staunchly supports his dangerous election fraud nonsense;

**Tulsi Gabbard (Director of National Intelligence):** a mouthpiece for Russian propaganda who’s sympathetic to dictators and U.S. adversaries.

**_Excuse my language — but WTF?_**

Folks, I’ll be candid. Some of these folks have already been confirmed by the Senate, and it would be irresponsible to suggest that we have a decent chance of blocking the rest.

[**Bondi and Hegseth already got confirmed, but we’ve got to put up the strongest fight possible, so that we can maybe send one or two of these other bozos packing.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101902978/527439136/-2092847731?amount=&amounts=,,,,&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.02.10_Carville-Cabinet_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQyODVhZjkzLWZlZTctZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HLxL9sCjZp7gb0GF9zo0OKy9qaxRCfXlUlxsET2G90Y=)

President Donald Trump **[signed a historic executive order today,](https://substack.com/redirect/34ab4739-c4fb-4256-87f0-6bfbdc3c5844?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** officially renaming the Gulf of Mexico to "The Gulf of America," and marking the first ever annual Gulf of America day, Febuary 9, unapologetically proclaiming American exceptionalism to the world.
"Have you talked to Mexico about this?" a reporter asked Trump.
The President was caught off guard by the question, answering, "Actually no..."
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/34ab4739-c4fb-4256-87f0-6bfbdc3c5844?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/34ab4739-c4fb-4256-87f0-6bfbdc3c5844?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By American Hartford Gold](https://substack.com/redirect/3e51703a-cb51-4c11-ac19-eaf2253d3743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Hello Friends Bill O'Reilly Here,**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3e51703a-cb51-4c11-ac19-eaf2253d3743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I remember how the **Great Recession of 2008 wiped out $2.4 trillion dollars from retirement funds.**
And now it looks like history is repeating itself.
**Experts forecast the coming recession will be even worse than the 2008 financial crisis, including:**
• More than 2 million lost jobs
• Stocks plummeting over 20%
• IRAs and 401(k)s to lock in losses of 25% and keep falling
**We can't stop the recession from happening, but you can prepare for it.**
That's why I've put together **[a concise guide to help you protect your finances](https://substack.com/redirect/3e51703a-cb51-4c11-ac19-eaf2253d3743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during this downturn.
**[Request your free guide now to recession-proof your life](https://substack.com/redirect/3e51703a-cb51-4c11-ac19-eaf2253d3743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and protect your IRA, 401(k) and pension savings.
[Get My Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/3e51703a-cb51-4c11-ac19-eaf2253d3743?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Kristi Noem FIRES BACK when Dana Bash calls her a hypocrite on live T.V.
Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem **[refused to let CNN's Dana Bash lie](https://substack.com/redirect/1a88821b-a806-472b-9ade-a7849a2f9783?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about what DOGE is currently doing to the bloated federal government.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1a88821b-a806-472b-9ade-a7849a2f9783?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/1a88821b-a806-472b-9ade-a7849a2f9783?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You feel comfortable with Elon Musk having access to Americans' personal data?" Bash questioned Noem, adding that Republicans historically have been guarded about letting the government have access to personal data.
"Of course, the President has authorized him to have access," Noem answered. "We can't trust our government anymore!"
Bash fired back, "You are the government now!"
"This audit needs to happen to make sure that we are going through a process that adds integrity back into these programs," Noem fired back.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/1a88821b-a806-472b-9ade-a7849a2f9783?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Pro-big government Democrats have challenged the legality of Musk using DOGE to slash government programs, and even to close frivolous of defunct government departments like USAID. However, Musk shows no sign of slowing down his efforts to trim government fat amid the left's uproar.
* * *

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Trump doesn’t have the numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Trump has to resort to illegal executive actions because his agenda is so unpopular
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1502%2E791427%2EsUYXnf)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/3097?t=2&akid=1502%2E791427%2EsUYXnf)
Friend, everyone knows that Trump and Musk’s takeover of the federal budget and government agencies is completely illegal.
Democrats know it, Republicans know it, and every expert you can find will tell you it’s unconstitutional.
And the real reason they are choosing to do things this way, the reason they are testing the waters of authoritarianism, is because they simply don’t have the votes to legally enact their agenda through Congress.
Think about that — even though Republicans control all three branches of government, Trump still has to resort to illegal executive actions because his agenda is so unpopular. People don’t want to see USAID eliminated or the Department of Education abolished, only the fringe far-right do.
**That’s why I believe if we keep up the pressure and continue to rally the public against Trump and Musk’s actions, we will lay the groundwork for their defeat.**
Because America is still a country where the law matters, and the constitution matters. Congress and the courts exist as checks on the power of the presidency, and it’s up to a grassroots movement like ours to remind them to do that job.
So, if you’re looking at all of the chaos unfolding and wondering what you can do right now to help:
**[Make a contribution today and help our movement keep up the fight to hold this administration accountable. It’s going to be up to the American people to show Trump that he’s gone too far.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-feb25.YmER0g&refcode=em250210-1-120&t=3&akid=1502%2E791427%2EsUYXnf)**

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We’re not wasting any time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team, While the new session of our state legislature is just beginning, we’re not wasting any time addressing the issues that matter most to Michiganders. That’s why I recently signed legislation that makes our communities safer and further advances women’s health statewide. **[**Before I continue, will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to stand with me as I fight like hell to make real progress for Michigan?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101903729/527441818/-1561548045?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViMGZlZGUtMDBlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mz1dALBH5d_4yVyGVac2Y3qlyJcn2tyBfjXjoJxcyho=)** | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101903730/527441819/-1561548045?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViMGZlZGUtMDBlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mz1dALBH5d_4yVyGVac2Y3qlyJcn2tyBfjXjoJxcyho=)**
---
Guns are the number one killer of young people in this country. It’s a uniquely American problem, but it doesn’t have to be this way. Whether they’re heading into the classroom or watching a movie in theaters, Michiganders should feel safe in their communities.
Safety has been one of my top priorities — and the legislation I signed will take meaningful steps to prevent gun violence, increase knowledge of safe storage practices, and reduce the number of guns on our streets.
**I also signed legislation that expands reproductive freedom.** In Michigan, we believe that women deserve to make their own choices about their health care in partnership with trusted medical professionals and loved ones — _but too many women either can’t afford or access critical reproductive services._
That’s why I signed legislation allowing pharmacists to prescribe and distribute contraceptives directly to patients, make reproductive care more affordable by lowering out-of-pocket costs, and cut the unnecessary red tape that stands between people and their health care.
**But there’s always more to do,** and I’m willing to work with anyone who wants to move our state forward.
**[**We can create a future where Michiganders across the state have the opportunity to better themselves and their families, but only if we work together. Will you pitch in ahead of our first mid-quarter fundraising deadline of 2025 to stand with me as I fight like hell to make real progress for our state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101903731/527441820/230925266?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20250210_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTViMGZlZGUtMDBlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Mz1dALBH5d_4yVyGVac2Y3qlyJcn2tyBfjXjoJxcyho=)**

Did you know that a lot of people don't actually read these emails?

Peter, I get it: _Why would you click on this email, let alone chip in, if you don’t know my story or what I’m fighting for?_

That’s why today, I want to reintroduce myself. **Here are 3 things you need to know about me and this grassroots movement:**

**1.** My name is Ritchie Torres and I am the Congressman representing the Bronx in New York. I am the first openly gay Afro-Latino in Congress, and I wear that badge with honor.

**2.** I am an avid supporter of affordable housing, LGBTQIA+ rights, reproductive freedom, Social Security & Medicare, _and more._

**3.** I am working tirelessly to protect this seat and help my Democratic colleagues take back the House through special elections, starting with meeting our $10,000 weekly goal.

But with Republicans _hellbent_ on protecting their razor-thin majority and _squashing_ our momentum, I need your help:

[**Peter, if you actually read this email, I'm sure you now understand how important it is that I meet my fundraising deadlines. With so much on the line, a $3 donation from you can make a huge difference. So please, can you chip in $3 today? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101903784/527441989/-864556716?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjY3NzA2MC0wMWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLzxsz-auvI1431_l02a9XO2IHDotgLtkQNbHQZsKHI=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101903791/527441996/-864556716?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjY3NzA2MC0wMWU4LWVmMTEtOTBjYi0wMDIyNDgyYTk0ZjQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLzxsz-auvI1431_l02a9XO2IHDotgLtkQNbHQZsKHI=)**

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

Last year, this community rallied to help our candidates win key races up and down the ballot in the toughest of circumstances. Supporters like you have fueled our work from the very beginning, and we're proud to continue standing with you in the important fights ahead.

name: The DC Bugle

Hi Friend,
Did you hear what Supreme Court Justice Sonya Sotomayor just said?
She gets it!
When asked about the public’s dwindling confidence in the Court, Sotomayor pointed to the radical right-wing MAGA majority’s decision to create immunity from prosecution for Trump.
“I don’t think that Americans have accepted that anyone should be above the law in America,” Sotomayor said.
That decision not only kept Trump out of prison, but it’s also given him a license to do whatever he wants NOW.
Unless we’re successful!
This is Alan Cohn from Term Limit the Court, the national campaign working with 75 members of the House and Senate to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250210&t=1&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)
We had some important breaking news this weekend and we want to make sure you saw Rob’s email from Saturday:
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------_
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Date: Feb. 8th, 2025
Breaking news: I just filed another lawsuit against the Trump administration.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-1631&refcode2=1631_1088799_y4TvAf&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)
**Last night, I joined other Democratic attorneys general in suing to block Elon Musk and his Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) from accessing Americans’ sensitive financial data.**
**[Will you fuel our fight? Rush a grassroots contribution now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-1631&amount=5&refcode2=1631_1088799_y4TvAf&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)**
Since Trump’s inauguration, Musk and his team of 19 to 24-year-old cronies have infiltrated federal agencies like USAID, the U.S. Treasury, and now the Departments of Labor and Education, accessing the personal information of millions of Americans without proper authorization.
_President Trump does not have the power to give an unelected billionaire your bank account and social security number._
**A federal judge already responded to our lawsuit early this morning and granted a temporary restraining order** to block Musk and DOGE from continuing to access and potentially steal this sensitive information.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-1631&refcode2=1631_1088799_y4TvAf&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)
**[As I keep up the fight to stop yet another one of the Trump administration’s unlawful and dangerous actions, will you support our campaign with a grassroots donation of $5 or more?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-1631&amount=5&refcode2=1631_1088799_y4TvAf&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-1631&amount=5&refcode2=1631_1088799_y4TvAf&akid=1631%2E1088799%2Ey4TvAf)**
I’ll be in touch with more updates on this case when we have them. Thank you for your support along the way.
In solidarity,
Rob

name: Katie Porter
subject: Trump’s BS of the week—shutting down the consumer protection agency
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Truth to Power PAC
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/9?t=1&akid=39429%2E3422442%2EMRHWca)
Derek, President Trump has essentially shut down the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (the CFPB,) an agency that exists to try and make our economy more fair.
_How could anybody be against that?_
The CFPB works. Since 2011, **it's returned nearly $20 billion to consumers through real checks, canceled debt, and monetary relief.** The CFPB goes after businesses who are cheating or scamming consumers, which doesn't just benefit consumers, but also helps the many businesses who _do_ play by the rules.
**Look, this one's personal for me.** I got my start in public service trying to make sure that everybody has a fair shot in our economy. The CFPB is an important part of that mission.
The reason President Trump is taking executive aim at the CFPB, rather than proposing Congress eliminate it, is because he knows there's no chance any elected official, Democrat or Republican, would ever vote to destroy an agency that benefits every single American consumer.
More soon,
Katie
PS: **[I filmed a video discussing Trump’s attacks on the CFPB, you can watch the whole thing here.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250210?refcode=em20250210-39429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39429_3422442_MRHWca&akid=39429%2E3422442%2EMRHWca)**
We _need_ Democrats in Congress who will stand up to Trump.
**[Please chip in $5 to Truth to Power today to help us support and elect those candidates.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ttp-em-20250210?refcode=em20250210-39429&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39429_3422442_MRHWca&akid=39429%2E3422442%2EMRHWca)**

Former U.S. Congresswoman Katie Porter founded Truth to Power to support the campaigns of her fellow Democrats. Truth to Power supports candidates who will stand up to Donald Trump, fight to lower costs, and protect the environment. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/truth-to-power-1?refcode=em20250210-39429&amounts=&t=2&refcode2=39429_3422442_MRHWca&akid=39429%2E3422442%2EMRHWca)**
---

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [**you can do so here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-ttp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/ttp-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=39429%2E3422442%2EMRHWca).

We’re fired up to support Judge Crawford, and we’re determined to defeat her far-right opponent, Brad Schimel. **Here’s one major reason: when he was asked about Donald Trump’s pardons of the January 6th insurrectionists, he said he _didn’t object_.**
**If you support pardons for those who violated the law and tried to overturn a free and fair election, you shouldn’t be running for state supreme court — or any role where it is your responsibility to uphold the rule of law.**
The contrast could not be clearer: While Judge Crawford has shown on the bench that she’s a fair, impartial public servant, her radical opponent would take Wisconsin’s highest court back to an extreme version that rolls back rights rather than protects them.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101904446/527443828/-1665762292?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_WISupCourt50Days_email_20250210-NDRC-Tier1-WISupCourt50Days_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250210-NDRC-Tier1-WISupCourt50Days_&utm_campaign=WISupCourt50Days&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4YWZiM2U4LTAyZTgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=MhnzfovE89_WU98mR0Ig8o1k2qqs7QZJobPw264Kjn0=)
---
**If we lose this seat, the far right will be on track to roll back our progress on fair maps and a whole host of other issues.**
[**Your donation today will help power all of the NDRC’s work, including these critical efforts to help elect leaders who will defend our democracy. clean_body: Chip in right now to support Democracy Defenders like Judge Susan Crawford across the country. | Peter, the NDRC is proud to have endorsed Judge Susan Crawford in what could be one of the most consequential races of the year: the Wisconsin Supreme Court election. It’s coming up fast in just 50 days — and because conservatives would regain control of the court if they win this race, the stakes are sky-high. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We’re fired up to support Judge Crawford, and we’re determined to defeat her far-right opponent, Brad Schimel. Here’s one major reason: when he was asked about Donald Trump’s pardons of the January 6th insurrectionists, he said he didn’t object. If you support pardons for those who violated the law and tried to overturn a free and fair election, you shouldn’t be running for state supreme court — or any role where it is your responsibility to uphold the rule of law. The contrast could not be clearer: While Judge Crawford has shown on the bench that she’s a fair, impartial public servant, her radical opponent would take Wisconsin’s highest court back to an extreme version that rolls back rights rather than protects them. = If we lose this seat, the far right will be on track to roll back our progress on fair maps and a whole host of other issues. = —NDRC HQ = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. These special elections represent critical opportunities to build our Democratic power and elect more Democrats who will fight back against Trumpism in their state legislatures. | | |

**It’s only the beginning of the year, but already there are over a dozen special elections on the calendar in state legislatures. Take a look at some of our upcoming races:** | **Date** | **State** | **Seat**
---|---|---
2/15
| Delaware | SD-1

3/25

Fellow Conservative,

The radical left is raising an obscene amount of cash to crush us. **Just look at Georgia -** [**Jon Ossoff raked in $750,000 online in just five weeks.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=6a7f9d8eb55646b4b818854517d9d259&_e=6IzHYUQ8C4fZn-S0qJHMQjJZ8-jLutBqI7Nvsp809izFvRvfPHtaPUn8WWS2ByPXi83L1VRGPKwBWzWb0a1a_LzrDczOcEDn4eyvu12HA67xzyyAI3LJphaOFE6uHXSoWcvamMdbfBLGEzzF6Sv-fWEsLngLitGozpJdAxkdNMDUoMc9k3b6S0i2Qcgb1iM8ht-swBbGwXWC8vSQoQun2xeuJ9dgOTisYN1nSXtSoBhD-_xVQMcPF9dB5lGRzkdesyRG5zaspi14oPzIbqAM-TiECrmmTyMC-VTjlsOGhSxGBkMdSL_ZyeAgl8YamXKVHkxe7opCZY8obCrE0OPaWMqK5FilsqRN4Mwm0QjMDLXYLUNSx9D8IfeybGoAtoYJFmDysN9ayvY4cLFajoTpqmTm5Dj96ddrPpElekGNshrXzvi8HeXDtJtMEwq1mkgVCAxs0lDNr5CH2WoCzfa0Cg%3D%3D) **That's _ONE_ Senate Democrat in _ONE_ state.** Imagine how much the entire Democrat machine is stockpiling to destroy our candidates and block President Trump's America First agenda.

_They're coming for everything._

They want to pack the Supreme Court, open our borders, and turn America into a socialist country. They will spend whatever it takes to make it happen.

If we don’t match them dollar for dollar, we’re toast. name: Josh Harder
subject: Democrats can’t keep losing
body:
We need to do better.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101904760/527444983/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTgzZjc3Y2YtMDRlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VZuLt74_FedHF3xTuP9cvAQMnpEfK4X3boMFewwuv8k=) | Peter, I’ll be frank - the democratic party has to do better. The past two weeks have shown that if we truly believe what we say, then we need to step up and actually fight back. That comes from pushing back on the madness emanating out of DC right now and it means being ruthless in winning back the House in 2026 to serve as a check on Donald Trump. We have to be able to walk and chew gum. We have to use every lever at our disposal to fight back and we need to smartly, and aggressively, spread the message of how these policies will hurt American families. **That means two things: 1) We need to speak out against the harmful policies being implemented by the Administration and MAGA extremists, and 2) We need to actually start winning elections.** [_**The truth is, I’m on the frontlines of this fight as a Democrat in a Trump district. I’m not scared to speak out, but that also means I’m in much more danger in 2026. Please, chip in today to help me stay in this fight.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101904761/527444984/-1062586212?&refcode=E12188-20250210-DemcoraticParty-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTgzZjc3Y2YtMDRlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VZuLt74_FedHF3xTuP9cvAQMnpEfK4X3boMFewwuv8k=) [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101904762/527445012/-1062586212?&refcode=E12188-20250210-DemcoraticParty-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTgzZjc3Y2YtMDRlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VZuLt74_FedHF3xTuP9cvAQMnpEfK4X3boMFewwuv8k=) Peter, this is a make-or-break moment in our country’s history. We need Democrats to be brave enough to speak out. And then we need to make sure those same candidates win their tough reelects. I have a real target on my back but I’m not going to back down. [_**We need to fight back against what’s happening now. So I’m asking for your support: Will you chip in to help support our mission?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101904763/527445013/-1062586212?&refcode=E12188-20250210-DemcoraticParty-SL-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTgzZjc3Y2YtMDRlOC1lZjExLTkwY2ItMDAyMjQ4MmE5NGY0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VZuLt74_FedHF3xTuP9cvAQMnpEfK4X3boMFewwuv8k=) This is not a time for fear, it’s a time for action. \- Josh

clean_body: We need to do better. | = | Peter, I’ll be frank - the democratic party has to do better. The past two weeks have shown that if we truly believe what we say, then we need to step up and actually fight back. That comes from pushing back on the madness emanating out of DC right now and it means being ruthless in winning back the House in 2026 to serve as a check on Donald Trump. We have to be able to walk and chew gum. We have to use every lever at our disposal to fight back and we need to smartly, and aggressively, spread the message of how these policies will hurt American families. That means two things: 1) We need to speak out against the harmful policies being implemented by the Administration and MAGA extremists, and 2) We need to actually start winning elections. = = Peter, this is a make-or-break moment in our country’s history. We need Democrats to be brave enough to speak out. And then we need to make sure those same candidates win their tough reelects. I have a real target on my back but I’m not going to back down. = This is not a time for fear, it’s a time for action. \- Josh *

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: The CFPB returned more than $20 billion to consumers. Now Elon Musk wants to kill it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The Trump administration is all about the billionaires, and working people are getting the short end of the stick every single time.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250210-4752-footer&t=1&akid=4752%2E420207%2EVyKjab)
Peter —
Since 2011, **the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau has returned more than $20 billion to consumers who were cheated** by big banks, credit card companies, and so many other self-serving big corporations.
So it’s no surprise that Elon Musk now wants to kill it:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-4752&amount=3&refcode2=4752_420207_VyKjab&akid=4752%2E420207%2EVyKjab)
**This is about one thing: the rich raiding and looting our government to serve billionaires first. [Will you rush a donation of $3 or more to help Pramila fight back, grow our progressive movement, and build a government that puts working families before big corporations?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-4752&amount=3&refcode2=4752_420207_VyKjab&akid=4752%2E420207%2EVyKjab)**
The pattern is obvious, Peter:
* They’re coming after Medicaid so they can cut taxes _**for billionaires.**_

* They want to raise taxes and cut benefits for working people so they can cut taxes _**for billionaires.**_

* And now they want to kill an agency that’s returned more than $20 billion to consumers so _**billionaires**_ can keep profiting off of cheating working people.

The Trump administration is all about the billionaires, and working people are getting the short end of the stick every single time.
**Pramila is working to hold the billionaires accountable and grow our progressive movement so that we can defeat MAGA and create a government that puts working people first. But she can’t do it without your support!**
[**Peter, will you pitch in $3 right now to support Pramila’s campaign?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250210?refcode=em20250210-4752&amount=3&refcode2=4752_420207_VyKjab&akid=4752%2E420207%2EVyKjab)

**The Senate Finance Committee narrowly advanced RFK Jr.’s nomination to lead the Department of Health and Human Services, and a vote is expected later this week.**

His unfounded conspiracy theories make him a dangerous addition to Trump's Cabinet:

| Peter,

During these challenging times, our wins in 2024 serve as a guiding light as we work towards securing representation at every level of government. Our new leaders and alums represent the New American Majority — _Black, Brown, Indigenous women, women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women!_

[_**Before we share a few highlights from our 2024 Annual Report, will you make a contribution so we can continue recruiting and training the next generation of Emerge women to serve their communities and fight back?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101905159/527446313/-1316299240?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-02-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNlYTFmZjFhLTA3ZTgtZWYxMS05MGNiLTAwMjI0ODJhOTRmNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=PUXLaIctZBqc_Pgpdy75vp8DFt4knRT8yJX0Nymx-Qc=)

**🤝 ****We broke barriers to increase representation. Sujata Gadkar-Wilcox** , in SD-22, is Connecticut’s first Indian American Senator. **Myrna Melgar** is the first Latina elected to San Francisco's Board of Supervisors. **Kyra Harris Bolden** is the first Black woman elected to the Michigan Supreme Court.

**🏛️ ****We made strides across state legislatures.** Emerge helped elect 224 women to state legislatures, with Emerge alums now making up 36% of the New Mexico House of Representatives and 17% of the New Mexico State Senate.

**🚺 ****We elected women across the country.** Just last year, Emerge helped elect 400 women to office, with about 70% of Emerge alums winning their races.

clean_body: During these challenging times, our wins in 2024 serve as a guiding light as we work towards securing representation at every level of government. | = | Peter, During these challenging times, our wins in 2024 serve as a guiding light as we work towards securing representation at every level of government. Our new leaders and alums represent the New American Majority — Black, Brown, Indigenous women, women of color, as well as young, LGBTQ+, and unmarried women! = | = 🤝 We broke barriers to increase representation. Sujata Gadkar-Wilcox , in SD-22, is Connecticut’s first Indian American Senator. Myrna Melgar is the first Latina elected to San Francisco's Board of Supervisors. Kyra Harris Bolden is the first Black woman elected to the Michigan Supreme Court. 🏛️ We made strides across state legislatures. Emerge helped elect 224 women to state legislatures, with Emerge alums now making up 36% of the New Mexico House of Representatives and 17% of the New Mexico State Senate. 🚺 We elected women across the country. Just last year, Emerge helped elect 400 women to office, with about 70% of Emerge alums winning their races. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Emerge Comms Team | | 👇 | * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 4 Embarcadero Center Suite 1400 San Francisco, CA 94111 United States

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I went on Bill Maher’s show again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress
body:
I’m not afraid to fight for President Trump
| | | | [](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
---
[](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
|
---
Last time I was on Bill Maher’s show, I was called a “raisin in a GOP potato salad.”
My name is Byron Donalds, I’m President Trump’s strongest supporter in the House & I just went on his show a second time to defend our MAGA Agenda.
I grew up in Brooklyn, NY raised by a single mother. I have thick skin & I’m not afraid to go into the lion’s den - so I laid out the facts and SHUT DOWN the liberal talking points one by one.
Anytime, any place. If it’s a late-night talk show host, Fake News Network, or Woke Podcast, I’ll go on ANY hostile media to defend YOU & President Trump.
But the only way I can continue my fight is through your support. Your contributions keep me fighting for MAGA.
[So please, can I count on you to chip into my Fake News Offensive Fund today? ](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)

Throughout the 2024 Election, I went on hostile media networks to destroy the LIES about Trump and to convince THEIR VIEWERS to vote for MAGA.
It all paid off - but our fight is far from over. If anything, the lies have only _INCREASED_ since Trump took office - and the last thing I want is for their lies to get out of hand.
Your support is the ONLY way I can dismantle their phony narratives, so please chip in whatever you can below to my Fake News Offensive Fund so I can continue the fight.

|
---
[SUPPORT MY EFFORTS](https://link.support.byrondonalds.)
|
---
Thank you and god bless,
Byron Donalds _**[]()**_

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Hypocrisy from the Democratic establishment:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, news just
broke that instead of focusing all of their time on defending the everyday
people being robbed by the Trump-Musk administration, Democratic
leadership took a break to meet with over 150 wealthy Silicon Valley
donors last week:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250210?refcode=em20250210-36417&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36417_1203867_rvYDiB&akid=36417%2E1203867%2ErvYDiB ]A screenshot of a post on X from Elena Schneider (@ec_schneider)
reading: Scoop - Hakeem Jeffries met w/ 150+ Silicon Valley donors last
week, first step in mending relationships w/ 'pissed' donors. 'Singular
focus was - how do we ensure Silicon Valley remains w/ Dems because, right
now, Silicon Valley is feeling very purple.'

Democrats are supposed to be fighting a Big Tech oligarchy and corporate
coup while their leaders promise Silicon Valley CEOs they're still
friends. It’s total hypocrisy from Democratic leadership and exactly why
voters are losing trust in this Party.

Democratic Party leaders have clearly learned absolutely nothing since
November’s loss. Instead of fighting to improve the material conditions of
working people across our country, their time is focused on appeasing
Silicon Valley billionaires.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250210?refcode=em20250210-36417&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36417_1203867_rvYDiB&akid=36417%2E1203867%2ErvYDiB ]Pitch in ANY amount today to help us find and support as many
progressives as possible to run primary campaigns against corporate
Democrats in Congress who care more about pleasing wealthy donors than
fighting for working people →

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250210?refcode=em20250210-36417&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36417_1203867_rvYDiB&akid=36417%2E1203867%2ErvYDiB ]Contribute $5

It’s time to clean up shop in this Democratic Party and get rid of the
corporate career politicians who are working harder for Big Tech
billionaires than working class communities.

In solidarity,

Team JD

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Two things:
body:
---
We’ll get straight to the point. It’s clear that this moment demands a Democratic Party that can do two things:
1. Mobilize and organize Democrats against Trump and his billionaire allies’ harmful policies.
2. Build the infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at all levels of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states.

That’s our mission, Derek. It may not be flashy work, but it’s absolutely essential right now. And it requires all of us to do our part — doing what we can to protect our friends, family members, and neighbors from Trump’s most dangerous legislation while simultaneously making a sustained commitment to helping elect Democrats to all offices, from the school board to the Senate. **That’s why we’re asking for your help today.** [**Can you make your first $3 contribution of 2025 today to help us build the strongest possible Party?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250210_2760_fr&refcode2=2760_22930333_mWSJMw&akid=2760%2E22930333%2EmWSJMw) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250210_2760_fr&refcode2=2760_22930333_mWSJMw&akid=2760%2E22930333%2EmWSJMw)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-february-2025?refcode=em_20250210_2760_fr&refcode2=2760_22930333_mWSJMw&akid=2760%2E22930333%2EmWSJMw)**
---
****
Thank you for stepping up, especially right now.
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

---
This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds
I’m the proud son of a single-mother from the inner-city who achieved the American Dream.
But when the “tolerant” left found out I’m a Black Man who supports President Trump, they opened-up the racist floodgates against me.
From ridiculous slurs to calling me a “white supremacist”, these people go NUTS when I break all of their outdated narratives on race.
**Look, I don’t care what your skin color is. If you love our country, you’re a friend in my book.**
But now radical Democrats are coming after me for my message on Black History Month, and sadly things are taking a turn for the worse for me.
They want each and every one of Trump’s Black MAGA supporters like me out of the picture, and they’re raising MILLIONS to see it happen next election.
I hate to admit this - but I’m at the top of their “ _**Must-Go MAGA List**_ ”, and it’s not looking good.
I’m fighting day and night for President Trump & The MAGA Movement, and I’m afraid their dreams of a Radical Left House Majority will come true if I can’t muster an overwhelming response this month.
Please, I can’t let President Trump down. clean_body: And what the “tolerant” left will never admit about their views | | | | | This is Black MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds I’m the proud son of a single-mother from the inner-city who achieved the American Dream. But when the “tolerant” left found out I’m a Black Man who supports President Trump, they opened-up the racist floodgates against me. From ridiculous slurs to calling me a “white supremacist”, these people go NUTS when I break all of their outdated narratives on race. Look, I don’t care what your skin color is. If you love our country, you’re a friend in my book. But now radical Democrats are coming after me for my message on Black History Month, and sadly things are taking a turn for the worse for me. They want each and every one of Trump’s Black MAGA supporters like me out of the picture, and they’re raising MILLIONS to see it happen next election. I hate to admit this - but I’m at the top of their “ Must-Go MAGA List ”, and it’s not looking good. I’m fighting day and night for President Trump & The MAGA Movement, and I’m afraid their dreams of a Radical Left House Majority will come true if I can’t muster an overwhelming response this month. Please, I can’t let President Trump down. You’re the only reason I’m able to keep fighting. | | Thank you for your timely response, Byron Donalds | | | | Paid for by Byron Donalds for Congress 138 Conant Street Beverly, MA 01985
